sql_text:
/* ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
   [활동 퍼널 현황] 통합 쿼리 — 11개 시각적 개체(GOLD 쿼리) 단일화
   ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
   용도 : AI 에이전트가 "26년 5월 활동현황 보여줘, 기회 실적과 기회 진척률만"
          같은 자연어로 원하는 지표만 골라 쓸 수 있도록 하나로 통합.
   구조 : 공통 변수 → 공통 필터(SC) → 지표별 CTE → SC×유형 그리드로 통합.
          지표가 서로 다른 팩트/집계레벨이라 한 SELECT로 못 합침 → FULL OUTER JOIN.
   출력 : SC(딜러/전시장/팀/이름) × 유형(common_tp_nm) 한 행에 아래 12개 지표 컬럼.
          [활동목표 활동실적 활동진척률] [기회목표 기회실적 기회진척률 기회전환률]
          [계약목표 계약실적 계약진행률 계약전환률]
   지표선택 : @metric 으로 특정 지표만 필터(NULL=전체 반환). 맨 아래 주석 참고.
   ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ */

/* ── 기간 (필수) ── */
DECLARE @Year        INT           = NULL;   -- 연도 예)2026
DECLARE @MonthNumber INT           = NULL;      -- 월 1~12  예)5월

/* ── 슬라이서 (NULL=전체, 여러 값은 콤마로 구분) ──
   예) 한 명: N'강민성'  /  여러 명: N'강민성,강민석'  /  전체: NULL           */
DECLARE @Brand      NVARCHAR(MAX) = NULL;    -- DIM_MNG_USER[BRAND]  N'LEXUS' / N'LEXUS,TOYOTA'
DECLARE @DealerNm   NVARCHAR(MAX) = NULL;    -- DIM_MNG_DEALER[dealer_nm]  콤마 다중 가능
DECLARE @GroupName  NVARCHAR(MAX) = NULL;    -- DIM_MNG_USER[group_name] 전시장  콤마 다중 가능
DECLARE @DeptNm     NVARCHAR(MAX) = NULL;    -- DIM_MNG_USER[dept_nm] 팀  콤마 다중 가능
DECLARE @ActYn      NVARCHAR(MAX) = NULL;    -- DIM_MNG_USER[active_yn] N'재직'/N'퇴직'
DECLARE @UserName   NVARCHAR(MAX) = NULL;    -- DIM_MNG_USER[name] SC명  예)N'강민성,강민석'
DECLARE @CommonTpNm NVARCHAR(MAX) = NULL;    -- DIM_CRM_ACT_TYPE_ORDER[common_tp_nm] 활동유형  콤마 다중 가능

/* ── 지표 선택 (NULL=전체 12지표 반환) ──
   허용값(콤마 다중 가능): 
   활동목표,활동실적,활동진척률,기회목표,기회실적,기회진척률,기회전환률,
   계약목표,계약실적,계약진행률,계약전환률                                    */
DECLARE @metric NVARCHAR(MAX) = NULL;        -- 예) N'기회실적,기회진척률'

/* ── 파생 기간 ── */
DECLARE @MonthStart DATE = DATEFROMPARTS(@Year, @MonthNumber, 1);
DECLARE @MonthEnd   DATE = EOMONTH(@MonthStart);

;WITH
/* ══ 0. 공통 필터·슬라이서를 통과한 SC(사용자) ══
   페이지 필터(창구SC/특정팀/제외user 제외) + 슬라이서 전부 여기서 1회 적용 */
elig_user AS (
    SELECT
        u.sc_key,
        dlr.dealer_nm,
        u.group_name,
        u.dept_nm,
        u.[name]
    FROM ktws.DIM_MNG_USER        AS u
    LEFT JOIN ktws.DIM_MNG_DEALER AS dlr ON u.dealer_key = dlr.dealer_key
    WHERE ISNULL(u.facade_sc_yn, N'') <> N'창구SC'
      AND u.[name] NOT IN (N'고객지원팀', N'TOYOTA YM')
      AND u.user_id NOT IN
          ('DM5103','DM9999','JB30007','JB30016','KMKS176','KMKS999','JB30067')
      AND dlr.dealer_nm IS NOT NULL AND LTRIM(RTRIM(dlr.dealer_nm)) <> N''
      AND (@Brand    IS NULL OR EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM STRING_SPLIT(@Brand,   N',') s WHERE LTRIM(RTRIM(s.value)) = u.BRAND))
      AND (@DealerNm IS NULL OR EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM STRING_SPLIT(@DealerNm,N',') s WHERE LTRIM(RTRIM(s.value)) = dlr.dealer_nm))
      AND (@GroupName IS NULL OR EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM STRING_SPLIT(@GroupName,N',') s WHERE LTRIM(RTRIM(s.value)) = u.group_name))
      AND (@DeptNm   IS NULL OR EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM STRING_SPLIT(@DeptNm,  N',') s WHERE LTRIM(RTRIM(s.value)) = u.dept_nm))
      AND (@ActYn    IS NULL OR EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM STRING_SPLIT(@ActYn,   N',') s WHERE LTRIM(RTRIM(s.value)) = u.active_yn))
      AND (@UserName IS NULL OR EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM STRING_SPLIT(@UserName,N',') s WHERE LTRIM(RTRIM(s.value)) = u.[name]))
),

/* ══ [활동] ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ */
/* 1. 활동 목표 : act_mtd_(target)_v3  (일별 목표, tp_grp_1 필터) */
act_target AS (
    SELECT eu.dealer_nm, eu.group_name, eu.dept_nm, eu.[name], aord.common_tp_nm,
           SUM(f.target_cnt) AS v
    FROM ktws.FCT_CRM_TARGET_D            AS f
    JOIN ktws.DIM_CALENDAR_KTWS           AS c    ON f.daily_dt      = c.[Date]
    JOIN ktws.DIM_CRM_ACT_TYPE            AS t    ON f.type_cd       = t.tp_key
    JOIN ktws.DIM_CRM_ACT_TYPE_ORDER      AS aord ON t.common_tp_nm  = aord.common_tp_nm
    JOIN elig_user                        AS eu   ON f.sc_key        = eu.sc_key
    WHERE t.tp_grp_1 IN (N'관계형성', N'기회창출')
      AND c.[Year] = @Year AND c.[MonthNumber] = @MonthNumber
      AND (@CommonTpNm IS NULL OR EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM STRING_SPLIT(@CommonTpNm,N',') s WHERE LTRIM(RTRIM(s.value)) = aord.common_tp_nm))
    GROUP BY eu.dealer_nm, eu.group_name, eu.dept_nm, eu.[name], aord.common_tp_nm
),
/* 2. 활동 실적 : act_mtd_(ac)_preOp  (일별 실적, tp_grp_1 필터) */
act_actual AS (
    SELECT eu.dealer_nm, eu.group_name, eu.dept_nm, eu.[name], aord.common_tp_nm,
           SUM(f.actual_cnt) AS v
    FROM ktws.FCT_ACTIVITY_v2             AS f
    JOIN ktws.DIM_CALENDAR_KTWS           AS c    ON f.act_dt_fr     = c.[Date]
    JOIN ktws.DIM_CRM_ACT_TYPE            AS t    ON f.tp_key        = t.tp_key
    JOIN ktws.DIM_CRM_ACT_TYPE_ORDER      AS aord ON t.common_tp_nm  = aord.common_tp_nm
    JOIN elig_user                        AS eu   ON f.sc_key        = eu.sc_key
    WHERE t.tp_grp_1 IN (N'관계형성', N'기회창출')
      AND c.[Year] = @Year AND c.[MonthNumber] = @MonthNumber
      AND (@CommonTpNm IS NULL OR EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM STRING_SPLIT(@CommonTpNm,N',') s WHERE LTRIM(RTRIM(s.value)) = aord.common_tp_nm))
    GROUP BY eu.dealer_nm, eu.group_name, eu.dept_nm, eu.[name], aord.common_tp_nm
),

/* ══ [기회] ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ */
/* 5. 기회 목표 : lead_funnel_(mtd_target)_preOp  (월별 목표) */
lead_target AS (
    SELECT eu.dealer_nm, eu.group_name, eu.dept_nm, eu.[name], aord.common_tp_nm,
           SUM(f.target_cnt) AS v
    FROM ktws.FCT_CRM_TARGET_M            AS f
    JOIN ktws.DIM_CALENDAR_KTWS           AS c    ON f.monthly_dt    = c.[Date]
    JOIN ktws.DIM_CRM_ACT_TYPE            AS t    ON f.tp_key        = t.tp_key
    JOIN ktws.DIM_CRM_ACT_TYPE_ORDER      AS aord ON t.common_tp_nm  = aord.common_tp_nm
    JOIN elig_user                        AS eu   ON f.sc_key        = eu.sc_key
    WHERE t.tp_grp_1 IN (N'관계형성', N'기회창출')
      AND c.[Year] = @Year AND c.[MonthNumber] = @MonthNumber
      AND (@CommonTpNm IS NULL OR EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM STRING_SPLIT(@CommonTpNm,N',') s WHERE LTRIM(RTRIM(s.value)) = aord.common_tp_nm))
    GROUP BY eu.dealer_nm, eu.group_name, eu.dept_nm, eu.[name], aord.common_tp_nm
),
/* 6. 기회 실적 : lead_funnel_(mtd)_preOp
   자격 활동(관계형성/기회창출, 부재중 제외)을 가진 리드의 DISTINCT lead_key.
   오픈/판매 조건: close_dt>월말 OR close_dt NULL OR last_retail_sales_dt 존재 */
lead_actual AS (
    SELECT eu.dealer_nm, eu.group_name, eu.dept_nm, eu.[name], aord.common_tp_nm,
           COUNT(DISTINCT l.lead_key) AS v
    FROM ktws.FCT_LEAD                    AS l
    JOIN ktws.DIM_CALENDAR_KTWS           AS lc   ON l.lead_reg_dt   = lc.[Date]
    JOIN elig_user                        AS eu   ON l.cl_sc_key     = eu.sc_key
    JOIN ktws.DIM_CRM_ACT_TYPE            AS lct  ON l.tp_key        = lct.tp_key
    JOIN ktws.DIM_CRM_ACT_TYPE_ORDER      AS aord ON lct.common_tp_nm = aord.common_tp_nm
    WHERE lc.[Year] = @Year AND lc.[MonthNumber] = @MonthNumber
      AND ( l.close_dt > @MonthEnd OR l.close_dt IS NULL OR l.last_retail_sales_dt IS NOT NULL )
      AND (@CommonTpNm IS NULL OR EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM STRING_SPLIT(@CommonTpNm,N',') s WHERE LTRIM(RTRIM(s.value)) = aord.common_tp_nm))
      AND EXISTS (
            SELECT 1
            FROM ktws.FCT_ACTIVITY_v2        AS a
            JOIN ktws.DIM_CRM_ACT_TYPE       AS act ON a.tp_key = act.tp_key
            WHERE a.lead_key = l.lead_key
              AND a.sc_key  = l.cl_sc_key
              AND act.common_tp_nm = lct.common_tp_nm
              AND act.tp_grp_1 IN (N'관계형성', N'기회창출')
              AND ( a.act_result IS NULL OR a.act_result <> N'부재중' )
              AND a.act_dt_fr >= @MonthStart AND a.act_dt_fr <= @MonthEnd
      )
    GROUP BY eu.dealer_nm, eu.group_name, eu.dept_nm, eu.[name], aord.common_tp_nm
),

/* ══ [계약] ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ */
/* 10. 계약 실적 : cntrct_funnel_(mtd)  (유형별, 자격 리드에서 나온 계약) */
cntrct_actual AS (
    SELECT eu.dealer_nm, eu.group_name, eu.dept_nm, eu.[name], aord.common_tp_nm,
           SUM(c.cnt) AS v
    FROM ktws.FCT_CONTRACT_KTWS           AS c
    JOIN elig_user                        AS eu   ON c.cn_sc_key     = eu.sc_key
    JOIN ktws.DIM_CRM_ACT_TYPE            AS ct   ON c.tp_key        = ct.tp_key
    JOIN ktws.DIM_CRM_ACT_TYPE_ORDER      AS aord ON ct.common_tp_nm = aord.common_tp_nm
    WHERE c.contract_dt >= @MonthStart AND c.contract_dt <= @MonthEnd
      AND (@CommonTpNm IS NULL OR EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM STRING_SPLIT(@CommonTpNm,N',') s WHERE LTRIM(RTRIM(s.value)) = aord.common_tp_nm))
      AND EXISTS (
            SELECT 1
            FROM ktws.FCT_LEAD           AS l
            JOIN ktws.DIM_CRM_ACT_TYPE   AS lct ON l.tp_key = lct.tp_key
            WHERE l.lead_key   = c.lead_key
              AND l.cl_sc_key  = c.cn_sc_key
              AND lct.common_tp_nm = ct.common_tp_nm
              AND l.lead_reg_dt >= @MonthStart AND l.lead_reg_dt <= @MonthEnd
              AND ( l.close_dt > @MonthEnd OR l.close_dt IS NULL OR l.last_retail_sales_dt IS NOT NULL )
              AND EXISTS (
                    SELECT 1
                    FROM ktws.FCT_ACTIVITY_v2 AS a
                    JOIN ktws.DIM_CRM_ACT_TYPE AS act ON a.tp_key = act.tp_key
                    WHERE a.lead_key = l.lead_key
                      AND a.sc_key   = c.cn_sc_key
                      AND act.common_tp_nm = ct.common_tp_nm
                      AND act.tp_grp_1 IN (N'관계형성', N'기회창출')
                      AND ( a.act_result IS NULL OR a.act_result <> N'부재중' )
                      AND a.lead_key IS NOT NULL
                      AND a.act_dt_fr >= @MonthStart AND a.act_dt_fr <= @MonthEnd
              )
      )
    GROUP BY eu.dealer_nm, eu.group_name, eu.dept_nm, eu.[name], aord.common_tp_nm
),
/* 9/11. 계약 목표 : cntrct_funnel_(mtd_target)  (common_tp_nm='계약'만, 유형 무시)
   → SC 소계 레벨. 유형 그리드와 붙이기 위해 common_tp_nm 은 NULL 로 둠 */
cntrct_target AS (
    SELECT eu.dealer_nm, eu.group_name, eu.dept_nm, eu.[name],
           CAST(NULL AS NVARCHAR(200)) AS common_tp_nm,
           SUM(t.target_cnt) AS v
    FROM ktws.FCT_CRM_TARGET_M       AS t
    JOIN ktws.DIM_CALENDAR_KTWS      AS c   ON t.monthly_dt = c.[Date]
    JOIN ktws.DIM_CRM_ACT_TYPE       AS tct ON t.tp_key     = tct.tp_key
    JOIN elig_user                   AS eu  ON t.sc_key     = eu.sc_key
    WHERE c.[Year] = @Year AND c.[MonthNumber] = @MonthNumber
      AND tct.common_tp_nm = N'계약'
    GROUP BY eu.dealer_nm, eu.group_name, eu.dept_nm, eu.[name]
),
/* 계약 실적을 SC 소계로도 집계 (계약 진행률 분자용: 유형 무시) */
cntrct_actual_sc AS (
    SELECT dealer_nm, group_name, dept_nm, [name],
           SUM(v) AS v
    FROM cntrct_actual
    GROUP BY dealer_nm, group_name, dept_nm, [name]
),

/* ══ 통합 그리드 : 모든 지표의 SC×유형 키를 합집합 ══ */
grid AS (
    SELECT dealer_nm, group_name, dept_nm, [name], common_tp_nm FROM act_target
    UNION SELECT dealer_nm, group_name, dept_nm, [name], common_tp_nm FROM act_actual
    UNION SELECT dealer_nm, group_name, dept_nm, [name], common_tp_nm FROM lead_target
    UNION SELECT dealer_nm, group_name, dept_nm, [name], common_tp_nm FROM lead_actual
    UNION SELECT dealer_nm, group_name, dept_nm, [name], common_tp_nm FROM cntrct_actual
),

/* ══ 상세행 : SC×유형 한 행에 raw 개수값 보관 (합계 재계산용) ══
   계약목표/계약소계실적은 SC 소계 레벨이라, 합계행에서 유형행 중복 합산을 막기 위해
   각 SC의 '첫 유형행'만 세도록 sc_first 순번을 매겨둠. */
detail AS (
    SELECT
        g.dealer_nm, g.group_name, g.dept_nm, g.[name], g.common_tp_nm,
        ISNULL(at1.v,0)  AS act_tgt,
        ISNULL(aa1.v,0)  AS act_act,
        ISNULL(lt1.v,0)  AS lead_tgt,
        ISNULL(la1.v,0)  AS lead_act,
        ISNULL(ca1.v,0)  AS cntrct_act,       -- 유형별 계약 실적
        ct1.v            AS cntrct_tgt_sc,     -- SC 소계 계약목표(유형 무시)
        casc.v           AS cntrct_act_sc,     -- SC 소계 계약실적(유형 무시)
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
            PARTITION BY g.dealer_nm, g.group_name, g.dept_nm, g.[name]
            ORDER BY g.common_tp_nm
        ) AS sc_first
    FROM grid AS g
    LEFT JOIN act_target       AS at1  ON at1.dealer_nm=g.dealer_nm AND at1.group_name=g.group_name AND at1.dept_nm=g.dept_nm AND at1.[name]=g.[name] AND at1.common_tp_nm=g.common_tp_nm
    LEFT JOIN act_actual       AS aa1  ON aa1.dealer_nm=g.dealer_nm AND aa1.group_name=g.group_name AND aa1.dept_nm=g.dept_nm AND aa1.[name]=g.[name] AND aa1.common_tp_nm=g.common_tp_nm
    LEFT JOIN lead_target      AS lt1  ON lt1.dealer_nm=g.dealer_nm AND lt1.group_name=g.group_name AND lt1.dept_nm=g.dept_nm AND lt1.[name]=g.[name] AND lt1.common_tp_nm=g.common_tp_nm
    LEFT JOIN lead_actual      AS la1  ON la1.dealer_nm=g.dealer_nm AND la1.group_name=g.group_name AND la1.dept_nm=g.dept_nm AND la1.[name]=g.[name] AND la1.common_tp_nm=g.common_tp_nm
    LEFT JOIN cntrct_actual    AS ca1  ON ca1.dealer_nm=g.dealer_nm AND ca1.group_name=g.group_name AND ca1.dept_nm=g.dept_nm AND ca1.[name]=g.[name] AND ca1.common_tp_nm=g.common_tp_nm
    LEFT JOIN cntrct_target    AS ct1  ON ct1.dealer_nm=g.dealer_nm AND ct1.group_name=g.group_name AND ct1.dept_nm=g.dept_nm AND ct1.[name]=g.[name]
    LEFT JOIN cntrct_actual_sc AS casc ON casc.dealer_nm=g.dealer_nm AND casc.group_name=g.group_name AND casc.dept_nm=g.dept_nm AND casc.[name]=g.[name]
)

/* ══ 최종 출력 : 상세행 + 맨 아래 전체 합계행 ══
   개수 = 단순 합산, 비율 = 합계 분자÷합계 분모 재계산(원본 합계행과 동일 방식) */
SELECT
    [딜러], [전시장], [팀], [SC], [활동유형],
    [활동목표], [활동실적], [활동진척률],
    [기회전환률], [기회목표], [기회실적], [기회진척률],
    [계약전환률], [계약목표], [계약실적], [계약진행률]
FROM (
    /* ── 상세행 ── */
    SELECT
        0 AS ord,
        dealer_nm    AS [딜러],
        group_name   AS [전시장],
        dept_nm      AS [팀],
        [name]       AS [SC],
        common_tp_nm AS [활동유형],
        act_tgt      AS [활동목표],
        act_act      AS [활동실적],
        CASE WHEN act_tgt=0 THEN 1.0 ELSE CAST(act_act AS float)/act_tgt END          AS [활동진척률],
        CASE WHEN act_act=0 THEN NULL ELSE CAST(lead_act AS float)/act_act END         AS [기회전환률],
        lead_tgt     AS [기회목표],
        lead_act     AS [기회실적],
        CASE WHEN lead_tgt=0 THEN 0.0 ELSE CAST(lead_act AS float)/lead_tgt END        AS [기회진척률],
        CASE WHEN lead_act=0 THEN NULL ELSE CAST(cntrct_act AS float)/lead_act END     AS [계약전환률],
        cntrct_tgt_sc AS [계약목표],
        cntrct_act    AS [계약실적],
        CASE WHEN cntrct_tgt_sc IS NULL THEN NULL
             WHEN cntrct_tgt_sc=0 THEN 1.0
             ELSE CAST(ISNULL(cntrct_act_sc,0) AS float)/cntrct_tgt_sc END             AS [계약진행률]
    FROM detail

    UNION ALL

    /* ── 전체 합계행 (개수 SUM, 비율 재계산) ── */
    SELECT
        1 AS ord,
        N'합계' AS [딜러], NULL AS [전시장], NULL AS [팀], NULL AS [SC], NULL AS [활동유형],
        SUM(act_tgt)   AS [활동목표],
        SUM(act_act)   AS [활동실적],
        CASE WHEN SUM(act_tgt)=0 THEN 1.0 ELSE CAST(SUM(act_act) AS float)/SUM(act_tgt) END      AS [활동진척률],
        CASE WHEN SUM(act_act)=0 THEN NULL ELSE CAST(SUM(lead_act) AS float)/SUM(act_act) END     AS [기회전환률],
        SUM(lead_tgt)  AS [기회목표],
        SUM(lead_act)  AS [기회실적],
        CASE WHEN SUM(lead_tgt)=0 THEN 0.0 ELSE CAST(SUM(lead_act) AS float)/SUM(lead_tgt) END    AS [기회진척률],
        CASE WHEN SUM(lead_act)=0 THEN NULL ELSE CAST(SUM(cntrct_act) AS float)/SUM(lead_act) END AS [계약전환률],
        /* 계약목표·계약소계실적은 SC당 1번만(sc_first=1) 세서 중복 합산 방지 */
        SUM(CASE WHEN sc_first=1 THEN ISNULL(cntrct_tgt_sc,0) ELSE 0 END)                         AS [계약목표],
        SUM(cntrct_act) AS [계약실적],
        CASE WHEN SUM(CASE WHEN sc_first=1 THEN ISNULL(cntrct_tgt_sc,0) ELSE 0 END)=0 THEN NULL
             ELSE CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN sc_first=1 THEN ISNULL(cntrct_act_sc,0) ELSE 0 END) AS float)
                  / SUM(CASE WHEN sc_first=1 THEN ISNULL(cntrct_tgt_sc,0) ELSE 0 END) END         AS [계약진행률]
    FROM detail
) AS final_result
ORDER BY ord, [딜러], [전시장], [팀], [SC], [활동유형];

/* ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
   [AI 에이전트 사용 가이드]
   ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
   ● "26년 5월 활동현황"      → @Year=2026, @MonthNumber=5
   ● "기회 실적과 기회 진척률만" → 최종 SELECT에서 [기회실적],[기회진척률] 컬럼만 노출.
      (컬럼 자체는 항상 계산되므로, 에이전트는 필요한 컬럼만 골라 보여주면 됨.
       전체 결과는 SC×유형 한 행에 12지표가 다 들어있음.)
   ● 특정 SC/팀/전시장/브랜드만 → 상단 슬라이서 변수에 값 지정.
      - 모든 슬라이서는 콤마로 여러 값 지정 가능(NULL=전체):
        한 명 @UserName=N'강민성' / 여러 명 @UserName=N'강민성,강민석' / 전체 NULL
        (브랜드/딜러/전시장/팀/재직/SC명/활동유형 전부 동일 방식)
   ● 특정 활동유형만 → @CommonTpNm 지정, 콤마 다중 가능
      (단, 계약목표/진행률은 유형무시 소계라 영향 없음).

   [지표 → 원본 시각적 개체 매핑]
     활동목표=1, 활동실적=2, 활동진척률=3, 기회전환률=4, 기회목표=5, 기회실적=6,
     기회진척률=7, 계약전환률=8, 계약목표=9, 계약실적=10, 계약진행률=11

   [주의]
   - 계약목표/계약진행률은 원본 DAX가 SC 소계(유형 무시) 레벨에서만 값을 냄.
     따라서 유형(common_tp_nm)이 있는 행에서는 NULL, SC별 1행에만 값이 잡히도록
     common_tp_nm=NULL 로 붙였음. 유형별 계약 실적/전환률은 유형행에 정상 표기.
   - 진척률/전환률 0분모 처리는 원본 DAX와 동일:
     활동진척률 DIVIDE(...,1) / 기회진척률 DIVIDE(...,0) / 기회·계약전환률 DIVIDE(...,BLANK).

   [합계행]
   - 맨 아래 [딜러]=N'합계' 행이 전체 합계. 상세행과 UNION ALL 로 붙고 ord 로 맨 뒤 정렬.
   - 개수(활동목표/실적, 기회목표/실적, 계약목표/실적) = 단순 SUM.
   - 비율(진척률/전환률/진행률) = 개별 행 평균이 아니라 '합계 분자 ÷ 합계 분모' 재계산.
     (BI 원본 합계행과 동일: 예 활동진척률 = SUM(활동실적)/SUM(활동목표))
   - 계약목표/계약소계실적은 SC 소계 지표라 유형행마다 값이 반복됨 → 합계에서
     sc_first=1(SC별 첫 행)만 합산해 SC당 1번만 세도록 중복 제거.
   - 딜러/전시장/팀 등 부분 합계가 필요하면 detail 을 그 레벨로 GROUP BY 하여
     같은 방식(개수 SUM, 비율 재계산)으로 소계행을 추가하면 됨.
   ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ */

DECLARE @Year        INT           = NULL;
DECLARE @MonthNumber INT           = NULL;
DECLARE @Brand       NVARCHAR(100) = NULL;   -- DIM_MNG_USER[BRAND]
DECLARE @DealerNm    NVARCHAR(100) = NULL;   -- DIM_MNG_DEALER[dealer_nm]
DECLARE @GroupName   NVARCHAR(100) = NULL;   -- DIM_MNG_USER[group_name]
DECLARE @DeptNm      NVARCHAR(100) = NULL;   -- DIM_MNG_USER[dept_nm]
DECLARE @ActYn       NVARCHAR(10)  = NULL;   -- DIM_MNG_USER[active_yn]
DECLARE @Name        NVARCHAR(100) = NULL;   -- DIM_MNG_USER[name]
DECLARE @CommonTpNm  NVARCHAR(100) = NULL;   -- DIM_CRM_ACT_TYPE_ORDER[common_tp_nm]

DECLARE @MonthStart DATE = DATEFROMPARTS(@Year, @MonthNumber, 1);
DECLARE @MonthEnd   DATE = EOMONTH(@MonthStart);
DECLARE @Today      DATE = CAST(GETDATE() AS DATE);

-- 슬라이서/페이지필터를 통과한 SC가 한 명이라도 있을 때만 값 산출
;WITH filter_ctx AS (
    SELECT 1 AS has_ctx
    FROM [ktws].[DIM_MNG_USER]        AS u
        INNER JOIN [ktws].[DIM_MNG_DEALER] AS d ON u.dealer_key = d.dealer_key
    WHERE d.dealer_nm IS NOT NULL AND LTRIM(RTRIM(d.dealer_nm)) <> N''
        -- 페이지 필터
        AND (u.facade_sc_yn <> N'창구SC' OR u.facade_sc_yn IS NULL)
        AND (u.[name] NOT IN (N'고객지원팀', N'TOYOTA YM') OR u.[name] IS NULL)
        AND u.user_id NOT IN
            ('DM5103','DM9999','JB30007','JB30016','KMKS176','KMKS999','JB30067')
        -- 슬라이서 (미선택 시 NULL → 전체)
        AND (@Brand     IS NULL OR u.BRAND      = @Brand)
        AND (@DealerNm  IS NULL OR d.dealer_nm  = @DealerNm)
        AND (@GroupName IS NULL OR u.group_name = @GroupName)
        AND (@DeptNm    IS NULL OR u.dept_nm    = @DeptNm)
        AND (@ActYn     IS NULL OR u.active_yn  = @ActYn)
        AND (@Name      IS NULL OR u.[name]     = @Name)
)
SELECT
    -- progress_working_day = DIVIDE(pass, total, 0)
    CASE WHEN SUM(CASE WHEN c.kr_holiday = N'0' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) = 0 THEN 0.0
         ELSE CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN c.[Date] <= @Today AND c.kr_holiday = N'0'
                            THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS float)
              / SUM(CASE WHEN c.kr_holiday = N'0' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)
    END AS progress_working_day
FROM [ktws].[DIM_CALENDAR_KTWS] AS c
WHERE c.[Year] = @Year AND c.[MonthNumber] = @MonthNumber
    AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM filter_ctx);   -- 슬라이서/페이지필터 컨텍스트 반영

        AND u.user_id NOT IN

        AND (@Brand     IS NULL OR u.BRAND      = @Brand)

        AND (@ActYn     IS NULL OR u.active_yn  = @ActYn)
        AND (@Name      IS NULL OR u.[name]     = @Name)
)
SELECT
    -- count_working_day_pass : 오늘 이전 & 영업일
    SUM(CASE WHEN c.[Date] <= @Today AND c.kr_holiday = N'0'
             THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS count_working_day_pass
FROM [ktws].[DIM_CALENDAR_KTWS] AS c
WHERE c.[Year] = @Year AND c.[MonthNumber] = @MonthNumber
    AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM filter_ctx);   -- 슬라이서/페이지필터 컨텍스트 반영

             THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS count_working_day_total

DECLARE @Year        INT           = 2026;
DECLARE @MonthNumber INT           = 1;
DECLARE @Brand       NVARCHAR(100) = NULL;
DECLARE @DealerNm    NVARCHAR(100) = NULL;
DECLARE @GroupName   NVARCHAR(100) = NULL;
DECLARE @DeptNm      NVARCHAR(100) = NULL;
DECLARE @ActYn       NVARCHAR(10)  = NULL;
DECLARE @Name        NVARCHAR(100) = NULL;
DECLARE @CommonTpNm  NVARCHAR(100) = NULL;   -- 슬라이서 DIM_CRM_ACT_TYPE_ORDER[common_tp_nm]

DECLARE @MonthStart DATE = DATEFROMPARTS(@Year, @MonthNumber, 1);
DECLARE @MonthEnd   DATE = EOMONTH(@MonthStart);

SELECT
    SUM(f.actual_cnt) AS N'활동수'
FROM [ktws].[FCT_ACTIVITY_v2]             AS f
    INNER JOIN [ktws].[DIM_CALENDAR_KTWS]      AS c    ON f.act_dt_fr     = c.[Date]
    INNER JOIN [ktws].[DIM_CRM_ACT_TYPE]       AS t    ON f.tp_key        = t.tp_key
    INNER JOIN [ktws].[DIM_CRM_ACT_TYPE_ORDER] AS aord ON t.common_tp_nm  = aord.common_tp_nm
    INNER JOIN [ktws].[DIM_MNG_USER]           AS u    ON f.sc_key        = u.sc_key
    INNER JOIN [ktws].[DIM_MNG_DEALER]         AS d    ON u.dealer_key    = d.dealer_key
WHERE t.tp_grp_1 IN (N'관계형성', N'기회창출')   -- 유형 필터
    AND c.[Year] = @Year AND c.[MonthNumber] = @MonthNumber
    AND d.dealer_nm IS NOT NULL AND LTRIM(RTRIM(d.dealer_nm)) <> N''
    -- 페이지 필터
    AND (u.facade_sc_yn <> N'창구SC' OR u.facade_sc_yn IS NULL)
    AND (u.[name] NOT IN (N'고객지원팀', N'TOYOTA YM') OR u.[name] IS NULL)
    AND u.user_id NOT IN
        ('DM5103','DM9999','JB30007','JB30016','KMKS176','KMKS999','JB30067')
    -- 슬라이서 (미선택 시 NULL → 전체)
    AND (@Brand      IS NULL OR u.BRAND          = @Brand)
    AND (@DealerNm   IS NULL OR d.dealer_nm       = @DealerNm)
    AND (@GroupName  IS NULL OR u.group_name      = @GroupName)
    AND (@DeptNm     IS NULL OR u.dept_nm         = @DeptNm)
    AND (@ActYn      IS NULL OR u.active_yn       = @ActYn)
    AND (@Name       IS NULL OR u.[name]          = @Name)
    AND (@CommonTpNm IS NULL OR aord.common_tp_nm = @CommonTpNm)

DECLARE @Year        INT           = 2026;
DECLARE @MonthNumber INT           = 1;
DECLARE @Brand       NVARCHAR(100) = NULL;   -- DIM_MNG_USER[BRAND]
DECLARE @DealerNm    NVARCHAR(100) = NULL;   -- DIM_MNG_DEALER[dealer_nm]
DECLARE @GroupName   NVARCHAR(100) = NULL;   -- DIM_MNG_USER[group_name]
DECLARE @DeptNm      NVARCHAR(100) = NULL;   -- DIM_MNG_USER[dept_nm]
DECLARE @ActYn       NVARCHAR(10)  = NULL;   -- DIM_MNG_USER[active_yn]
DECLARE @Name        NVARCHAR(100) = NULL;   -- DIM_MNG_USER[name]
DECLARE @CommonTpNm  NVARCHAR(100) = NULL;   -- DIM_CRM_ACT_TYPE_ORDER[common_tp_nm]

DECLARE @MonthStart DATE = DATEFROMPARTS(@Year, @MonthNumber, 1);
DECLARE @MonthEnd   DATE = EOMONTH(@MonthStart);

SELECT
    SUM(f.target_cnt) AS N'활동당월목표'
FROM [ktws].[FCT_CRM_TARGET_D]            AS f
    INNER JOIN [ktws].[DIM_CALENDAR_KTWS]      AS c    ON f.daily_dt      = c.[Date]
    INNER JOIN [ktws].[DIM_CRM_ACT_TYPE]       AS t    ON f.type_cd       = t.tp_key
    INNER JOIN [ktws].[DIM_CRM_ACT_TYPE_ORDER] AS aord ON t.common_tp_nm  = aord.common_tp_nm
    INNER JOIN [ktws].[DIM_MNG_USER]           AS u    ON f.sc_key        = u.sc_key
    INNER JOIN [ktws].[DIM_MNG_DEALER]         AS d    ON u.dealer_key    = d.dealer_key
WHERE aord.tp_grp_1 IN (N'관계형성', N'기회창출')       -- ORDER 테이블의 tp_grp_1
    AND c.[Year] = @Year AND c.[MonthNumber] = @MonthNumber
    AND d.dealer_nm IS NOT NULL AND LTRIM(RTRIM(d.dealer_nm)) <> N''
    -- 페이지 필터
    AND (u.facade_sc_yn <> N'창구SC' OR u.facade_sc_yn IS NULL)
    AND (u.[name] NOT IN (N'고객지원팀', N'TOYOTA YM') OR u.[name] IS NULL)
    AND u.user_id NOT IN
        ('DM5103','DM9999','JB30007','JB30016','KMKS176','KMKS999','JB30067')
    -- 슬라이서 (미선택 시 NULL → 전체)
    AND (@Brand      IS NULL OR u.BRAND          = @Brand)
    AND (@DealerNm   IS NULL OR d.dealer_nm       = @DealerNm)
    AND (@GroupName  IS NULL OR u.group_name      = @GroupName)
    AND (@DeptNm     IS NULL OR u.dept_nm         = @DeptNm)
    AND (@ActYn      IS NULL OR u.active_yn       = @ActYn)
    AND (@Name       IS NULL OR u.[name]          = @Name)
    AND (@CommonTpNm IS NULL OR aord.common_tp_nm = @CommonTpNm)

DECLARE @Year        INT           = 2026;
DECLARE @MonthNumber INT           = 1;
DECLARE @Brand       NVARCHAR(100) = NULL;   -- DIM_MNG_USER[BRAND]
DECLARE @DealerNm    NVARCHAR(100) = NULL;   -- DIM_MNG_DEALER[dealer_nm]
DECLARE @GroupName   NVARCHAR(100) = NULL;   -- DIM_MNG_USER[group_name]
DECLARE @DeptNm      NVARCHAR(100) = NULL;   -- DIM_MNG_USER[dept_nm]
DECLARE @ActYn       NVARCHAR(10)  = NULL;   -- DIM_MNG_USER[active_yn]
DECLARE @Name        NVARCHAR(100) = NULL;   -- DIM_MNG_USER[name]
DECLARE @CommonTpNm  NVARCHAR(100) = NULL;   -- DIM_CRM_ACT_TYPE_ORDER[common_tp_nm]

DECLARE @MonthStart DATE = DATEFROMPARTS(@Year, @MonthNumber, 1);
DECLARE @MonthEnd   DATE = EOMONTH(@MonthStart);

;WITH
-- 분자: 활동 실적 총합 (DIM_CRM_ACT_TYPE[tp_grp_1] 필터)
act_actual AS (
    SELECT SUM(f.actual_cnt) AS ac_cnt
    FROM [ktws].[FCT_ACTIVITY_v2]             AS f
        INNER JOIN [ktws].[DIM_CALENDAR_KTWS]      AS c    ON f.act_dt_fr     = c.[Date]
        INNER JOIN [ktws].[DIM_CRM_ACT_TYPE]       AS t    ON f.tp_key        = t.tp_key
        INNER JOIN [ktws].[DIM_CRM_ACT_TYPE_ORDER] AS aord ON t.common_tp_nm  = aord.common_tp_nm
        INNER JOIN [ktws].[DIM_MNG_USER]           AS u    ON f.sc_key        = u.sc_key
        INNER JOIN [ktws].[DIM_MNG_DEALER]         AS d    ON u.dealer_key    = d.dealer_key
    WHERE t.tp_grp_1 IN (N'관계형성', N'기회창출')
        AND c.[Year] = @Year AND c.[MonthNumber] = @MonthNumber
        AND d.dealer_nm IS NOT NULL AND LTRIM(RTRIM(d.dealer_nm)) <> N''
        AND (u.facade_sc_yn <> N'창구SC' OR u.facade_sc_yn IS NULL)
        AND (u.[name] NOT IN (N'고객지원팀', N'TOYOTA YM') OR u.[name] IS NULL)
        AND u.user_id NOT IN
            ('DM5103','DM9999','JB30007','JB30016','KMKS176','KMKS999','JB30067')
        AND (@Brand      IS NULL OR u.BRAND          = @Brand)
        AND (@DealerNm   IS NULL OR d.dealer_nm       = @DealerNm)
        AND (@GroupName  IS NULL OR u.group_name      = @GroupName)
        AND (@DeptNm     IS NULL OR u.dept_nm         = @DeptNm)
        AND (@ActYn      IS NULL OR u.active_yn       = @ActYn)
        AND (@Name       IS NULL OR u.[name]          = @Name)
        AND (@CommonTpNm IS NULL OR aord.common_tp_nm = @CommonTpNm)
),
-- 분모: 활동 목표 총합 (DIM_CRM_ACT_TYPE_ORDER[tp_grp_1] 필터)
act_target AS (
    SELECT SUM(f.target_cnt) AS tgt_cnt
    FROM [ktws].[FCT_CRM_TARGET_D]            AS f
        INNER JOIN [ktws].[DIM_CALENDAR_KTWS]      AS c    ON f.daily_dt      = c.[Date]
        INNER JOIN [ktws].[DIM_CRM_ACT_TYPE]       AS t    ON f.type_cd       = t.tp_key
        INNER JOIN [ktws].[DIM_CRM_ACT_TYPE_ORDER] AS aord ON t.common_tp_nm  = aord.common_tp_nm
        INNER JOIN [ktws].[DIM_MNG_USER]           AS u    ON f.sc_key        = u.sc_key
        INNER JOIN [ktws].[DIM_MNG_DEALER]         AS d    ON u.dealer_key    = d.dealer_key
    WHERE aord.tp_grp_1 IN (N'관계형성', N'기회창출')
        AND c.[Year] = @Year AND c.[MonthNumber] = @MonthNumber
        AND d.dealer_nm IS NOT NULL AND LTRIM(RTRIM(d.dealer_nm)) <> N''
        AND (u.facade_sc_yn <> N'창구SC' OR u.facade_sc_yn IS NULL)
        AND (u.[name] NOT IN (N'고객지원팀', N'TOYOTA YM') OR u.[name] IS NULL)
        AND u.user_id NOT IN
            ('DM5103','DM9999','JB30007','JB30016','KMKS176','KMKS999','JB30067')
        AND (@Brand      IS NULL OR u.BRAND          = @Brand)
        AND (@DealerNm   IS NULL OR d.dealer_nm       = @DealerNm)
        AND (@GroupName  IS NULL OR u.group_name      = @GroupName)
        AND (@DeptNm     IS NULL OR u.dept_nm         = @DeptNm)
        AND (@ActYn      IS NULL OR u.active_yn       = @ActYn)
        AND (@Name       IS NULL OR u.[name]          = @Name)
        AND (@CommonTpNm IS NULL OR aord.common_tp_nm = @CommonTpNm)
)
-- progress_act_mtd_preOp = DIVIDE(SUM실적, SUM목표, 1)
SELECT
    CASE WHEN ISNULL(at2.tgt_cnt, 0) = 0 THEN 1.0
         ELSE CAST(ISNULL(aa.ac_cnt, 0) AS float) / at2.tgt_cnt
    END AS N'활동진행률'
FROM act_actual AS aa
    CROSS JOIN act_target AS at2;

DECLARE @Year        INT           = 2026;
DECLARE @MonthNumber INT           = 1;
DECLARE @Brand       NVARCHAR(100) = NULL;   -- DIM_MNG_USER[BRAND]
DECLARE @DealerNm    NVARCHAR(100) = NULL;   -- DIM_MNG_DEALER[dealer_nm]
DECLARE @GroupName   NVARCHAR(100) = NULL;   -- DIM_MNG_USER[group_name]
DECLARE @DeptNm      NVARCHAR(100) = NULL;   -- DIM_MNG_USER[dept_nm]
DECLARE @ActYn       NVARCHAR(10)  = NULL;   -- DIM_MNG_USER[active_yn]
DECLARE @Name        NVARCHAR(100) = NULL;   -- DIM_MNG_USER[name]
DECLARE @CommonTpNm  NVARCHAR(100) = NULL;   -- DIM_CRM_ACT_TYPE_ORDER[common_tp_nm]

DECLARE @MonthStart DATE = DATEFROMPARTS(@Year, @MonthNumber, 1);
DECLARE @MonthEnd   DATE = EOMONTH(@MonthStart);

;WITH
-- 분자: 2. lead_funnel_(mtd)_preOp — 자격 리드 DISTINCT 카운트 (총합)
lead_actual AS (
    SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT l.lead_key) AS lead_cnt
    FROM [ktws].[FCT_LEAD]                     AS l
        INNER JOIN [ktws].[DIM_CALENDAR_KTWS]      AS lc   ON l.lead_reg_dt   = lc.[Date]
        INNER JOIN [ktws].[DIM_MNG_USER]           AS u    ON l.cl_sc_key     = u.sc_key
        INNER JOIN [ktws].[DIM_MNG_DEALER]         AS d    ON u.dealer_key    = d.dealer_key
        INNER JOIN [ktws].[DIM_CRM_ACT_TYPE]       AS lct  ON l.tp_key        = lct.tp_key
        INNER JOIN [ktws].[DIM_CRM_ACT_TYPE_ORDER] AS aord ON lct.common_tp_nm = aord.common_tp_nm
    WHERE lc.[Year] = @Year AND lc.[MonthNumber] = @MonthNumber   -- ★검증필요(MTD)
        AND ( l.close_dt > @MonthEnd
           OR l.close_dt IS NULL
           OR l.last_retail_sales_dt IS NOT NULL )
        AND d.dealer_nm IS NOT NULL AND LTRIM(RTRIM(d.dealer_nm)) <> N''
        AND (u.facade_sc_yn <> N'창구SC' OR u.facade_sc_yn IS NULL)
        AND (u.[name] NOT IN (N'고객지원팀', N'TOYOTA YM') OR u.[name] IS NULL)
        AND u.user_id NOT IN
            ('DM5103','DM9999','JB30007','JB30016','KMKS176','KMKS999','JB30067')
        AND (@Brand      IS NULL OR u.BRAND          = @Brand)
        AND (@DealerNm   IS NULL OR d.dealer_nm       = @DealerNm)
        AND (@GroupName  IS NULL OR u.group_name      = @GroupName)
        AND (@DeptNm     IS NULL OR u.dept_nm         = @DeptNm)
        AND (@ActYn      IS NULL OR u.active_yn       = @ActYn)
        AND (@Name       IS NULL OR u.[name]          = @Name)
        AND (@CommonTpNm IS NULL OR aord.common_tp_nm = @CommonTpNm)
        AND EXISTS (
            SELECT 1
            FROM [ktws].[FCT_ACTIVITY_v2]        AS a
                INNER JOIN [ktws].[DIM_CRM_ACT_TYPE] AS act ON a.tp_key = act.tp_key
            WHERE a.lead_key = l.lead_key
                AND a.sc_key  = l.cl_sc_key
                AND act.common_tp_nm = lct.common_tp_nm
                AND act.tp_grp_1 IN (N'관계형성', N'기회창출')
                AND ( a.act_result IS NULL OR a.act_result <> N'부재중' )
                AND a.act_dt_fr >= @MonthStart AND a.act_dt_fr <= @MonthEnd  -- ★검증필요(MTD)
        )
),
-- 분모: 1. act_mtd_(ac)_preOp — 활동 실적 합계 (총합), DIM_CRM_ACT_TYPE[tp_grp_1] 필터
act_actual AS (
    SELECT SUM(f.actual_cnt) AS ac_cnt
    FROM [ktws].[FCT_ACTIVITY_v2]             AS f
        INNER JOIN [ktws].[DIM_CALENDAR_KTWS]      AS c    ON f.act_dt_fr     = c.[Date]
        INNER JOIN [ktws].[DIM_CRM_ACT_TYPE]       AS t    ON f.tp_key        = t.tp_key
        INNER JOIN [ktws].[DIM_CRM_ACT_TYPE_ORDER] AS aord ON t.common_tp_nm  = aord.common_tp_nm
        INNER JOIN [ktws].[DIM_MNG_USER]           AS u    ON f.sc_key        = u.sc_key
        INNER JOIN [ktws].[DIM_MNG_DEALER]         AS d    ON u.dealer_key    = d.dealer_key
    WHERE t.tp_grp_1 IN (N'관계형성', N'기회창출')
        AND c.[Year] = @Year AND c.[MonthNumber] = @MonthNumber
        AND d.dealer_nm IS NOT NULL AND LTRIM(RTRIM(d.dealer_nm)) <> N''
        AND (u.facade_sc_yn <> N'창구SC' OR u.facade_sc_yn IS NULL)
        AND (u.[name] NOT IN (N'고객지원팀', N'TOYOTA YM') OR u.[name] IS NULL)
        AND u.user_id NOT IN
            ('DM5103','DM9999','JB30007','JB30016','KMKS176','KMKS999','JB30067')
        AND (@Brand      IS NULL OR u.BRAND          = @Brand)
        AND (@DealerNm   IS NULL OR d.dealer_nm       = @DealerNm)
        AND (@GroupName  IS NULL OR u.group_name      = @GroupName)
        AND (@DeptNm     IS NULL OR u.dept_nm         = @DeptNm)
        AND (@ActYn      IS NULL OR u.active_yn       = @ActYn)
        AND (@Name       IS NULL OR u.[name]          = @Name)
        AND (@CommonTpNm IS NULL OR aord.common_tp_nm = @CommonTpNm)
)
-- 8. cvr_lead/act_mtd = DIVIDE(분자, 분모, BLANK())
SELECT
    CASE WHEN ISNULL(aa.ac_cnt, 0) = 0 THEN NULL
         ELSE CAST(la.lead_cnt AS float) / aa.ac_cnt
    END AS N'활동기회전환'
FROM lead_actual AS la
    CROSS JOIN act_actual AS aa;

/* ===== 슬라이서 (미선택이면 NULL) ===== */
DECLARE @Year        int           = 2026;   -- DIM_CALENDAR_KTWS[Year]  (MTD 계산에 필수)
DECLARE @MonthNumber int           = 1;      -- DIM_CALENDAR_KTWS[MonthNumber] (필수)
DECLARE @BRAND       nvarchar(max) = NULL;   -- DIM_MNG_USER[BRAND]
DECLARE @dealer_nm   nvarchar(max) = NULL;   -- DIM_MNG_DEALER[dealer_nm]
DECLARE @group_name  nvarchar(max) = NULL;   -- DIM_MNG_USER[group_name]
DECLARE @dept_nm     nvarchar(max) = NULL;   -- DIM_MNG_USER[dept_nm]
DECLARE @active_yn   nvarchar(10)  = NULL;   -- DIM_MNG_USER[active_yn]
DECLARE @name        nvarchar(max) = NULL;   -- DIM_MNG_USER[name]

/* ===== 페이지 필터 (고정값을 변수화) ===== */
DECLARE @excl_facade   nvarchar(50)  = N'창구SC';                              -- facade_sc_yn 포함 제외
DECLARE @excl_name_1   nvarchar(50)  = N'고객지원팀';                          -- name 포함 제외
DECLARE @excl_name_2   nvarchar(50)  = N'TOYOTA YM';                           -- name 포함 제외
DECLARE @excl_user_ids nvarchar(max) = N'DM5103,DM9999,JB30007,JB30016,KMKS176,KMKS999,JB30067'; -- user_id 제외

/* ===== 기간 파생 (TOTALMTD) ===== */
DECLARE @month_start date = DATEFROMPARTS(@Year, @MonthNumber, 1);
DECLARE @as_of_date  date = EOMONTH(@month_start);   -- 월 전체 MTD = 말일까지 (당월이면 오늘로 교체)
DECLARE @month_end   date = EOMONTH(@as_of_date);    -- DAX EOMONTH(MAX(Date),0)

WITH
/* 페이지필터 + 슬라이서 통과한 SC */
valid_user AS (
    SELECT u.sc_key
    FROM ktws.DIM_MNG_USER u
    LEFT JOIN ktws.DIM_MNG_DEALER d ON d.dealer_key = u.dealer_key
    WHERE ISNULL(u.facade_sc_yn,'') <> @excl_facade
      AND u.[name]  NOT LIKE '%' + @excl_name_1 + '%'
      AND u.[name]  NOT LIKE '%' + @excl_name_2 + '%'
      AND u.user_id NOT IN (SELECT value FROM STRING_SPLIT(@excl_user_ids, ','))
      AND (@BRAND      IS NULL OR u.BRAND      IN (SELECT value FROM STRING_SPLIT(@BRAND, ',')))
      AND (@group_name IS NULL OR u.group_name IN (SELECT value FROM STRING_SPLIT(@group_name, ',')))
      AND (@dept_nm    IS NULL OR u.dept_nm    IN (SELECT value FROM STRING_SPLIT(@dept_nm, ',')))
      AND (@name       IS NULL OR u.[name]     IN (SELECT value FROM STRING_SPLIT(@name, ',')))
      AND (@active_yn  IS NULL OR u.active_yn  = @active_yn)
      AND (@dealer_nm  IS NULL OR d.dealer_nm  IN (SELECT value FROM STRING_SPLIT(@dealer_nm, ',')))
),
/* MTD 기간에 '관계형성/기회창출' & 부재중 아닌 활동이 있었던 lead */
lead_with_activity AS (
    SELECT DISTINCT a.lead_key
    FROM ktws.FCT_ACTIVITY_v2 a
    JOIN ktws.DIM_CRM_ACT_TYPE t ON t.tp_key = a.tp_key
    JOIN valid_user vu           ON vu.sc_key = a.sc_key
    WHERE t.tp_grp_1 IN (N'관계형성', N'기회창출')
      AND ISNULL(a.act_result,'') <> N'부재중'
      AND a.act_dt_fr >= @month_start
      AND a.act_dt_fr <= @as_of_date
)
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT l.lead_key) AS [lead_funnel_mtd_preOp]
FROM ktws.FCT_LEAD l
JOIN valid_user vu ON vu.sc_key = l.cl_sc_key
WHERE l.lead_reg_dt >= @month_start
  AND l.lead_reg_dt <= @as_of_date
  AND l.lead_key IN (SELECT lead_key FROM lead_with_activity)
  AND ( l.close_dt > @month_end
        OR l.close_dt IS NULL
        OR l.last_retail_sales_dt IS NOT NULL );

/* ===== 슬라이서 (미선택이면 NULL) ===== */
DECLARE @Year        int           = NULL;   -- DIM_CALENDAR_KTWS[Year]  (MTD 계산에 필수)
DECLARE @MonthNumber int           = NULL;      -- DIM_CALENDAR_KTWS[MonthNumber] (필수)
DECLARE @BRAND       nvarchar(max) = NULL;   -- DIM_MNG_USER[BRAND]
DECLARE @dealer_nm   nvarchar(max) = NULL;   -- DIM_MNG_DEALER[dealer_nm]
DECLARE @group_name  nvarchar(max) = NULL;   -- DIM_MNG_USER[group_name]
DECLARE @dept_nm     nvarchar(max) = NULL;   -- DIM_MNG_USER[dept_nm]
DECLARE @active_yn   nvarchar(10)  = NULL;   -- DIM_MNG_USER[active_yn]
DECLARE @name        nvarchar(max) = NULL;   -- DIM_MNG_USER[name]

/* ===== 페이지 필터 (고정값을 변수화) ===== */
DECLARE @excl_facade   nvarchar(50)  = N'창구SC';                              -- facade_sc_yn 포함 제외
DECLARE @excl_name_1   nvarchar(50)  = N'고객지원팀';                          -- name 포함 제외
DECLARE @excl_name_2   nvarchar(50)  = N'TOYOTA YM';                           -- name 포함 제외
DECLARE @excl_user_ids nvarchar(max) = N'DM5103,DM9999,JB30007,JB30016,KMKS176,KMKS999,JB30067'; -- user_id 제외

/* ===== 기간 파생 (TOTALMTD) ===== */
DECLARE @month_start date = DATEFROMPARTS(@Year, @MonthNumber, 1);
DECLARE @as_of_date  date = EOMONTH(@month_start);   -- 월 전체 MTD = 말일까지 (당월이면 오늘로 교체)
DECLARE @refdate     date = EOMONTH(@as_of_date);    -- DAX EOMONTH(MAX(Date),0)

WITH
/* 페이지필터 + 슬라이서 통과한 SC */
valid_user AS (
    SELECT u.sc_key
    FROM ktws.DIM_MNG_USER u
    LEFT JOIN ktws.DIM_MNG_DEALER d ON d.dealer_key = u.dealer_key
    WHERE ISNULL(u.facade_sc_yn,'') <> @excl_facade
      AND u.[name]  NOT LIKE '%' + @excl_name_1 + '%'
      AND u.[name]  NOT LIKE '%' + @excl_name_2 + '%'
      AND u.user_id NOT IN (SELECT value FROM STRING_SPLIT(@excl_user_ids, ','))
      AND (@BRAND      IS NULL OR u.BRAND      IN (SELECT value FROM STRING_SPLIT(@BRAND, ',')))
      AND (@group_name IS NULL OR u.group_name IN (SELECT value FROM STRING_SPLIT(@group_name, ',')))
      AND (@dept_nm    IS NULL OR u.dept_nm    IN (SELECT value FROM STRING_SPLIT(@dept_nm, ',')))
      AND (@name       IS NULL OR u.[name]     IN (SELECT value FROM STRING_SPLIT(@name, ',')))
      AND (@active_yn IS NULL
           OR u.active_yn = @active_yn
           OR u.active_yn IS NULL
           OR u.active_yn = '')
      AND (@dealer_nm  IS NULL OR d.dealer_nm  IN (SELECT value FROM STRING_SPLIT(@dealer_nm, ',')))
)
SELECT COALESCE(SUM(l.cnt), 0) AS [lead_mtd_coalesce]
FROM ktws.FCT_LEAD l
JOIN valid_user vu ON vu.sc_key = l.cl_sc_key
WHERE l.lead_reg_dt >= @month_start
  AND l.lead_reg_dt <= @as_of_date
  AND ( l.close_dt > @refdate
        OR l.close_dt IS NULL
        OR l.last_retail_sales_dt IS NOT NULL )

/* ===== 슬라이서 (미선택이면 NULL) ===== */
DECLARE @Year        int           = NULL;   -- DIM_CALENDAR_KTWS[Year]  (MTD 계산에 필수)

DECLARE @BRAND       nvarchar(max) = NULL;   -- DIM_MNG_USER[BRAND]
DECLARE @dealer_nm   nvarchar(max) = NULL;   -- DIM_MNG_DEALER[dealer_nm]
DECLARE @group_name  nvarchar(max) = NULL;   -- DIM_MNG_USER[group_name]
DECLARE @dept_nm     nvarchar(max) = NULL;   -- DIM_MNG_USER[dept_nm]
DECLARE @active_yn   nvarchar(10)  = NULL;   -- DIM_MNG_USER[active_yn]

/* ===== 페이지 필터 (고정값을 변수화) ===== */

/* ===== 측정식 내부 필터 ===== */
DECLARE @tp_grp_list nvarchar(max) = N'관계형성,기회창출';   -- tp_grp_1 IN (...)

/* ===== 기간 파생 (TOTALMTD) ===== */
DECLARE @month_start date = DATEFROMPARTS(@Year, @MonthNumber, 1);
DECLARE @as_of_date  date = EOMONTH(@month_start);   -- 월 전체 MTD = 말일까지 (당월이면 오늘로 교체)

WITH
/* 페이지필터 + 슬라이서 통과한 SC */
valid_user AS (
    SELECT u.sc_key
    FROM ktws.DIM_MNG_USER u
    LEFT JOIN ktws.DIM_MNG_DEALER d ON d.dealer_key = u.dealer_key
    WHERE ISNULL(u.facade_sc_yn,'') <> @excl_facade
      AND u.[name]  NOT LIKE '%' + @excl_name_1 + '%'
      AND u.[name]  NOT LIKE '%' + @excl_name_2 + '%'
      AND u.user_id NOT IN (SELECT value FROM STRING_SPLIT(@excl_user_ids, ','))
      AND (@BRAND      IS NULL OR u.BRAND      IN (SELECT value FROM STRING_SPLIT(@BRAND, ',')))
      AND (@group_name IS NULL OR u.group_name IN (SELECT value FROM STRING_SPLIT(@group_name, ',')))
      AND (@dept_nm    IS NULL OR u.dept_nm    IN (SELECT value FROM STRING_SPLIT(@dept_nm, ',')))
      AND (@name       IS NULL OR u.[name]     IN (SELECT value FROM STRING_SPLIT(@name, ',')))
      AND (@active_yn IS NULL
           OR u.active_yn = @active_yn
           OR u.active_yn IS NULL
           OR u.active_yn = '')
      AND (@dealer_nm  IS NULL OR d.dealer_nm  IN (SELECT value FROM STRING_SPLIT(@dealer_nm, ',')))
),
/* tp_grp_1 필터를 통과하는 tp_key 집합 (ORDER → common_tp_nm → ACT_TYPE → tp_key) */
valid_tp AS (
    SELECT DISTINCT t.tp_key
    FROM ktws.DIM_CRM_ACT_TYPE t
    JOIN ktws.DIM_CRM_ACT_TYPE_ORDER o ON o.common_tp_nm = t.common_tp_nm
    WHERE o.tp_grp_1 IN (SELECT value FROM STRING_SPLIT(@tp_grp_list, ','))
)
SELECT COALESCE(SUM(f.target_cnt), 0) AS [lead_funnel_mtd_target_preOp]
FROM ktws.FCT_CRM_TARGET_M f
JOIN valid_user vu ON vu.sc_key = f.sc_key
JOIN valid_tp    vt ON vt.tp_key = f.tp_key
WHERE f.monthly_dt >= @month_start
  AND f.monthly_dt <= @as_of_date;

    WHERE o.tp_grp_1 IN (SELECT value FROM STRING_SPLIT(@tp_grp_list, ','))

/* MTD 기간에 '관계형성/기회창출' & 부재중 아닌 활동이 있었던 lead */
lead_with_activity AS (
    SELECT DISTINCT a.lead_key
    FROM ktws.FCT_ACTIVITY_v2 a
    JOIN ktws.DIM_CRM_ACT_TYPE t ON t.tp_key = a.tp_key

    WHERE t.tp_grp_1 IN (SELECT value FROM STRING_SPLIT(@tp_grp_list, ','))

      AND l.lead_reg_dt <= @as_of_date
      AND l.lead_key IN (SELECT lead_key FROM lead_with_activity)
      AND ( l.close_dt > @month_end
            OR l.close_dt IS NULL
            OR l.last_retail_sales_dt IS NOT NULL )
),
/* 분모: 2. lead_funnel_(mtd_target_preOp) */
denom AS (
    SELECT SUM(f.target_cnt) AS target_cnt
    FROM ktws.FCT_CRM_TARGET_M f
    JOIN valid_user vu ON vu.sc_key = f.sc_key
    JOIN valid_tp    vt ON vt.tp_key = f.tp_key
    WHERE f.monthly_dt >= @month_start
      AND f.monthly_dt <= @as_of_date
)
SELECT
    CASE
        WHEN ISNULL(d.target_cnt, 0) = 0 THEN 1        -- DIVIDE의 대체값 1
        ELSE CAST(n.lead_cnt AS float) / d.target_cnt
    END AS [progress_lead_mtd_sc]
FROM numer n
CROSS JOIN denom d;

/* ===== 슬라이서 (미선택이면 NULL) ===== */
DECLARE @Year        int           = NULL;   -- DIM_CALENDAR_KTWS[Year]  (MTD 계산에 필수)
DECLARE @MonthNumber int           = NULL;      -- DIM_CALENDAR_KTWS[MonthNumber] (필수)
DECLARE @BRAND       nvarchar(max) = NULL;   -- DIM_MNG_USER[BRAND]
DECLARE @dealer_nm   nvarchar(max) = NULL;   -- DIM_MNG_DEALER[dealer_nm]
DECLARE @group_name  nvarchar(max) = NULL;   -- DIM_MNG_USER[group_name]
DECLARE @dept_nm     nvarchar(max) = NULL;   -- DIM_MNG_USER[dept_nm]
DECLARE @active_yn   nvarchar(10)  = NULL;   -- DIM_MNG_USER[active_yn]
DECLARE @name        nvarchar(max) = NULL;   -- DIM_MNG_USER[name]

/* ===== 페이지 필터 ===== */
DECLARE @excl_facade   nvarchar(50)  = N'창구SC';
DECLARE @excl_name_1   nvarchar(50)  = N'고객지원팀';
DECLARE @excl_name_2   nvarchar(50)  = N'TOYOTA YM';
DECLARE @excl_user_ids nvarchar(max) = N'DM5103,DM9999,JB30007,JB30016,KMKS176,KMKS999,JB30067';

/* ===== 측정식 내부 필터 ===== */
DECLARE @tp_grp_list nvarchar(max) = N'관계형성,기회창출';

/* ===== 기간 파생 (TOTALMTD) ===== */
DECLARE @month_start date = DATEFROMPARTS(@Year, @MonthNumber, 1);
DECLARE @as_of_date  date = EOMONTH(@month_start);   -- 당월이면 오늘로 교체
DECLARE @ref_date    date = EOMONTH(@as_of_date);    -- DAX EOMONTH(MAX(Date),0)

WITH
/* 페이지필터 + 슬라이서 통과한 SC */
valid_user AS (
    SELECT u.sc_key
    FROM ktws.DIM_MNG_USER u
    LEFT JOIN ktws.DIM_MNG_DEALER d ON d.dealer_key = u.dealer_key
    WHERE ISNULL(u.facade_sc_yn,'') <> @excl_facade
      AND u.[name]  NOT LIKE '%' + @excl_name_1 + '%'
      AND u.[name]  NOT LIKE '%' + @excl_name_2 + '%'
      AND u.user_id NOT IN (SELECT value FROM STRING_SPLIT(@excl_user_ids, ','))
      AND (@BRAND      IS NULL OR u.BRAND      IN (SELECT value FROM STRING_SPLIT(@BRAND, ',')))
      AND (@group_name IS NULL OR u.group_name IN (SELECT value FROM STRING_SPLIT(@group_name, ',')))
      AND (@dept_nm    IS NULL OR u.dept_nm    IN (SELECT value FROM STRING_SPLIT(@dept_nm, ',')))
      AND (@name       IS NULL OR u.[name]     IN (SELECT value FROM STRING_SPLIT(@name, ',')))
      AND (@active_yn IS NULL
           OR u.active_yn = @active_yn
           OR u.active_yn IS NULL
           OR u.active_yn = '')
      AND (@dealer_nm  IS NULL OR d.dealer_nm  IN (SELECT value FROM STRING_SPLIT(@dealer_nm, ',')))
),
/* act_grp: 관계형성/기회창출 활동, 부재중X, MSG X, lead_key 존재 */
act_grp AS (
    SELECT DISTINCT a.lead_key
    FROM ktws.FCT_ACTIVITY_v2 a
    JOIN ktws.DIM_CRM_ACT_TYPE t ON t.tp_key = a.tp_key
    JOIN valid_user vu           ON vu.sc_key = a.sc_key
    WHERE t.tp_grp_1 IN (SELECT value FROM STRING_SPLIT(@tp_grp_list, ','))
      AND ISNULL(a.act_result,'') <> N'부재중'
      AND ISNULL(a.contact_tp,'') <> N'MSG'
      AND a.lead_key IS NOT NULL
      AND a.act_dt_fr >= @month_start
      AND a.act_dt_fr <= @as_of_date
),
/* lead_grp: close_dt 조건 만족 & act_grp에 속하는 리드 */
lead_grp AS (
    SELECT DISTINCT l.lead_key
    FROM ktws.FCT_LEAD l
    JOIN valid_user vu ON vu.sc_key = l.cl_sc_key
    WHERE l.lead_key IN (SELECT lead_key FROM act_grp)
      AND ( l.close_dt > @ref_date
            OR l.close_dt IS NULL
            OR l.last_retail_sales_dt IS NOT NULL )
),
/* 분자: 시승완료(P113) 활동 중 lead_grp에 속하는 lead distinct */
numer AS (
    SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT a.lead_key) AS td_cnt
    FROM ktws.FCT_ACTIVITY_v2 a
    JOIN valid_user vu ON vu.sc_key = a.sc_key
    WHERE a.act_tp = 'P113'
      AND a.act_result = N'시승완료'
      AND a.lead_key IN (SELECT lead_key FROM lead_grp)
      AND a.act_dt_fr >= @month_start
      AND a.act_dt_fr <= @as_of_date
),
/* 분모: 2. lead_funnel_(mtd)_preOp */
denom AS (
    SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT l.lead_key) AS lead_cnt
    FROM ktws.FCT_LEAD l
    JOIN valid_user vu ON vu.sc_key = l.cl_sc_key
    WHERE l.lead_reg_dt >= @month_start
      AND l.lead_reg_dt <= @as_of_date
      AND l.lead_key IN (
            SELECT DISTINCT a.lead_key
            FROM ktws.FCT_ACTIVITY_v2 a
            JOIN ktws.DIM_CRM_ACT_TYPE t ON t.tp_key = a.tp_key
            JOIN valid_user vu2          ON vu2.sc_key = a.sc_key
            WHERE t.tp_grp_1 IN (SELECT value FROM STRING_SPLIT(@tp_grp_list, ','))
              AND ISNULL(a.act_result,'') <> N'부재중'
              AND a.act_dt_fr >= @month_start
              AND a.act_dt_fr <= @as_of_date
        )
      AND ( l.close_dt > @ref_date
            OR l.close_dt IS NULL
            OR l.last_retail_sales_dt IS NOT NULL )
)
SELECT
    CASE
        WHEN ISNULL(d.lead_cnt, 0) = 0 THEN 0        -- DIVIDE의 대체값 0
        ELSE CAST(n.td_cnt AS float) / d.lead_cnt
    END AS [cvr_td_lead_mtd]
FROM numer n
CROSS JOIN denom d;

/* ===== 파라미터 (슬라이서/페이지 컨텍스트) ===== */
DECLARE @Year        int = 2026;
DECLARE @MonthNumber int = 1;
-- 사용자 슬라이서: NULL = 선택 없음(전체)
DECLARE @Brand     nvarchar(100) = NULL;
DECLARE @DealerNm  nvarchar(200) = NULL;
DECLARE @GroupName nvarchar(200) = NULL;
DECLARE @DeptNm    nvarchar(200) = NULL;
DECLARE @ActiveYn  nvarchar(10)  = NULL;
DECLARE @Name      nvarchar(200) = NULL;

DECLARE @MonthStart date = DATEFROMPARTS(@Year, @MonthNumber, 1);
DECLARE @MonthEnd   date = EOMONTH(@MonthStart);   -- = DAX의 ref_date, MTD 상한

;WITH
/* ---- 페이지필터 + 사용자 슬라이서를 적용한 SC 목록 ---- */
flt_user AS (
    SELECT u.sc_key, u.dealer_key
    FROM ktws.DIM_MNG_USER u
    LEFT JOIN ktws.DIM_MNG_DEALER d ON u.dealer_key = d.dealer_key
    WHERE (u.facade_sc_yn NOT LIKE N'%창구SC%'   OR u.facade_sc_yn IS NULL)
      AND (u.[name]        NOT LIKE N'%고객지원팀%' OR u.[name] IS NULL)
      AND (u.[name]        NOT LIKE N'%TOYOTA YM%'  OR u.[name] IS NULL)
      AND u.user_id NOT IN ('DM5103','DM9999','JB30007','JB30016','KMKS176','KMKS999','JB30067')
      AND (@Brand     IS NULL OR u.BRAND      = @Brand)
      AND (@DealerNm  IS NULL OR d.dealer_nm  = @DealerNm)
      AND (@GroupName IS NULL OR u.group_name = @GroupName)
      AND (@DeptNm    IS NULL OR u.dept_nm    = @DeptNm)
      AND (@ActiveYn  IS NULL OR u.active_yn  = @ActiveYn)
      AND (@Name      IS NULL OR u.[name]     = @Name)
),

/* ---- DAX VAR act_grp ----
   관계형성/기회창출 활동을 한(부재중·MSG 제외) 리드들 ---- */
act_grp AS (
    SELECT DISTINCT a.lead_key
    FROM ktws.FCT_ACTIVITY_v2 a
    JOIN flt_user fu             ON a.sc_key = fu.sc_key
    JOIN ktws.DIM_CRM_ACT_TYPE t ON a.tp_key = t.tp_key
    WHERE a.act_dt_fr >= @MonthStart
      AND a.act_dt_fr <  DATEADD(DAY, 1, @MonthEnd)
      AND t.tp_grp_1 IN (N'관계형성', N'기회창출')
      AND (a.act_result <> N'부재중' OR a.act_result IS NULL)   -- DAX <> 는 blank 유지
      AND (a.contact_tp <> N'MSG'    OR a.contact_tp IS NULL)
      AND a.lead_key IS NOT NULL
),

/* ---- DAX VAR lead_grp ----
   월말 기준 아직 열려있거나(미마감) 판매로 이어진 리드 & act_grp 소속 ---- */
lead_grp AS (
    SELECT DISTINCT l.lead_key
    FROM ktws.FCT_LEAD l
    JOIN flt_user fu ON l.cl_sc_key = fu.sc_key
    WHERE (l.close_dt > @MonthEnd
           OR l.close_dt IS NULL
           OR l.last_retail_sales_dt IS NOT NULL)
      AND l.lead_key IN (SELECT lead_key FROM act_grp)
      -- ▼ 아래 한 줄이 '핵심 가정'입니다 (지난 답변 설명 참고)
      AND l.lead_reg_dt >= @MonthStart
      AND l.lead_reg_dt <  DATEADD(DAY, 1, @MonthEnd)
)

/* ---- DAX 최종 val : MTD 기간 P113/시승완료 한 리드 수 ---- */
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT a.lead_key) AS [td_funnel_mtd_preOp_leadMatch]
FROM ktws.FCT_ACTIVITY_v2 a
JOIN flt_user fu ON a.sc_key = fu.sc_key      -- 사용자 필터는 최종에도 유지됨
WHERE a.act_dt_fr >= @MonthStart
  AND a.act_dt_fr <  DATEADD(DAY, 1, @MonthEnd)   -- MTD
  AND a.act_tp     = N'P113'
  AND a.act_result = N'시승완료'
  AND a.lead_key IN (SELECT lead_key FROM lead_grp);

/* ===== 기간 ===== */
DECLARE @year INT = 2026;
DECLARE @month INT = 4;
DECLARE @day INT = NULL; -- NULL이면 월말 기준 MTD, 특정 일자면 해당 일자까지 MTD

DECLARE @month_start DATE = DATEFROMPARTS(@year, @month, 1);
DECLARE @as_of_date DATE = CASE WHEN @day IS NULL THEN EOMONTH(@month_start) ELSE DATEFROMPARTS(@year, @month, @day) END;
DECLARE @ref_date DATE = @as_of_date;

/* ===== 출력 필터: NULL 또는 ''이면 전체 활동유형 ===== */
DECLARE @common_tp_nm NVARCHAR(MAX) = NULL;

/* ===== 퍼널 페이지 고정 조건 ===== */
DECLARE @tp_grp_1 NVARCHAR(MAX) = N'관계형성,기회창출';
DECLARE @exclude_facade NVARCHAR(50) = N'창구SC';
DECLARE @exclude_name NVARCHAR(MAX) = N'고객지원팀,TOYOTA YM';
DECLARE @exclude_user_ids NVARCHAR(MAX) = N'DM5103,DM9999,JB30007,JB30016,KMKS176,KMKS999,JB30067';

/*
  브랜드/딜러/전시장/팀/SC 슬라이서 조건은 적용하지 않는다.
  퍼널 페이지의 고정 제외조건을 통과한 전체 SC만 사용한다.
*/
;WITH valid_user AS (
    SELECT DISTINCT U.sc_key
    FROM ktws.DIM_MNG_USER AS U
    WHERE ISNULL(U.facade_sc_yn, N'') COLLATE DATABASE_DEFAULT <> @exclude_facade COLLATE DATABASE_DEFAULT
      AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM STRING_SPLIT(@exclude_name, N',') AS X WHERE LTRIM(RTRIM(X.value)) COLLATE DATABASE_DEFAULT = U.name COLLATE DATABASE_DEFAULT)
      AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM STRING_SPLIT(@exclude_user_ids, N',') AS X WHERE LTRIM(RTRIM(X.value)) COLLATE DATABASE_DEFAULT = U.user_id COLLATE DATABASE_DEFAULT)
),
valid_common_type AS (
    SELECT T.tp_grp_1, T.common_tp_nm, MIN(O.tp_grp_1_order) AS grp_ord, MIN(O.tp_order) AS tp_ord
    FROM ktws.DIM_CRM_ACT_TYPE AS T
    LEFT JOIN ktws.DIM_CRM_ACT_TYPE_ORDER AS O ON T.common_tp_nm = O.common_tp_nm
    WHERE (NULLIF(LTRIM(RTRIM(@tp_grp_1)), N'') IS NULL OR EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM STRING_SPLIT(@tp_grp_1, N',') AS X WHERE LTRIM(RTRIM(X.value)) COLLATE DATABASE_DEFAULT = T.tp_grp_1 COLLATE DATABASE_DEFAULT))
      AND (NULLIF(LTRIM(RTRIM(@common_tp_nm)), N'') IS NULL OR EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM STRING_SPLIT(@common_tp_nm, N',') AS X WHERE LTRIM(RTRIM(X.value)) COLLATE DATABASE_DEFAULT = O.common_tp_nm COLLATE DATABASE_DEFAULT))
    GROUP BY T.tp_grp_1, T.common_tp_nm
),
valid_type AS (
    SELECT DISTINCT T.tp_key, T.tp_cd, T.tp_grp_1, T.common_tp_nm
    FROM ktws.DIM_CRM_ACT_TYPE AS T
    INNER JOIN valid_common_type AS VCT ON T.tp_grp_1 = VCT.tp_grp_1 AND T.common_tp_nm = VCT.common_tp_nm
),
frame_key AS (
    SELECT VU.sc_key, VCT.tp_grp_1, VCT.common_tp_nm
    FROM valid_user AS VU
    CROSS JOIN valid_common_type AS VCT
),

/* ===== 영업활동 ===== */
activity_actual AS (
    SELECT A.sc_key, VT.tp_grp_1, VT.common_tp_nm, SUM(ISNULL(A.actual_cnt, 0)) AS cnt
    FROM ktws.FCT_ACTIVITY_v2 AS A
    INNER JOIN valid_user AS VU ON A.sc_key = VU.sc_key
    INNER JOIN valid_type AS VT ON A.tp_key = VT.tp_key
    WHERE A.act_dt_fr >= @month_start AND A.act_dt_fr < DATEADD(DAY, 1, @as_of_date)
    GROUP BY A.sc_key, VT.tp_grp_1, VT.common_tp_nm
),
activity_target AS (
    SELECT TG.sc_key, VT.tp_grp_1, VT.common_tp_nm, SUM(ISNULL(TG.target_cnt, 0)) AS cnt
    FROM ktws.FCT_CRM_TARGET_D AS TG
    INNER JOIN valid_user AS VU ON TG.sc_key = VU.sc_key
    INNER JOIN valid_type AS VT ON TG.type_cd = VT.tp_key
    WHERE TG.daily_dt >= @month_start AND TG.daily_dt < DATEADD(DAY, 1, @as_of_date)
    GROUP BY TG.sc_key, VT.tp_grp_1, VT.common_tp_nm
),

/* ===== 영업기회 ===== */
lead_activity_seed AS (
    SELECT DISTINCT A.sc_key, VT.tp_grp_1, VT.common_tp_nm, A.lead_key
    FROM ktws.FCT_ACTIVITY_v2 AS A
    INNER JOIN valid_user AS VU ON A.sc_key = VU.sc_key
    INNER JOIN valid_type AS VT ON A.tp_key = VT.tp_key
    WHERE A.act_dt_fr >= @month_start AND A.act_dt_fr < DATEADD(DAY, 1, @as_of_date)
      AND A.act_result <> N'부재중'
      AND A.lead_key IS NOT NULL
),
lead_activity_pool AS (
    SELECT DISTINCT LAS.sc_key, LAS.tp_grp_1, LAS.common_tp_nm, G.lead_key
    FROM lead_activity_seed AS LAS
    INNER JOIN ktws.FCT_LEAD AS G ON LAS.lead_key = G.lead_key AND LAS.sc_key = G.cl_sc_key
    WHERE G.lead_reg_dt >= @month_start AND G.lead_reg_dt < DATEADD(DAY, 1, @as_of_date)
      AND (G.close_dt > @ref_date OR G.close_dt IS NULL OR G.last_retail_sales_dt IS NOT NULL)
),
lead_activity_count AS (
    SELECT G.cl_sc_key AS sc_key, ACT_TP.tp_grp_1, ACT_TP.common_tp_nm, COUNT(DISTINCT G.lead_key) AS cnt
    FROM ktws.FCT_LEAD AS G
    INNER JOIN valid_user AS VU ON G.cl_sc_key = VU.sc_key
    INNER JOIN (
        SELECT DISTINCT ACT.lead_key, ACT_B.tp_grp_1, ACT_B.common_tp_nm
        FROM ktws.FCT_ACTIVITY_v2 AS ACT
        INNER JOIN ktws.DIM_CRM_ACT_TYPE AS ACT_B ON ACT.tp_key = ACT_B.tp_key
        LEFT JOIN ktws.DIM_CRM_ACT_TYPE_ORDER AS ACT_F ON ACT_B.common_tp_nm = ACT_F.common_tp_nm
        WHERE ACT.act_dt_fr >= @month_start AND ACT.act_dt_fr < DATEADD(DAY, 1, @as_of_date)
          AND ACT.act_result <> N'부재중'
          AND ACT.lead_key IS NOT NULL
          AND (NULLIF(LTRIM(RTRIM(@tp_grp_1)), N'') IS NULL OR EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM STRING_SPLIT(@tp_grp_1, N',') AS X WHERE LTRIM(RTRIM(X.value)) COLLATE DATABASE_DEFAULT = ACT_B.tp_grp_1 COLLATE DATABASE_DEFAULT))
          AND (NULLIF(LTRIM(RTRIM(@common_tp_nm)), N'') IS NULL OR EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM STRING_SPLIT(@common_tp_nm, N',') AS X WHERE LTRIM(RTRIM(X.value)) COLLATE DATABASE_DEFAULT = ACT_F.common_tp_nm COLLATE DATABASE_DEFAULT))
    ) AS ACT_TP ON G.lead_key = ACT_TP.lead_key
    WHERE G.lead_reg_dt >= @month_start AND G.lead_reg_dt < DATEADD(DAY, 1, @as_of_date)
      AND (G.close_dt > @ref_date OR G.close_dt IS NULL OR G.last_retail_sales_dt IS NOT NULL)
    GROUP BY G.cl_sc_key, ACT_TP.tp_grp_1, ACT_TP.common_tp_nm
),
lead_total_count AS (
    SELECT G.cl_sc_key AS sc_key, B.tp_grp_1, F.common_tp_nm, SUM(NULLIF(G.cnt, 0)) AS cnt
    FROM ktws.FCT_LEAD AS G
    INNER JOIN valid_user AS VU ON G.cl_sc_key = VU.sc_key
    INNER JOIN ktws.DIM_CRM_ACT_TYPE AS B ON G.tp_key = B.tp_key
    INNER JOIN ktws.DIM_CRM_ACT_TYPE_ORDER AS F ON B.common_tp_nm = F.common_tp_nm
    WHERE G.lead_reg_dt >= @month_start AND G.lead_reg_dt < DATEADD(DAY, 1, @as_of_date)
      AND (NULLIF(LTRIM(RTRIM(@tp_grp_1)), N'') IS NULL OR EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM STRING_SPLIT(@tp_grp_1, N',') AS X WHERE LTRIM(RTRIM(X.value)) COLLATE DATABASE_DEFAULT = B.tp_grp_1 COLLATE DATABASE_DEFAULT))
      AND (NULLIF(LTRIM(RTRIM(@common_tp_nm)), N'') IS NULL OR EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM STRING_SPLIT(@common_tp_nm, N',') AS X WHERE LTRIM(RTRIM(X.value)) COLLATE DATABASE_DEFAULT = F.common_tp_nm COLLATE DATABASE_DEFAULT))
      AND (G.close_dt > @ref_date OR G.close_dt IS NULL OR G.last_retail_sales_dt IS NOT NULL)
    GROUP BY G.cl_sc_key, B.tp_grp_1, F.common_tp_nm
),
lead_target AS (
    SELECT TM.sc_key, VT.tp_grp_1, VT.common_tp_nm, SUM(ISNULL(TM.target_cnt, 0)) AS cnt
    FROM ktws.FCT_CRM_TARGET_M AS TM
    INNER JOIN valid_user AS VU ON TM.sc_key = VU.sc_key
    INNER JOIN valid_type AS VT ON TM.tp_key = VT.tp_key
    WHERE TM.monthly_dt >= @month_start AND TM.monthly_dt < DATEADD(DAY, 1, @as_of_date)
    GROUP BY TM.sc_key, VT.tp_grp_1, VT.common_tp_nm
),

/* ===== 계약 ===== */
contract_activity_count AS (
    SELECT I.cn_sc_key AS sc_key, LP.tp_grp_1, LP.common_tp_nm, SUM(ISNULL(I.cnt, 0)) AS cnt
    FROM ktws.FCT_CONTRACT_KTWS AS I
    INNER JOIN lead_activity_pool AS LP ON I.lead_key = LP.lead_key AND I.cn_sc_key = LP.sc_key
    WHERE I.contract_dt >= @month_start AND I.contract_dt < DATEADD(DAY, 1, @as_of_date)
    GROUP BY I.cn_sc_key, LP.tp_grp_1, LP.common_tp_nm
),
contract_total_count AS (
    SELECT I.cn_sc_key AS sc_key, SUM(ISNULL(I.cnt, 0)) AS cnt
    FROM ktws.FCT_CONTRACT_KTWS AS I
    INNER JOIN valid_user AS VU ON I.cn_sc_key = VU.sc_key
    WHERE I.contract_dt >= @month_start AND I.contract_dt < DATEADD(DAY, 1, @as_of_date)
    GROUP BY I.cn_sc_key
),
contract_target AS (
    SELECT TM.sc_key, SUM(ISNULL(TM.target_cnt, 0)) AS cnt
    FROM ktws.FCT_CRM_TARGET_M AS TM
    INNER JOIN valid_user AS VU ON TM.sc_key = VU.sc_key
    INNER JOIN ktws.DIM_CRM_ACT_TYPE AS T ON TM.tp_key = T.tp_key
    WHERE T.common_tp_nm = N'계약'
      AND TM.monthly_dt >= @month_start AND TM.monthly_dt < DATEADD(DAY, 1, @as_of_date)
    GROUP BY TM.sc_key
),
contract_progress_activity_seed AS (
    SELECT DISTINCT A.sc_key, VT.tp_grp_1, VT.common_tp_nm, A.lead_key
    FROM ktws.FCT_ACTIVITY_v2 AS A
    INNER JOIN valid_user AS VU ON A.sc_key = VU.sc_key
    INNER JOIN valid_type AS VT ON A.tp_key = VT.tp_key
    WHERE A.act_dt_fr >= @month_start AND A.act_dt_fr < DATEADD(DAY, 1, @as_of_date)
      AND (A.act_result <> N'부재중' OR A.act_result IS NULL)
      AND A.lead_key IS NOT NULL
),
contract_progress_lead_pool AS (
    SELECT DISTINCT A.sc_key, A.tp_grp_1, A.common_tp_nm, G.lead_key
    FROM contract_progress_activity_seed AS A
    INNER JOIN ktws.FCT_LEAD AS G ON A.lead_key = G.lead_key AND A.sc_key = G.cl_sc_key
    WHERE G.lead_reg_dt >= @month_start AND G.lead_reg_dt < DATEADD(DAY, 1, @as_of_date)
      AND (G.close_dt > EOMONTH(@as_of_date) OR G.close_dt IS NULL)
),
contract_progress_count AS (
    SELECT I.cn_sc_key AS sc_key, LP.tp_grp_1, LP.common_tp_nm, SUM(ISNULL(I.cnt, 0)) AS cnt
    FROM ktws.FCT_CONTRACT_KTWS AS I
    INNER JOIN contract_progress_lead_pool AS LP ON I.lead_key = LP.lead_key AND I.cn_sc_key = LP.sc_key
    WHERE I.contract_dt >= @month_start AND I.contract_dt < DATEADD(DAY, 1, @as_of_date)
    GROUP BY I.cn_sc_key, LP.tp_grp_1, LP.common_tp_nm
),

/* ===== 시승: 당월활동실적 기준 ===== */
td_activity_seed AS (
    SELECT DISTINCT A.sc_key, VT.tp_grp_1, VT.common_tp_nm, A.lead_key
    FROM ktws.FCT_ACTIVITY_v2 AS A
    INNER JOIN valid_user AS VU ON A.sc_key = VU.sc_key
    INNER JOIN valid_type AS VT ON A.tp_key = VT.tp_key
    WHERE A.act_dt_fr >= @month_start AND A.act_dt_fr < DATEADD(DAY, 1, @as_of_date)
      AND (A.act_result <> N'부재중' OR A.act_result IS NULL)
      AND (A.contact_tp <> N'MSG' OR A.contact_tp IS NULL)
      AND A.lead_key IS NOT NULL
),
td_lead_pool AS (
    SELECT DISTINCT TAS.sc_key, TAS.tp_grp_1, TAS.common_tp_nm, G.lead_key
    FROM td_activity_seed AS TAS
    INNER JOIN ktws.FCT_LEAD AS G ON TAS.lead_key = G.lead_key AND TAS.sc_key = G.cl_sc_key
    WHERE G.lead_reg_dt >= @month_start AND G.lead_reg_dt < DATEADD(DAY, 1, @as_of_date)
      AND (G.close_dt > @ref_date OR G.close_dt IS NULL OR G.last_retail_sales_dt IS NOT NULL)
),
td_completed_lead_match AS (
    SELECT A.sc_key, TLP.tp_grp_1, TLP.common_tp_nm, COUNT(DISTINCT A.lead_key) AS cnt
    FROM ktws.FCT_ACTIVITY_v2 AS A
    INNER JOIN td_lead_pool AS TLP ON A.lead_key = TLP.lead_key AND A.sc_key = TLP.sc_key
    WHERE A.act_dt_fr >= @month_start AND A.act_dt_fr < DATEADD(DAY, 1, @as_of_date)
      AND A.act_tp = N'P113'
      AND A.act_result = N'시승완료'
      AND A.lead_key IS NOT NULL
    GROUP BY A.sc_key, TLP.tp_grp_1, TLP.common_tp_nm
),
td_form_without_cancel AS (
    SELECT A.sc_key, TLP.tp_grp_1, TLP.common_tp_nm, SUM(ISNULL(A.actual_cnt, 0)) AS cnt
    FROM ktws.FCT_ACTIVITY_v2 AS A
    INNER JOIN td_lead_pool AS TLP ON A.lead_key = TLP.lead_key AND A.sc_key = TLP.sc_key
    WHERE A.act_dt_fr >= @month_start AND A.act_dt_fr < DATEADD(DAY, 1, @as_of_date)
      AND A.act_tp = N'P113'
      AND (A.act_result <> N'시승취소' OR A.act_result IS NULL)
      AND A.lead_key IS NOT NULL
    GROUP BY A.sc_key, TLP.tp_grp_1, TLP.common_tp_nm
),

/* ===== 시승: 당월전체실적 기준 ===== */
lead_set_all_calendar AS (
    SELECT DISTINCT G.cl_sc_key AS sc_key, VT.tp_grp_1, VT.common_tp_nm, G.lead_key
    FROM ktws.FCT_LEAD AS G
    INNER JOIN valid_user AS VU ON G.cl_sc_key = VU.sc_key
    INNER JOIN valid_type AS VT ON G.tp_key = VT.tp_key
    WHERE G.lead_key IS NOT NULL
),
td_total_lead_distinct AS (
    SELECT A.sc_key, LS.tp_grp_1, LS.common_tp_nm, COUNT(DISTINCT A.lead_key) AS cnt
    FROM ktws.FCT_ACTIVITY_v2 AS A
    INNER JOIN lead_set_all_calendar AS LS ON A.lead_key = LS.lead_key AND A.sc_key = LS.sc_key
    WHERE A.act_dt_fr >= @month_start AND A.act_dt_fr < DATEADD(DAY, 1, @as_of_date)
      AND A.act_tp = N'P113'
      AND A.act_result = N'시승완료'
      AND A.lead_key IS NOT NULL
    GROUP BY A.sc_key, LS.tp_grp_1, LS.common_tp_nm
),
td_total_actual_sum AS (
    SELECT A.sc_key, LS.tp_grp_1, LS.common_tp_nm, SUM(ISNULL(A.actual_cnt, 0)) AS cnt
    FROM ktws.FCT_ACTIVITY_v2 AS A
    INNER JOIN lead_set_all_calendar AS LS ON A.lead_key = LS.lead_key AND A.sc_key = LS.sc_key
    WHERE A.act_dt_fr >= @month_start AND A.act_dt_fr < DATEADD(DAY, 1, @as_of_date)
      AND A.act_tp = N'P113'
      AND A.act_result = N'시승완료'
      AND A.lead_key IS NOT NULL
    GROUP BY A.sc_key, LS.tp_grp_1, LS.common_tp_nm
),
td_target AS (
    SELECT TD.sc_key, SUM(ISNULL(TD.target_cnt, 0)) AS cnt
    FROM ktws.FCT_CRM_TARGET_D AS TD
    INNER JOIN valid_user AS VU ON TD.sc_key = VU.sc_key
    INNER JOIN ktws.DIM_CRM_ACT_TYPE AS T ON TD.type_cd = T.tp_key
    WHERE T.tp_cd = N'P113'
      AND TD.daily_dt >= @month_start AND TD.daily_dt < DATEADD(DAY, 1, @as_of_date)
    GROUP BY TD.sc_key
),

/* ===== 시승 -> 계약 ===== */
contract_td_pool AS (
    SELECT DISTINCT LAS.sc_key, LAS.tp_grp_1, LAS.common_tp_nm, G.lead_key
    FROM lead_activity_seed AS LAS
    INNER JOIN ktws.FCT_LEAD AS G ON LAS.lead_key = G.lead_key AND LAS.sc_key = G.cl_sc_key
    WHERE G.lead_reg_dt >= @month_start AND G.lead_reg_dt < DATEADD(DAY, 1, @as_of_date)
      AND G.td_yn = N'Y'
      AND (G.close_dt > @ref_date OR G.close_dt IS NULL OR G.last_retail_sales_dt IS NOT NULL)
),
contract_td_activity_count AS (
    SELECT I.cn_sc_key AS sc_key, CTP.tp_grp_1, CTP.common_tp_nm, SUM(ISNULL(I.cnt, 0)) AS cnt
    FROM ktws.FCT_CONTRACT_KTWS AS I
    INNER JOIN contract_td_pool AS CTP ON I.lead_key = CTP.lead_key AND I.cn_sc_key = CTP.sc_key
    WHERE I.contract_dt >= @month_start AND I.contract_dt < DATEADD(DAY, 1, @as_of_date)
    GROUP BY I.cn_sc_key, CTP.tp_grp_1, CTP.common_tp_nm
),
td_completed_total_leads AS (
    SELECT DISTINCT A.sc_key, LS.tp_grp_1, LS.common_tp_nm, A.lead_key
    FROM ktws.FCT_ACTIVITY_v2 AS A
    INNER JOIN lead_set_all_calendar AS LS ON A.lead_key = LS.lead_key AND A.sc_key = LS.sc_key
    WHERE A.act_dt_fr >= @month_start AND A.act_dt_fr < DATEADD(DAY, 1, @as_of_date)
      AND A.act_tp = N'P113'
      AND A.act_result = N'시승완료'
      AND A.lead_key IS NOT NULL
),
contract_td_total_count AS (
    SELECT I.cn_sc_key AS sc_key, TL.tp_grp_1, TL.common_tp_nm, SUM(ISNULL(I.cnt, 0)) AS cnt
    FROM ktws.FCT_CONTRACT_KTWS AS I
    INNER JOIN td_completed_total_leads AS TL ON I.lead_key = TL.lead_key AND I.cn_sc_key = TL.sc_key
    WHERE I.contract_dt >= @month_start AND I.contract_dt < DATEADD(DAY, 1, @as_of_date)
    GROUP BY I.cn_sc_key, TL.tp_grp_1, TL.common_tp_nm
),


type_result_raw AS (
SELECT FK.tp_grp_1 AS [활동유형분류],
       FK.common_tp_nm AS [활동유형],
       SUM(CAST(COALESCE(AA.cnt, 0) AS BIGINT)) AS [영업활동 건 수],
       SUM(CAST(COALESCE(AT.cnt, 0) AS BIGINT)) AS [영업활동 당월 목표],
       SUM(CAST(COALESCE(LAC.cnt, 0) AS BIGINT)) AS [영업기회 건 수(당월활동실적)],
       SUM(CAST(COALESCE(LTC.cnt, 0) AS BIGINT)) AS [영업기회 건 수(당월전체실적)],
       SUM(CAST(COALESCE(LT.cnt, 0) AS BIGINT)) AS [영업기회 당월 목표],
       SUM(CAST(COALESCE(CAC.cnt, 0) AS BIGINT)) AS [계약건수(당월활동실적)],
       SUM(CAST(COALESCE(CTC.cnt, 0) AS BIGINT)) AS [계약건수(당월전체실적)],
       SUM(CAST(COALESCE(CT.cnt, 0) AS BIGINT)) AS [계약 당월 목표],
       SUM(CAST(COALESCE(CPC.cnt, 0) AS BIGINT)) AS [계약 진행 실적],
       SUM(CAST(COALESCE(TDCLM.cnt, 0) AS BIGINT)) AS [시승건수(당월활동실적/시승완료)],
       SUM(CAST(COALESCE(TDFC.cnt, 0) AS BIGINT)) AS [시승건수(당월활동실적/시승취소건 제외)],
       SUM(CAST(COALESCE(TDTLD.cnt, 0) AS BIGINT)) AS [시승건수(당월전체실적/lead_key 기준)],
       SUM(CAST(COALESCE(TDTAS.cnt, 0) AS BIGINT)) AS [시승건수(당월전체실적/actual_cnt 기준)],
       SUM(CAST(COALESCE(TDT.cnt, 0) AS BIGINT)) AS [시승 당월 목표],
       SUM(CAST(COALESCE(CTDAC.cnt, 0) AS BIGINT)) AS [시승에서 계약으로 당월활동실적],
       SUM(CAST(COALESCE(CTDTC.cnt, 0) AS BIGINT)) AS [시승에서 계약으로 당월전체실적],
       MIN(CAST(SORT.grp_ord AS INT)) AS _grp_ord,
       MIN(CAST(SORT.tp_ord AS INT)) AS _tp_ord
FROM frame_key AS FK
LEFT JOIN activity_actual AS AA ON FK.sc_key = AA.sc_key AND FK.tp_grp_1 = AA.tp_grp_1 AND FK.common_tp_nm = AA.common_tp_nm
LEFT JOIN activity_target AS AT ON FK.sc_key = AT.sc_key AND FK.tp_grp_1 = AT.tp_grp_1 AND FK.common_tp_nm = AT.common_tp_nm
LEFT JOIN lead_activity_count AS LAC ON FK.sc_key = LAC.sc_key AND FK.tp_grp_1 = LAC.tp_grp_1 AND FK.common_tp_nm = LAC.common_tp_nm
LEFT JOIN lead_total_count AS LTC ON FK.sc_key = LTC.sc_key AND FK.tp_grp_1 = LTC.tp_grp_1 AND FK.common_tp_nm = LTC.common_tp_nm
LEFT JOIN lead_target AS LT ON FK.sc_key = LT.sc_key AND FK.tp_grp_1 = LT.tp_grp_1 AND FK.common_tp_nm = LT.common_tp_nm
LEFT JOIN contract_activity_count AS CAC ON FK.sc_key = CAC.sc_key AND FK.tp_grp_1 = CAC.tp_grp_1 AND FK.common_tp_nm = CAC.common_tp_nm
LEFT JOIN contract_total_count AS CTC ON FK.sc_key = CTC.sc_key
LEFT JOIN contract_target AS CT ON FK.sc_key = CT.sc_key
LEFT JOIN contract_progress_count AS CPC ON FK.sc_key = CPC.sc_key AND FK.tp_grp_1 = CPC.tp_grp_1 AND FK.common_tp_nm = CPC.common_tp_nm
LEFT JOIN td_completed_lead_match AS TDCLM ON FK.sc_key = TDCLM.sc_key AND FK.tp_grp_1 = TDCLM.tp_grp_1 AND FK.common_tp_nm = TDCLM.common_tp_nm
LEFT JOIN td_form_without_cancel AS TDFC ON FK.sc_key = TDFC.sc_key AND FK.tp_grp_1 = TDFC.tp_grp_1 AND FK.common_tp_nm = TDFC.common_tp_nm
LEFT JOIN td_total_lead_distinct AS TDTLD ON FK.sc_key = TDTLD.sc_key AND FK.tp_grp_1 = TDTLD.tp_grp_1 AND FK.common_tp_nm = TDTLD.common_tp_nm
LEFT JOIN td_total_actual_sum AS TDTAS ON FK.sc_key = TDTAS.sc_key AND FK.tp_grp_1 = TDTAS.tp_grp_1 AND FK.common_tp_nm = TDTAS.common_tp_nm
LEFT JOIN td_target AS TDT ON FK.sc_key = TDT.sc_key
LEFT JOIN contract_td_activity_count AS CTDAC ON FK.sc_key = CTDAC.sc_key AND FK.tp_grp_1 = CTDAC.tp_grp_1 AND FK.common_tp_nm = CTDAC.common_tp_nm
LEFT JOIN contract_td_total_count AS CTDTC ON FK.sc_key = CTDTC.sc_key AND FK.tp_grp_1 = CTDTC.tp_grp_1 AND FK.common_tp_nm = CTDTC.common_tp_nm
LEFT JOIN valid_common_type AS SORT ON FK.tp_grp_1 = SORT.tp_grp_1 AND FK.common_tp_nm = SORT.common_tp_nm
GROUP BY FK.tp_grp_1, FK.common_tp_nm
),
type_group_total_raw AS (
SELECT [활동유형분류],
       N'전체' AS [활동유형],
       SUM([영업활동 건 수]) AS [영업활동 건 수],
       SUM([영업활동 당월 목표]) AS [영업활동 당월 목표],
       SUM([영업기회 건 수(당월활동실적)]) AS [영업기회 건 수(당월활동실적)],
       SUM([영업기회 건 수(당월전체실적)]) AS [영업기회 건 수(당월전체실적)],
       SUM([영업기회 당월 목표]) AS [영업기회 당월 목표],
       SUM([계약건수(당월활동실적)]) AS [계약건수(당월활동실적)],
       MAX([계약건수(당월전체실적)]) AS [계약건수(당월전체실적)],
       MAX([계약 당월 목표]) AS [계약 당월 목표],
       SUM([계약 진행 실적]) AS [계약 진행 실적],
       SUM([시승건수(당월활동실적/시승완료)]) AS [시승건수(당월활동실적/시승완료)],
       SUM([시승건수(당월활동실적/시승취소건 제외)]) AS [시승건수(당월활동실적/시승취소건 제외)],
       SUM([시승건수(당월전체실적/lead_key 기준)]) AS [시승건수(당월전체실적/lead_key 기준)],
       SUM([시승건수(당월전체실적/actual_cnt 기준)]) AS [시승건수(당월전체실적/actual_cnt 기준)],
       MAX([시승 당월 목표]) AS [시승 당월 목표],
       SUM([시승에서 계약으로 당월활동실적]) AS [시승에서 계약으로 당월활동실적],
       SUM([시승에서 계약으로 당월전체실적]) AS [시승에서 계약으로 당월전체실적],
       MIN(_grp_ord) AS _grp_ord,
       CAST(NULL AS INT) AS _tp_ord
FROM type_result_raw
GROUP BY [활동유형분류]
),
final_raw AS (
    SELECT T.*, CAST(0 AS INT) AS _row_order
    FROM type_group_total_raw AS T

    UNION ALL

    SELECT T.*, CAST(1 AS INT) AS _row_order
    FROM type_result_raw AS T
)
SELECT [활동유형분류],
       [활동유형],
       [영업활동 건 수],
       [영업활동 당월 목표],
       FORMAT(CASE WHEN [영업활동 당월 목표] = 0 THEN CAST(0 AS DECIMAL(38, 10)) ELSE CAST([영업활동 건 수] AS DECIMAL(38, 10)) / CAST([영업활동 당월 목표] AS DECIMAL(38, 10)) END, '0.00%') AS [영업활동 진행률],
       FORMAT(CASE WHEN [영업활동 건 수] = 0 THEN CAST(0 AS DECIMAL(38, 10)) ELSE CAST([영업기회 건 수(당월활동실적)] AS DECIMAL(38, 10)) / CAST([영업활동 건 수] AS DECIMAL(38, 10)) END, '0.00%') AS [영업활동에서 영업기회로의 전환율],
       [영업기회 건 수(당월활동실적)],
       [영업기회 건 수(당월전체실적)],
       [영업기회 당월 목표],
       FORMAT(CASE WHEN [영업기회 당월 목표] = 0 THEN CAST(0 AS DECIMAL(38, 10)) ELSE CAST([영업기회 건 수(당월활동실적)] AS DECIMAL(38, 10)) / CAST([영업기회 당월 목표] AS DECIMAL(38, 10)) END, '0.00%') AS [영업기회 진행률],
       FORMAT(CASE WHEN [영업기회 건 수(당월활동실적)] = 0 THEN CAST(0 AS DECIMAL(38, 10)) ELSE CAST([계약건수(당월활동실적)] AS DECIMAL(38, 10)) / CAST([영업기회 건 수(당월활동실적)] AS DECIMAL(38, 10)) END, '0.00%') AS [영업기회에서 계약으로 전환율],
       [계약건수(당월활동실적)],
       [계약건수(당월전체실적)],
       [계약 당월 목표],
       FORMAT(CASE WHEN [계약 당월 목표] = 0 THEN CAST(0 AS DECIMAL(38, 10)) ELSE CAST([계약 진행 실적] AS DECIMAL(38, 10)) / CAST([계약 당월 목표] AS DECIMAL(38, 10)) END, '0.00%') AS [계약 진행률],
       FORMAT(CASE WHEN [영업기회 건 수(당월활동실적)] = 0 THEN CAST(0 AS DECIMAL(38, 10)) ELSE CAST([시승건수(당월활동실적/시승완료)] AS DECIMAL(38, 10)) / CAST([영업기회 건 수(당월활동실적)] AS DECIMAL(38, 10)) END, '0.00%') AS [영업기회에서 시승으로 전환율],
       [시승건수(당월활동실적/시승완료)],
       [시승건수(당월활동실적/시승취소건 제외)],
       [시승건수(당월전체실적/lead_key 기준)],
       [시승건수(당월전체실적/actual_cnt 기준)],
       [시승 당월 목표],
       FORMAT(CASE WHEN [시승 당월 목표] = 0 THEN CAST(0 AS DECIMAL(38, 10)) ELSE CAST([시승건수(당월전체실적/actual_cnt 기준)] AS DECIMAL(38, 10)) / CAST([시승 당월 목표] AS DECIMAL(38, 10)) END, '0.00%') AS [시승 진행률],
       FORMAT(CASE WHEN [시승건수(당월활동실적/시승완료)] = 0 THEN CAST(0 AS DECIMAL(38, 10)) ELSE CAST([시승에서 계약으로 당월활동실적] AS DECIMAL(38, 10)) / CAST([시승건수(당월활동실적/시승완료)] AS DECIMAL(38, 10)) END, '0.00%') AS [시승에서 계약으로 전환율],
       [시승에서 계약으로 당월활동실적],
       [시승에서 계약으로 당월전체실적]
FROM final_raw
ORDER BY _grp_ord, _row_order, _tp_ord, [활동유형분류], [활동유형];

/* ===== 연도 필터 ===== */
DECLARE @year INT = 2026;

/* ===== 퍼널 측정식 고정 조건 ===== */
DECLARE @tp_grp_1 NVARCHAR(MAX) = N'관계형성,기회창출';
DECLARE @exclude_facade NVARCHAR(50) = N'창구SC';
DECLARE @exclude_name NVARCHAR(MAX) = N'고객지원팀,TOYOTA YM';
DECLARE @exclude_user_ids NVARCHAR(MAX) = N'DM5103,DM9999,JB30007,JB30016,KMKS176,KMKS999,JB30067';

;WITH calendar_year AS (
    SELECT [Date], [MonthNumber], [MonthName]
    FROM ktws.DIM_CALENDAR_KTWS
    WHERE [Year] = @year
),
month_scope AS (
    SELECT [MonthNumber], [MonthName], MAX([Date]) AS month_end
    FROM calendar_year
    GROUP BY [MonthNumber], [MonthName]
),
valid_user AS (
    SELECT DISTINCT U.sc_key
    FROM ktws.DIM_MNG_USER AS U
    WHERE ISNULL(U.facade_sc_yn, N'') COLLATE DATABASE_DEFAULT <> @exclude_facade COLLATE DATABASE_DEFAULT
      AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM STRING_SPLIT(@exclude_name, N',') AS X WHERE LTRIM(RTRIM(X.value)) COLLATE DATABASE_DEFAULT = U.name COLLATE DATABASE_DEFAULT)
      AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM STRING_SPLIT(@exclude_user_ids, N',') AS X WHERE LTRIM(RTRIM(X.value)) COLLATE DATABASE_DEFAULT = U.user_id COLLATE DATABASE_DEFAULT)
),
valid_type AS (
    SELECT DISTINCT T.tp_key
    FROM ktws.DIM_CRM_ACT_TYPE AS T
    WHERE EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM STRING_SPLIT(@tp_grp_1, N',') AS X WHERE LTRIM(RTRIM(X.value)) COLLATE DATABASE_DEFAULT = T.tp_grp_1 COLLATE DATABASE_DEFAULT)
),

/* 영업활동 건 수 */
activity_actual AS (
    SELECT C.[MonthNumber], SUM(ISNULL(A.actual_cnt, 0)) AS cnt
    FROM ktws.FCT_ACTIVITY_v2 AS A
    INNER JOIN calendar_year AS C ON A.act_dt_fr = C.[Date]
    INNER JOIN valid_user AS U ON A.sc_key = U.sc_key
    INNER JOIN valid_type AS T ON A.tp_key = T.tp_key
    GROUP BY C.[MonthNumber]
),

/* 영업기회 건 수(당월활동실적)의 월별 활동 lead 집합 */
activity_leads AS (
    SELECT DISTINCT C.[MonthNumber], A.lead_key
    FROM ktws.FCT_ACTIVITY_v2 AS A
    INNER JOIN calendar_year AS C ON A.act_dt_fr = C.[Date]
    INNER JOIN valid_type AS T ON A.tp_key = T.tp_key
    WHERE A.act_result <> N'부재중'
      AND A.lead_key IS NOT NULL
),
lead_pool AS (
    SELECT DISTINCT C.[MonthNumber], G.lead_key
    FROM ktws.FCT_LEAD AS G
    INNER JOIN calendar_year AS C ON G.lead_reg_dt = C.[Date]
    INNER JOIN month_scope AS M ON C.[MonthNumber] = M.[MonthNumber]
    INNER JOIN valid_user AS U ON G.cl_sc_key = U.sc_key
    INNER JOIN activity_leads AS A ON C.[MonthNumber] = A.[MonthNumber] AND G.lead_key = A.lead_key
    WHERE G.close_dt > M.month_end
       OR G.close_dt IS NULL
       OR G.last_retail_sales_dt IS NOT NULL
),
lead_activity_count AS (
    SELECT [MonthNumber], COUNT(DISTINCT lead_key) AS cnt
    FROM lead_pool
    GROUP BY [MonthNumber]
),

/* 계약건수(당월활동실적) */
contract_activity_count AS (
    SELECT C.[MonthNumber], SUM(ISNULL(I.cnt, 0)) AS cnt
    FROM ktws.FCT_CONTRACT_KTWS AS I
    INNER JOIN calendar_year AS C ON I.contract_dt = C.[Date]
    INNER JOIN valid_user AS U ON I.cn_sc_key = U.sc_key
    INNER JOIN lead_pool AS L ON C.[MonthNumber] = L.[MonthNumber] AND I.lead_key = L.lead_key
    GROUP BY C.[MonthNumber]
)
SELECT M.[MonthName],
       COALESCE(A.cnt, 0) AS [영업활동 건 수],
       COALESCE(L.cnt, 0) AS [영업기회 건 수(당월활동실적)],
       COALESCE(C.cnt, 0) AS [계약건수(당월활동실적)]
FROM month_scope AS M
LEFT JOIN activity_actual AS A ON M.[MonthNumber] = A.[MonthNumber]
LEFT JOIN lead_activity_count AS L ON M.[MonthNumber] = L.[MonthNumber]
LEFT JOIN contract_activity_count AS C ON M.[MonthNumber] = C.[MonthNumber]
ORDER BY M.[MonthNumber];

/* ===== 연도 필터 ===== */
DECLARE @year INT = 2026;

/* ===== 퍼널 측정식 고정 조건 ===== */
DECLARE @tp_grp_1 NVARCHAR(MAX) = N'관계형성,기회창출';
DECLARE @exclude_facade NVARCHAR(50) = N'창구SC';
DECLARE @exclude_name NVARCHAR(MAX) = N'고객지원팀,TOYOTA YM';
DECLARE @exclude_user_ids NVARCHAR(MAX) = N'DM5103,DM9999,JB30007,JB30016,KMKS176,KMKS999,JB30067';

;WITH calendar_period AS (
    SELECT [Date], [Year], [MonthNumber], [MonthName]
    FROM ktws.DIM_CALENDAR_KTWS
    WHERE [Year] = @year
       OR ([Year] = @year - 1 AND [MonthNumber] = 12)
),
month_scope AS (
    SELECT [Year], [MonthNumber], [MonthName], MAX([Date]) AS month_end
    FROM calendar_period
    GROUP BY [Year], [MonthNumber], [MonthName]
),
valid_user AS (
    SELECT DISTINCT U.sc_key
    FROM ktws.DIM_MNG_USER AS U
    WHERE ISNULL(U.facade_sc_yn, N'') COLLATE DATABASE_DEFAULT <> @exclude_facade COLLATE DATABASE_DEFAULT
      AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM STRING_SPLIT(@exclude_name, N',') AS X WHERE LTRIM(RTRIM(X.value)) COLLATE DATABASE_DEFAULT = U.name COLLATE DATABASE_DEFAULT)
      AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM STRING_SPLIT(@exclude_user_ids, N',') AS X WHERE LTRIM(RTRIM(X.value)) COLLATE DATABASE_DEFAULT = U.user_id COLLATE DATABASE_DEFAULT)
),
valid_type AS (
    SELECT DISTINCT T.tp_key
    FROM ktws.DIM_CRM_ACT_TYPE AS T
    WHERE EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM STRING_SPLIT(@tp_grp_1, N',') AS X WHERE LTRIM(RTRIM(X.value)) COLLATE DATABASE_DEFAULT = T.tp_grp_1 COLLATE DATABASE_DEFAULT)
),

/* 영업활동 건 수 */
activity_actual AS (
    SELECT C.[Year], C.[MonthNumber], SUM(ISNULL(A.actual_cnt, 0)) AS cnt
    FROM ktws.FCT_ACTIVITY_v2 AS A
    INNER JOIN calendar_period AS C ON A.act_dt_fr = C.[Date]
    INNER JOIN valid_user AS U ON A.sc_key = U.sc_key
    INNER JOIN valid_type AS T ON A.tp_key = T.tp_key
    GROUP BY C.[Year], C.[MonthNumber]
),

/* 영업기회 건 수(당월활동실적)의 월별 활동 lead 집합 */
activity_leads AS (
    SELECT DISTINCT C.[Year], C.[MonthNumber], A.lead_key
    FROM ktws.FCT_ACTIVITY_v2 AS A
    INNER JOIN calendar_period AS C ON A.act_dt_fr = C.[Date]
    INNER JOIN valid_type AS T ON A.tp_key = T.tp_key
    WHERE A.act_result <> N'부재중'
      AND A.lead_key IS NOT NULL
),
lead_pool AS (
    SELECT DISTINCT C.[Year], C.[MonthNumber], G.lead_key
    FROM ktws.FCT_LEAD AS G
    INNER JOIN calendar_period AS C ON G.lead_reg_dt = C.[Date]
    INNER JOIN month_scope AS M ON C.[Year] = M.[Year] AND C.[MonthNumber] = M.[MonthNumber]
    INNER JOIN valid_user AS U ON G.cl_sc_key = U.sc_key
    INNER JOIN activity_leads AS A ON C.[Year] = A.[Year] AND C.[MonthNumber] = A.[MonthNumber] AND G.lead_key = A.lead_key
    WHERE G.close_dt > M.month_end
       OR G.close_dt IS NULL
       OR G.last_retail_sales_dt IS NOT NULL
),
lead_activity_count AS (
    SELECT [Year], [MonthNumber], COUNT(DISTINCT lead_key) AS cnt
    FROM lead_pool
    GROUP BY [Year], [MonthNumber]
),

/* 계약건수(당월활동실적) */
contract_activity_count AS (
    SELECT C.[Year], C.[MonthNumber], SUM(ISNULL(I.cnt, 0)) AS cnt
    FROM ktws.FCT_CONTRACT_KTWS AS I
    INNER JOIN calendar_period AS C ON I.contract_dt = C.[Date]
    INNER JOIN valid_user AS U ON I.cn_sc_key = U.sc_key
    INNER JOIN lead_pool AS L ON C.[Year] = L.[Year] AND C.[MonthNumber] = L.[MonthNumber] AND I.lead_key = L.lead_key
    GROUP BY C.[Year], C.[MonthNumber]
),

monthly_result AS (
    SELECT M.[Year],
           M.[MonthNumber],
           M.[MonthName],
           CAST(COALESCE(A.cnt, 0) AS BIGINT) AS [영업활동 건 수],
           CAST(COALESCE(L.cnt, 0) AS BIGINT) AS [영업기회 건 수(당월활동실적)],
           CAST(COALESCE(C.cnt, 0) AS BIGINT) AS [계약건수(당월활동실적)]
    FROM month_scope AS M
    LEFT JOIN activity_actual AS A ON M.[Year] = A.[Year] AND M.[MonthNumber] = A.[MonthNumber]
    LEFT JOIN lead_activity_count AS L ON M.[Year] = L.[Year] AND M.[MonthNumber] = L.[MonthNumber]
    LEFT JOIN contract_activity_count AS C ON M.[Year] = C.[Year] AND M.[MonthNumber] = C.[MonthNumber]
),
monthly_with_previous AS (
    SELECT [Year],
           [MonthNumber],
           [MonthName],
           [영업활동 건 수],
           [영업기회 건 수(당월활동실적)],
           [계약건수(당월활동실적)],
           LAG([영업활동 건 수]) OVER (ORDER BY [Year], [MonthNumber]) AS prev_activity_cnt,
           LAG([영업기회 건 수(당월활동실적)]) OVER (ORDER BY [Year], [MonthNumber]) AS prev_lead_cnt,
           LAG([계약건수(당월활동실적)]) OVER (ORDER BY [Year], [MonthNumber]) AS prev_contract_cnt
    FROM monthly_result
)
SELECT [MonthName],
       [영업활동 건 수],
       CASE WHEN prev_activity_cnt IS NULL OR prev_activity_cnt = 0 THEN NULL
            ELSE FORMAT((CAST([영업활동 건 수] AS DECIMAL(38, 10)) - CAST(prev_activity_cnt AS DECIMAL(38, 10))) / CAST(prev_activity_cnt AS DECIMAL(38, 10)), '0.00%')
       END AS [영업활동 전월 대비 증감률],
       [영업기회 건 수(당월활동실적)],
       CASE WHEN prev_lead_cnt IS NULL OR prev_lead_cnt = 0 THEN NULL
            ELSE FORMAT((CAST([영업기회 건 수(당월활동실적)] AS DECIMAL(38, 10)) - CAST(prev_lead_cnt AS DECIMAL(38, 10))) / CAST(prev_lead_cnt AS DECIMAL(38, 10)), '0.00%')
       END AS [영업기회 전월 대비 증감률],
       [계약건수(당월활동실적)],
       CASE WHEN prev_contract_cnt IS NULL OR prev_contract_cnt = 0 THEN NULL
            ELSE FORMAT((CAST([계약건수(당월활동실적)] AS DECIMAL(38, 10)) - CAST(prev_contract_cnt AS DECIMAL(38, 10))) / CAST(prev_contract_cnt AS DECIMAL(38, 10)), '0.00%')
       END AS [계약 전월 대비 증감률]
FROM monthly_with_previous
WHERE [Year] = @year
ORDER BY [MonthNumber];

/* ============================================
   1. 슬라이서 변수 (NULL = 전체 선택, 다중 값은 콤마 구분, N'...' 사용)
      ※ @ScName: NULL → SC 열 미표시 / 'ALL' → 표시+전체 / 값 → 표시+해당 SC
   ============================================ */
DECLARE @Year        NVARCHAR(200) = NULL;  -- ktws DIM_CALENDAR_KTWS[Year]
DECLARE @Brand       NVARCHAR(200) = NULL;  -- ktws DIM_MNG_USER[BRAND]
