DECLARE @DealerNm    NVARCHAR(500) = NULL;  -- ktws DIM_MNG_DEALER[dealer_nm]
DECLARE @GroupName   NVARCHAR(500) = NULL;  -- ktws DIM_MNG_USER[group_name]
DECLARE @DeptNm      NVARCHAR(500) = NULL;  -- ktws DIM_MNG_USER[dept_nm]
DECLARE @ActiveYn    NVARCHAR(50)  = NULL;  -- ktws DIM_MNG_USER[active_yn]
DECLARE @ScName      NVARCHAR(500) = NULL;  -- ktws DIM_MNG_USER[name]  ※ NULL/'ALL'/값
DECLARE @ModelNm     NVARCHAR(500) = NULL;  -- ktws DIM_VEHIC_SPEC_MDL[model_nm]
DECLARE @VariantNm   NVARCHAR(500) = NULL;  -- ktws DIM_VEHIC_SPEC_VAR[variant_nm]
DECLARE @MyCd        NVARCHAR(200) = NULL;  -- ktws DIM_VEHIC_SPEC[my_cd]
DECLARE @SfxCd       NVARCHAR(200) = NULL;  -- ktws DIM_VEHIC_SPEC[sfx_cd]

/* ============================================
   2. 페이지 필터 변수
   ============================================ */
DECLARE @ExclFacadeScYn NVARCHAR(50)  = N'창구SC';
DECLARE @ExclScName1    NVARCHAR(50)  = N'고객지원팀';
DECLARE @ExclScName2    NVARCHAR(50)  = N'TOYOTA YM';
DECLARE @ExclUserIds    NVARCHAR(500) = N'DM5103,DM9999,JB30007,JB30016,KMKS176,KMKS999,JB30067';

/* ============================================
   3. MTD 기준일 (NULL 이면 각 월 전체 합계)
   ============================================ */
DECLARE @AsOfDate DATE = NULL;   -- 예: CAST(GETDATE() AS DATE)

/* ============================================
   0) 슬라이서 값 분해를 임시 테이블로 선처리 (플랜 단순화)
   ============================================ */
IF OBJECT_ID('tempdb..#ExclUsers') IS NOT NULL DROP TABLE #ExclUsers;
SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) AS v INTO #ExclUsers FROM STRING_SPLIT(@ExclUserIds, ',');

/* ============================================
   1) 계약 팩트 집계 → #CN
   ============================================ */
IF OBJECT_ID('tempdb..#CN') IS NOT NULL DROP TABLE #CN;
SELECT
      CAL.[Year]                    AS yr
    , CAL.MonthNumber               AS mn
    , ISNULL(U.BRAND, N'')          AS brand_k
    , ISNULL(D.dealer_nm, N'')      AS dealer_k
    , ISNULL(U.group_name, N'')     AS grp_k
    , ISNULL(U.dept_nm, N'')        AS dept_k
    , ISNULL(U.active_yn, N'')      AS act_k
    , ISNULL(U.name, N'')           AS sc_k
    , M.model_nm
    , V.variant_nm
    , S.my_cd
    , S.sfx_cd
    , SUM(CASE WHEN F.cancel_dt IS NULL     THEN F.cnt ELSE 0 END) AS ac_val
    , SUM(CASE WHEN F.cancel_dt IS NOT NULL THEN F.cnt ELSE 0 END) AS cancel_val
    , SUM(F.cnt)                                                   AS total_val
INTO #CN
FROM ktws.FCT_CONTRACT_KTWS        F
JOIN ktws.DIM_CALENDAR_KTWS        CAL ON F.contract_dt  = CAL.[Date]
LEFT JOIN ktws.DIM_MNG_USER        U   ON F.cn_sc_key    = U.sc_key
LEFT JOIN ktws.DIM_MNG_DEALER      D   ON U.dealer_key   = D.dealer_key
LEFT JOIN ktws.DIM_VEHIC_SPEC      S   ON F.cn_vehic_key = S.spec_key
LEFT JOIN ktws.DIM_VEHIC_SPEC_VAR  V   ON S.var_key      = V.var_key
LEFT JOIN ktws.DIM_VEHIC_SPEC_MDL  M   ON V.model_key    = M.mdl_key
WHERE 1 = 1
    AND (@AsOfDate IS NULL OR CAL.[Date] <= @AsOfDate)

    /* ---- 페이지 필터 (NULL-safe) ---- */
    AND (U.facade_sc_yn IS NULL OR U.facade_sc_yn NOT LIKE N'%' + @ExclFacadeScYn + N'%')
    AND (U.name IS NULL OR (U.name NOT LIKE N'%' + @ExclScName1 + N'%'
                        AND U.name NOT LIKE N'%' + @ExclScName2 + N'%'))
    AND (U.user_id IS NULL OR U.user_id NOT IN (SELECT v FROM #ExclUsers))

    /* ---- SC 필터 (NULL 또는 'ALL' = 전체) ---- */
    AND (@ScName IS NULL OR @ScName = N'ALL'
         OR U.name IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@ScName, ',')))

    /* ---- 슬라이서 필터 (NULL = 전체) ---- */
    AND (@Year      IS NULL OR CAL.[Year]   IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@Year, ',')))
    AND (@Brand     IS NULL OR U.BRAND      IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@Brand, ',')))
    AND (@DealerNm  IS NULL OR D.dealer_nm  IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@DealerNm, ',')))
    AND (@GroupName IS NULL OR U.group_name IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@GroupName, ',')))
    AND (@DeptNm    IS NULL OR U.dept_nm    IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@DeptNm, ',')))
    AND (@ActiveYn  IS NULL OR U.active_yn  IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@ActiveYn, ',')))
    AND (@ModelNm   IS NULL OR M.model_nm   IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@ModelNm, ',')))
    AND (@VariantNm IS NULL OR V.variant_nm IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@VariantNm, ',')))
    AND (@MyCd      IS NULL OR S.my_cd      IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@MyCd, ',')))
    AND (@SfxCd     IS NULL OR S.sfx_cd     IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@SfxCd, ',')))
GROUP BY CAL.[Year], CAL.MonthNumber
    , ISNULL(U.BRAND, N''), ISNULL(D.dealer_nm, N''), ISNULL(U.group_name, N'')
    , ISNULL(U.dept_nm, N''), ISNULL(U.active_yn, N''), ISNULL(U.name, N'')
    , M.model_nm, V.variant_nm, S.my_cd, S.sfx_cd;

/* ============================================
   2) 목표 팩트 집계 → #TGT (차량 차원 관계 없음)
   ============================================ */
IF OBJECT_ID('tempdb..#TGT') IS NOT NULL DROP TABLE #TGT;
SELECT
      CAL.[Year]                    AS yr
    , CAL.MonthNumber               AS mn
    , ISNULL(U.BRAND, N'')          AS brand_k
    , ISNULL(D.dealer_nm, N'')      AS dealer_k
    , ISNULL(U.group_name, N'')     AS grp_k
    , ISNULL(U.dept_nm, N'')        AS dept_k
    , ISNULL(U.active_yn, N'')      AS act_k
    , ISNULL(U.name, N'')           AS sc_k
    , SUM(F.target_cnt)             AS val
INTO #TGT
FROM ktws.FCT_CRM_TARGET_M      F
JOIN ktws.DIM_CALENDAR_KTWS     CAL ON F.monthly_dt = CAL.[Date]
LEFT JOIN ktws.DIM_MNG_USER     U   ON F.sc_key     = U.sc_key
LEFT JOIN ktws.DIM_MNG_DEALER   D   ON U.dealer_key = D.dealer_key
JOIN ktws.DIM_CRM_ACT_TYPE      A   ON F.tp_key     = A.tp_key
WHERE 1 = 1
    AND A.common_tp_nm = N'계약'
    AND (@AsOfDate IS NULL OR CAL.[Date] <= @AsOfDate)

    /* ---- 페이지 필터 (NULL-safe) ---- */
    AND (U.facade_sc_yn IS NULL OR U.facade_sc_yn NOT LIKE N'%' + @ExclFacadeScYn + N'%')
    AND (U.name IS NULL OR (U.name NOT LIKE N'%' + @ExclScName1 + N'%'
                        AND U.name NOT LIKE N'%' + @ExclScName2 + N'%'))
    AND (U.user_id IS NULL OR U.user_id NOT IN (SELECT v FROM #ExclUsers))

    /* ---- SC 필터 (NULL 또는 'ALL' = 전체) ---- */
    AND (@ScName IS NULL OR @ScName = N'ALL'
         OR U.name IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@ScName, ',')))

    /* ---- 슬라이서 필터 (NULL = 전체) ---- */
    AND (@Year      IS NULL OR CAL.[Year]   IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@Year, ',')))
    AND (@Brand     IS NULL OR U.BRAND      IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@Brand, ',')))
    AND (@DealerNm  IS NULL OR D.dealer_nm  IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@DealerNm, ',')))
    AND (@GroupName IS NULL OR U.group_name IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@GroupName, ',')))
    AND (@DeptNm    IS NULL OR U.dept_nm    IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@DeptNm, ',')))
    AND (@ActiveYn  IS NULL OR U.active_yn  IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@ActiveYn, ',')))
GROUP BY CAL.[Year], CAL.MonthNumber
    , ISNULL(U.BRAND, N''), ISNULL(D.dealer_nm, N''), ISNULL(U.group_name, N'')
    , ISNULL(U.dept_nm, N''), ISNULL(U.active_yn, N''), ISNULL(U.name, N'');

/* ============================================
   3) 최종 결합 (임시 테이블끼리 FULL OUTER JOIN → 플랜 단순)
      @ScName NULL → SC 열 없음 / 'ALL' 또는 값 → SC 열 포함
   ============================================ */
IF @ScName IS NULL
BEGIN
    SELECT
          ISNULL(CN.yr, TGT.yr)             AS N'연도'
        , ISNULL(CN.mn, TGT.mn)             AS N'월'
        , ISNULL(CN.brand_k, TGT.brand_k)   AS N'브랜드'
        , ISNULL(CN.dealer_k, TGT.dealer_k) AS N'딜러'
        , ISNULL(CN.grp_k, TGT.grp_k)       AS N'전시장'
        , ISNULL(CN.dept_k, TGT.dept_k)     AS N'팀'
        , ISNULL(CN.act_k, TGT.act_k)       AS N'재직여부'
        , CN.model_nm                       AS N'모델'
        , CN.variant_nm                     AS N'차종'
        , CN.my_cd                          AS N'연식'
        , CN.sfx_cd                         AS N'SFX'
        , ISNULL(CN.ac_val, 0)              AS N'실적'
        , ISNULL(CN.cancel_val, 0)          AS N'취소'
        , ISNULL(TGT.val, 0)                AS N'타겟'
        , CASE WHEN ISNULL(TGT.val, 0) = 0 THEN 0
               ELSE CAST(ISNULL(CN.total_val, 0) AS FLOAT) / TGT.val
          END                               AS N'달성률'
    FROM (
        /* SC 미표시: SC 차원 걷어내고 재집계 */
        SELECT yr, mn, brand_k, dealer_k, grp_k, dept_k, act_k
             , model_nm, variant_nm, my_cd, sfx_cd
             , SUM(ac_val) AS ac_val, SUM(cancel_val) AS cancel_val, SUM(total_val) AS total_val
        FROM #CN
        GROUP BY yr, mn, brand_k, dealer_k, grp_k, dept_k, act_k
             , model_nm, variant_nm, my_cd, sfx_cd
    ) CN
    FULL OUTER JOIN (
        SELECT yr, mn, brand_k, dealer_k, grp_k, dept_k, act_k
             , SUM(val) AS val
        FROM #TGT
        GROUP BY yr, mn, brand_k, dealer_k, grp_k, dept_k, act_k
    ) TGT
        ON  CN.yr = TGT.yr AND CN.mn = TGT.mn
        AND CN.brand_k  = TGT.brand_k
        AND CN.dealer_k = TGT.dealer_k
        AND CN.grp_k    = TGT.grp_k
        AND CN.dept_k   = TGT.dept_k
        AND CN.act_k    = TGT.act_k
    ORDER BY 1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 6, 8, 9;
END
ELSE
BEGIN
    SELECT
          ISNULL(CN.yr, TGT.yr)             AS N'연도'
        , ISNULL(CN.mn, TGT.mn)             AS N'월'
        , ISNULL(CN.brand_k, TGT.brand_k)   AS N'브랜드'
        , ISNULL(CN.dealer_k, TGT.dealer_k) AS N'딜러'
        , ISNULL(CN.grp_k, TGT.grp_k)       AS N'전시장'
        , ISNULL(CN.dept_k, TGT.dept_k)     AS N'팀'
        , ISNULL(CN.act_k, TGT.act_k)       AS N'재직여부'
        , ISNULL(CN.sc_k, TGT.sc_k)         AS N'SC'
        , CN.model_nm                       AS N'모델'
        , CN.variant_nm                     AS N'차종'
        , CN.my_cd                          AS N'연식'
        , CN.sfx_cd                         AS N'SFX'
        , ISNULL(CN.ac_val, 0)              AS N'실적'
        , ISNULL(CN.cancel_val, 0)          AS N'취소'
        , ISNULL(TGT.val, 0)                AS N'타겟'
        , CASE WHEN ISNULL(TGT.val, 0) = 0 THEN 0
               ELSE CAST(ISNULL(CN.total_val, 0) AS FLOAT) / TGT.val
          END                               AS N'달성률'
    FROM #CN CN
    FULL OUTER JOIN #TGT TGT
        ON  CN.yr = TGT.yr AND CN.mn = TGT.mn
        AND CN.brand_k  = TGT.brand_k
        AND CN.dealer_k = TGT.dealer_k
        AND CN.grp_k    = TGT.grp_k
        AND CN.dept_k   = TGT.dept_k
        AND CN.act_k    = TGT.act_k
        AND CN.sc_k     = TGT.sc_k
    ORDER BY 1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 6, 7, 8, 9;
END

/* 정리 */
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS #CN;
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS #TGT;
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS #ExclUsers;

/* ============================================
   1. 슬라이서 변수 (NULL = 전체 선택, 다중 값은 콤마 구분, N'...' 사용)
      ※ @ScName: NULL → SC 열 미표시 / 'ALL' → 표시+전체 / 값 → 표시+해당 SC
   ============================================ */
DECLARE @Year        NVARCHAR(200) = NULL;  -- ktws DIM_CALENDAR_KTWS[Year]
DECLARE @Brand       NVARCHAR(200) = NULL;  -- ktws DIM_MNG_USER[BRAND]
DECLARE @DealerNm    NVARCHAR(500) = NULL;  -- ktws DIM_MNG_DEALER[dealer_nm]
DECLARE @GroupName   NVARCHAR(500) = NULL;  -- ktws DIM_MNG_USER[group_name]
DECLARE @DeptNm      NVARCHAR(500) = NULL;  -- ktws DIM_MNG_USER[dept_nm]
DECLARE @ActiveYn    NVARCHAR(50)  = NULL;  -- ktws DIM_MNG_USER[active_yn]
DECLARE @ScName      NVARCHAR(500) = NULL;  -- ktws DIM_MNG_USER[name]  ※ NULL/'ALL'/값
DECLARE @ModelNm     NVARCHAR(500) = NULL;  -- ktws DIM_VEHIC_SPEC_MDL[model_nm]
DECLARE @VariantNm   NVARCHAR(500) = NULL;  -- ktws DIM_VEHIC_SPEC_VAR[variant_nm]
DECLARE @MyCd        NVARCHAR(200) = NULL;  -- ktws DIM_VEHIC_SPEC[my_cd]
DECLARE @SfxCd       NVARCHAR(200) = NULL;  -- ktws DIM_VEHIC_SPEC[sfx_cd]

/* ============================================
   2. 페이지 필터 변수
   ============================================ */
DECLARE @ExclFacadeScYn NVARCHAR(50)  = N'창구SC';
DECLARE @ExclScName1    NVARCHAR(50)  = N'고객지원팀';
DECLARE @ExclScName2    NVARCHAR(50)  = N'TOYOTA YM';
DECLARE @ExclUserIds    NVARCHAR(500) = N'DM5103,DM9999,JB30007,JB30016,KMKS176,KMKS999,JB30067';

/* ============================================
   3. YTD 기준일 (NULL 이면 각 월 말까지 전체)
   ============================================ */
DECLARE @AsOfDate DATE = NULL;   -- 예: CAST(GETDATE() AS DATE)

/* ============================================
   연도 | MonthAbbr | 브랜드 | 딜러 | 전시장 | 팀 | 재직여부 | (SC)
   | 모델 | 차종 | 연식 | SFX | 실적 | 취소 | 타겟 | 달성률
   ※ MonthNumber 미사용. 각 월 행 = 연초~해당 월 말 YTD
   ============================================ */
IF @ScName IS NULL
BEGIN
    /* ---------- 분기 A: SC 열 없음 ---------- */
    ;WITH MonthAnchor AS (
        SELECT
              CAL.[Year]                                      AS yr
            , CAL.MonthAbbr
            , DATEFROMPARTS(CAL.[Year], 1, 1)                 AS year_start
            , MIN(CAL.[Date])                                 AS month_start
            , CASE WHEN @AsOfDate IS NOT NULL AND EOMONTH(MAX(CAL.[Date])) > @AsOfDate
                   THEN @AsOfDate
                   ELSE EOMONTH(MAX(CAL.[Date]))
              END                                             AS month_end
        FROM ktws.DIM_CALENDAR_KTWS CAL
        WHERE (@Year IS NULL OR CAL.[Year] IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@Year, ',')))
          AND (@AsOfDate IS NULL OR CAL.[Date] <= @AsOfDate OR MONTH(CAL.[Date]) = MONTH(@AsOfDate))
        GROUP BY CAL.[Year], CAL.MonthAbbr
    )
    , CN AS (
        /* 계약 YTD: 월 앵커 × 팩트 범위 조인, 월말 시점 취소 재평가 */
        SELECT
              A.yr, A.MonthAbbr
            , ISNULL(U.BRAND, N'')      AS brand_k
            , ISNULL(D.dealer_nm, N'')  AS dealer_k
            , ISNULL(U.group_name, N'') AS grp_k
            , ISNULL(U.dept_nm, N'')    AS dept_k
            , ISNULL(U.active_yn, N'')  AS act_k
            , M.model_nm, V.variant_nm, S.my_cd, S.sfx_cd
            , SUM(CASE WHEN F.cancel_dt IS NULL OR F.cancel_dt > A.month_end
                       THEN F.cnt ELSE 0 END)                       AS ac_val
            , SUM(CASE WHEN F.cancel_dt IS NOT NULL
                        AND F.cancel_dt < DATEADD(DAY, 1, A.month_end)
                       THEN F.cnt ELSE 0 END)                       AS cancel_val
            , SUM(F.cnt)                                            AS total_val
        FROM MonthAnchor A
        JOIN ktws.FCT_CONTRACT_KTWS        F   ON F.contract_dt >= A.year_start
                                              AND F.contract_dt <= A.month_end
        LEFT JOIN ktws.DIM_MNG_USER        U   ON F.cn_sc_key    = U.sc_key
        LEFT JOIN ktws.DIM_MNG_DEALER      D   ON U.dealer_key   = D.dealer_key
        LEFT JOIN ktws.DIM_VEHIC_SPEC      S   ON F.cn_vehic_key = S.spec_key
        LEFT JOIN ktws.DIM_VEHIC_SPEC_VAR  V   ON S.var_key      = V.var_key
        LEFT JOIN ktws.DIM_VEHIC_SPEC_MDL  M   ON V.model_key    = M.mdl_key
        WHERE 1 = 1
            AND (U.facade_sc_yn IS NULL OR U.facade_sc_yn NOT LIKE N'%' + @ExclFacadeScYn + N'%')
            AND (U.name IS NULL OR (U.name NOT LIKE N'%' + @ExclScName1 + N'%'
                                AND U.name NOT LIKE N'%' + @ExclScName2 + N'%'))
            AND (U.user_id IS NULL OR U.user_id NOT IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@ExclUserIds, ',')))
            AND (@Brand     IS NULL OR U.BRAND      IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@Brand, ',')))
            AND (@DealerNm  IS NULL OR D.dealer_nm  IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@DealerNm, ',')))
            AND (@GroupName IS NULL OR U.group_name IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@GroupName, ',')))
            AND (@DeptNm    IS NULL OR U.dept_nm    IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@DeptNm, ',')))
            AND (@ActiveYn  IS NULL OR U.active_yn  IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@ActiveYn, ',')))
            AND (@ModelNm   IS NULL OR M.model_nm   IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@ModelNm, ',')))
            AND (@VariantNm IS NULL OR V.variant_nm IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@VariantNm, ',')))
            AND (@MyCd      IS NULL OR S.my_cd      IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@MyCd, ',')))
            AND (@SfxCd     IS NULL OR S.sfx_cd     IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@SfxCd, ',')))
        GROUP BY A.yr, A.MonthAbbr
            , ISNULL(U.BRAND, N''), ISNULL(D.dealer_nm, N''), ISNULL(U.group_name, N'')
            , ISNULL(U.dept_nm, N''), ISNULL(U.active_yn, N'')
            , M.model_nm, V.variant_nm, S.my_cd, S.sfx_cd
    )
    , TGTM AS (
        /* 목표 월별 (tp_nm='계약', 사용자 차원) */
        SELECT
              CAL.[Year]                AS yr
            , CAL.MonthAbbr
            , ISNULL(U.BRAND, N'')      AS brand_k
            , ISNULL(D.dealer_nm, N'')  AS dealer_k
            , ISNULL(U.group_name, N'') AS grp_k
            , ISNULL(U.dept_nm, N'')    AS dept_k
            , ISNULL(U.active_yn, N'')  AS act_k
            , SUM(F.target_cnt)         AS mval
        FROM ktws.FCT_CRM_TARGET_M      F
        JOIN ktws.DIM_CALENDAR_KTWS     CAL ON F.monthly_dt = CAL.[Date]
        LEFT JOIN ktws.DIM_MNG_USER     U   ON F.sc_key     = U.sc_key
        LEFT JOIN ktws.DIM_MNG_DEALER   D   ON U.dealer_key = D.dealer_key
        JOIN ktws.DIM_CRM_ACT_TYPE      A   ON F.tp_key     = A.tp_key
        WHERE 1 = 1
            AND A.tp_nm = N'계약'
            AND (@AsOfDate IS NULL OR CAL.[Date] <= @AsOfDate)
            AND (@Year IS NULL OR CAL.[Year] IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@Year, ',')))
            AND (U.facade_sc_yn IS NULL OR U.facade_sc_yn NOT LIKE N'%' + @ExclFacadeScYn + N'%')
            AND (U.name IS NULL OR (U.name NOT LIKE N'%' + @ExclScName1 + N'%'
                                AND U.name NOT LIKE N'%' + @ExclScName2 + N'%'))
            AND (U.user_id IS NULL OR U.user_id NOT IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@ExclUserIds, ',')))
            AND (@Brand     IS NULL OR U.BRAND      IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@Brand, ',')))
            AND (@DealerNm  IS NULL OR D.dealer_nm  IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@DealerNm, ',')))
            AND (@GroupName IS NULL OR U.group_name IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@GroupName, ',')))
            AND (@DeptNm    IS NULL OR U.dept_nm    IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@DeptNm, ',')))
            AND (@ActiveYn  IS NULL OR U.active_yn  IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@ActiveYn, ',')))
        GROUP BY CAL.[Year], CAL.MonthAbbr
            , ISNULL(U.BRAND, N''), ISNULL(D.dealer_nm, N''), ISNULL(U.group_name, N'')
            , ISNULL(U.dept_nm, N''), ISNULL(U.active_yn, N'')
    )
    , TGTY AS (
        /* 목표 YTD 누적: 월앵커 × 차원조합 골격 위 누적 */
        SELECT
              MA.yr, MA.MonthAbbr
            , DM.brand_k, DM.dealer_k, DM.grp_k, DM.dept_k, DM.act_k
            , SUM(ISNULL(T.mval, 0)) OVER (
                  PARTITION BY MA.yr, DM.brand_k, DM.dealer_k, DM.grp_k, DM.dept_k, DM.act_k
                  ORDER BY MA.month_start
                  ROWS UNBOUNDED PRECEDING) AS tgt_ytd
        FROM MonthAnchor MA
        JOIN (SELECT DISTINCT yr, brand_k, dealer_k, grp_k, dept_k, act_k FROM TGTM) DM
            ON MA.yr = DM.yr
        LEFT JOIN TGTM T
            ON  T.yr = MA.yr AND T.MonthAbbr = MA.MonthAbbr
            AND T.brand_k = DM.brand_k AND T.dealer_k = DM.dealer_k
            AND T.grp_k = DM.grp_k AND T.dept_k = DM.dept_k AND T.act_k = DM.act_k
    )
    SELECT
          ISNULL(CN.yr, TG.yr)             AS N'연도'
        , ISNULL(CN.MonthAbbr, TG.MonthAbbr) AS MonthAbbr
        , ISNULL(CN.brand_k, TG.brand_k)   AS N'브랜드'
        , ISNULL(CN.dealer_k, TG.dealer_k) AS N'딜러'
        , ISNULL(CN.grp_k, TG.grp_k)       AS N'전시장'
        , ISNULL(CN.dept_k, TG.dept_k)     AS N'팀'
        , ISNULL(CN.act_k, TG.act_k)       AS N'재직여부'
        , CN.model_nm                      AS N'모델'
        , CN.variant_nm                    AS N'차종'
        , CN.my_cd                         AS N'연식'
        , CN.sfx_cd                        AS N'SFX'
        , ISNULL(CN.ac_val, 0)             AS N'실적'
        , ISNULL(CN.cancel_val, 0)         AS N'취소'
        , ISNULL(TG.tgt_ytd, 0)            AS N'타겟'
        , CASE WHEN ISNULL(TG.tgt_ytd, 0) = 0 THEN 0
               ELSE CAST(ISNULL(CN.total_val, 0) AS FLOAT) / TG.tgt_ytd
          END                              AS N'달성률'
    FROM CN
    FULL OUTER JOIN TGTY TG
        ON  CN.yr = TG.yr AND CN.MonthAbbr = TG.MonthAbbr
        AND CN.brand_k = TG.brand_k AND CN.dealer_k = TG.dealer_k
        AND CN.grp_k = TG.grp_k AND CN.dept_k = TG.dept_k AND CN.act_k = TG.act_k
    ORDER BY 1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 6, 8, 9
;
END
ELSE
BEGIN
    /* ---------- 분기 B: SC 열 포함 ('ALL' = 전체 SC) ---------- */
    ;WITH MonthAnchor AS (
        SELECT
              CAL.[Year]                                      AS yr
            , CAL.MonthAbbr
            , DATEFROMPARTS(CAL.[Year], 1, 1)                 AS year_start
            , MIN(CAL.[Date])                                 AS month_start
            , CASE WHEN @AsOfDate IS NOT NULL AND EOMONTH(MAX(CAL.[Date])) > @AsOfDate
                   THEN @AsOfDate
                   ELSE EOMONTH(MAX(CAL.[Date]))
              END                                             AS month_end
        FROM ktws.DIM_CALENDAR_KTWS CAL
        WHERE (@Year IS NULL OR CAL.[Year] IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@Year, ',')))
          AND (@AsOfDate IS NULL OR CAL.[Date] <= @AsOfDate OR MONTH(CAL.[Date]) = MONTH(@AsOfDate))
        GROUP BY CAL.[Year], CAL.MonthAbbr
    )
    , CN AS (
        SELECT
              A.yr, A.MonthAbbr
            , ISNULL(U.BRAND, N'')      AS brand_k
            , ISNULL(D.dealer_nm, N'')  AS dealer_k
            , ISNULL(U.group_name, N'') AS grp_k
            , ISNULL(U.dept_nm, N'')    AS dept_k
            , ISNULL(U.active_yn, N'')  AS act_k
            , ISNULL(U.name, N'')       AS sc_k
            , M.model_nm, V.variant_nm, S.my_cd, S.sfx_cd
            , SUM(CASE WHEN F.cancel_dt IS NULL OR F.cancel_dt > A.month_end
                       THEN F.cnt ELSE 0 END)                       AS ac_val
            , SUM(CASE WHEN F.cancel_dt IS NOT NULL
                        AND F.cancel_dt < DATEADD(DAY, 1, A.month_end)
                       THEN F.cnt ELSE 0 END)                       AS cancel_val
            , SUM(F.cnt)                                            AS total_val
        FROM MonthAnchor A
        JOIN ktws.FCT_CONTRACT_KTWS        F   ON F.contract_dt >= A.year_start
                                              AND F.contract_dt <= A.month_end
        LEFT JOIN ktws.DIM_MNG_USER        U   ON F.cn_sc_key    = U.sc_key
        LEFT JOIN ktws.DIM_MNG_DEALER      D   ON U.dealer_key   = D.dealer_key
        LEFT JOIN ktws.DIM_VEHIC_SPEC      S   ON F.cn_vehic_key = S.spec_key
        LEFT JOIN ktws.DIM_VEHIC_SPEC_VAR  V   ON S.var_key      = V.var_key
        LEFT JOIN ktws.DIM_VEHIC_SPEC_MDL  M   ON V.model_key    = M.mdl_key
        WHERE 1 = 1
            AND (U.facade_sc_yn IS NULL OR U.facade_sc_yn NOT LIKE N'%' + @ExclFacadeScYn + N'%')
            AND (U.name IS NULL OR (U.name NOT LIKE N'%' + @ExclScName1 + N'%'
                                AND U.name NOT LIKE N'%' + @ExclScName2 + N'%'))
            AND (U.user_id IS NULL OR U.user_id NOT IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@ExclUserIds, ',')))
            AND (@ScName = N'ALL' OR U.name IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@ScName, ',')))
            AND (@Brand     IS NULL OR U.BRAND      IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@Brand, ',')))
            AND (@DealerNm  IS NULL OR D.dealer_nm  IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@DealerNm, ',')))
            AND (@GroupName IS NULL OR U.group_name IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@GroupName, ',')))
            AND (@DeptNm    IS NULL OR U.dept_nm    IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@DeptNm, ',')))
            AND (@ActiveYn  IS NULL OR U.active_yn  IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@ActiveYn, ',')))
            AND (@ModelNm   IS NULL OR M.model_nm   IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@ModelNm, ',')))
            AND (@VariantNm IS NULL OR V.variant_nm IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@VariantNm, ',')))
            AND (@MyCd      IS NULL OR S.my_cd      IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@MyCd, ',')))
            AND (@SfxCd     IS NULL OR S.sfx_cd     IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@SfxCd, ',')))
        GROUP BY A.yr, A.MonthAbbr
            , ISNULL(U.BRAND, N''), ISNULL(D.dealer_nm, N''), ISNULL(U.group_name, N'')
            , ISNULL(U.dept_nm, N''), ISNULL(U.active_yn, N''), ISNULL(U.name, N'')
            , M.model_nm, V.variant_nm, S.my_cd, S.sfx_cd
    )
    , TGTM AS (
        SELECT
              CAL.[Year]                AS yr
            , CAL.MonthAbbr
            , ISNULL(U.BRAND, N'')      AS brand_k
            , ISNULL(D.dealer_nm, N'')  AS dealer_k
            , ISNULL(U.group_name, N'') AS grp_k
            , ISNULL(U.dept_nm, N'')    AS dept_k
            , ISNULL(U.active_yn, N'')  AS act_k
            , ISNULL(U.name, N'')       AS sc_k
            , SUM(F.target_cnt)         AS mval
        FROM ktws.FCT_CRM_TARGET_M      F
        JOIN ktws.DIM_CALENDAR_KTWS     CAL ON F.monthly_dt = CAL.[Date]
        LEFT JOIN ktws.DIM_MNG_USER     U   ON F.sc_key     = U.sc_key
        LEFT JOIN ktws.DIM_MNG_DEALER   D   ON U.dealer_key = D.dealer_key
        JOIN ktws.DIM_CRM_ACT_TYPE      A   ON F.tp_key     = A.tp_key
        WHERE 1 = 1
            AND A.tp_nm = N'계약'
            AND (@AsOfDate IS NULL OR CAL.[Date] <= @AsOfDate)
            AND (@Year IS NULL OR CAL.[Year] IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@Year, ',')))
            AND (U.facade_sc_yn IS NULL OR U.facade_sc_yn NOT LIKE N'%' + @ExclFacadeScYn + N'%')
            AND (U.name IS NULL OR (U.name NOT LIKE N'%' + @ExclScName1 + N'%'
                                AND U.name NOT LIKE N'%' + @ExclScName2 + N'%'))
            AND (U.user_id IS NULL OR U.user_id NOT IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@ExclUserIds, ',')))
            AND (@ScName = N'ALL' OR U.name IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@ScName, ',')))
            AND (@Brand     IS NULL OR U.BRAND      IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@Brand, ',')))
            AND (@DealerNm  IS NULL OR D.dealer_nm  IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@DealerNm, ',')))
            AND (@GroupName IS NULL OR U.group_name IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@GroupName, ',')))
            AND (@DeptNm    IS NULL OR U.dept_nm    IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@DeptNm, ',')))
            AND (@ActiveYn  IS NULL OR U.active_yn  IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@ActiveYn, ',')))
        GROUP BY CAL.[Year], CAL.MonthAbbr
            , ISNULL(U.BRAND, N''), ISNULL(D.dealer_nm, N''), ISNULL(U.group_name, N'')
            , ISNULL(U.dept_nm, N''), ISNULL(U.active_yn, N''), ISNULL(U.name, N'')
    )
    , TGTY AS (
        SELECT
              MA.yr, MA.MonthAbbr
            , DM.brand_k, DM.dealer_k, DM.grp_k, DM.dept_k, DM.act_k, DM.sc_k
            , SUM(ISNULL(T.mval, 0)) OVER (
                  PARTITION BY MA.yr, DM.brand_k, DM.dealer_k, DM.grp_k, DM.dept_k, DM.act_k, DM.sc_k
                  ORDER BY MA.month_start
                  ROWS UNBOUNDED PRECEDING) AS tgt_ytd
        FROM MonthAnchor MA
        JOIN (SELECT DISTINCT yr, brand_k, dealer_k, grp_k, dept_k, act_k, sc_k FROM TGTM) DM
            ON MA.yr = DM.yr
        LEFT JOIN TGTM T
            ON  T.yr = MA.yr AND T.MonthAbbr = MA.MonthAbbr
            AND T.brand_k = DM.brand_k AND T.dealer_k = DM.dealer_k
            AND T.grp_k = DM.grp_k AND T.dept_k = DM.dept_k
            AND T.act_k = DM.act_k AND T.sc_k = DM.sc_k
    )
    SELECT
          ISNULL(CN.yr, TG.yr)               AS N'연도'
        , ISNULL(CN.MonthAbbr, TG.MonthAbbr) AS MonthAbbr
        , ISNULL(CN.brand_k, TG.brand_k)     AS N'브랜드'
        , ISNULL(CN.dealer_k, TG.dealer_k)   AS N'딜러'
        , ISNULL(CN.grp_k, TG.grp_k)         AS N'전시장'
        , ISNULL(CN.dept_k, TG.dept_k)       AS N'팀'
        , ISNULL(CN.act_k, TG.act_k)         AS N'재직여부'
        , ISNULL(CN.sc_k, TG.sc_k)           AS N'SC'
        , CN.model_nm                        AS N'모델'
        , CN.variant_nm                      AS N'차종'
        , CN.my_cd                           AS N'연식'
        , CN.sfx_cd                          AS N'SFX'
        , ISNULL(CN.ac_val, 0)               AS N'실적'
        , ISNULL(CN.cancel_val, 0)           AS N'취소'
        , ISNULL(TG.tgt_ytd, 0)              AS N'타겟'
        , CASE WHEN ISNULL(TG.tgt_ytd, 0) = 0 THEN 0
               ELSE CAST(ISNULL(CN.total_val, 0) AS FLOAT) / TG.tgt_ytd
          END                                AS N'달성률'
    FROM CN
    FULL OUTER JOIN TGTY TG
        ON  CN.yr = TG.yr AND CN.MonthAbbr = TG.MonthAbbr
        AND CN.brand_k = TG.brand_k AND CN.dealer_k = TG.dealer_k
        AND CN.grp_k = TG.grp_k AND CN.dept_k = TG.dept_k
        AND CN.act_k = TG.act_k AND CN.sc_k = TG.sc_k
    ORDER BY 1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 6, 7, 8, 9;
END

/* ============================================
   1. 슬라이서 변수 (NULL = 전체 선택, 다중 값은 콤마 구분, N'...' 사용)
      ※ @ScName: NULL → SC 열 미표시 / 'ALL' → 표시+전체 / 값 → 표시+해당 SC
   ============================================ */
DECLARE @Year        NVARCHAR(200) = NULL;  -- ktws DIM_CALENDAR_KTWS[Year]
DECLARE @Brand       NVARCHAR(200) = NULL;  -- ktws DIM_MNG_USER[BRAND]
DECLARE @DealerNm    NVARCHAR(500) = NULL;  -- ktws DIM_MNG_DEALER[dealer_nm]
DECLARE @GroupName   NVARCHAR(500) = NULL;  -- ktws DIM_MNG_USER[group_name]
DECLARE @DeptNm      NVARCHAR(500) = NULL;  -- ktws DIM_MNG_USER[dept_nm]
DECLARE @ActiveYn    NVARCHAR(50)  = NULL;  -- ktws DIM_MNG_USER[active_yn]
DECLARE @ScName      NVARCHAR(500) = NULL;  -- ktws DIM_MNG_USER[name]  ※ NULL/'ALL'/값
DECLARE @ModelNm     NVARCHAR(500) = NULL;  -- ktws DIM_VEHIC_SPEC_MDL[model_nm]
DECLARE @VariantNm   NVARCHAR(500) = NULL;  -- ktws DIM_VEHIC_SPEC_VAR[variant_nm]
DECLARE @MyCd        NVARCHAR(200) = NULL;  -- ktws DIM_VEHIC_SPEC[my_cd]
DECLARE @SfxCd       NVARCHAR(200) = NULL;  -- ktws DIM_VEHIC_SPEC[sfx_cd]

/* ============================================
   2. 페이지 필터 변수
   ============================================ */
DECLARE @ExclFacadeScYn NVARCHAR(50)  = N'창구SC';
DECLARE @ExclScName1    NVARCHAR(50)  = N'고객지원팀';
DECLARE @ExclScName2    NVARCHAR(50)  = N'TOYOTA YM';
DECLARE @ExclUserIds    NVARCHAR(500) = N'DM5103,DM9999,JB30007,JB30016,KMKS176,KMKS999,JB30067';

/* ============================================
   3. 기준일 (NULL 이면 각 월 전체)
   ============================================ */
DECLARE @AsOfDate DATE = NULL;   -- 예: CAST(GETDATE() AS DATE)

/* ============================================
   연도 | MonthName | 브랜드 | 딜러 | 전시장 | 팀 | 재직여부 | (SC)
   | 모델 | 차종 | 연식 | SFX | 목표 | 실적 | 달성률
   - 목표   : sales_mtd_(target)_cond (Main / 판매목표 대수)
   - 실적   : sales_mtd (출고일 기준 해당 월, 출고월 말 기준 미취소)
   - 달성률 : 실적 / 목표
   ※ 목표는 차량 차원과 관계 없음 → 사용자 차원 단위로 조인되어
     차량 열이 다른 행에 동일 값 반복 (Power BI 동작과 동일)
   ============================================ */
IF @ScName IS NULL
BEGIN
    /* ---------- 분기 A: SC 열 없음 ---------- */
    ;WITH ACT AS (
        /* 실적: 출고일 기준 판매 (차원 포함) */
        SELECT
              CAL.[Year]                AS yr
            , CAL.MonthName
            , ISNULL(U.BRAND, N'')      AS brand_k
            , ISNULL(D.dealer_nm, N'')  AS dealer_k
            , ISNULL(U.group_name, N'') AS grp_k
            , ISNULL(U.dept_nm, N'')    AS dept_k
            , ISNULL(U.active_yn, N'')  AS act_k
            , M.model_nm, V.variant_nm, S.my_cd, S.sfx_cd
            , SUM(F.cnt)                AS val
        FROM ktws.FCT_CONTRACT_KTWS        F
        JOIN ktws.DIM_CALENDAR_KTWS        CAL ON F.last_retail_sales_dt = CAL.[Date]
        LEFT JOIN ktws.DIM_MNG_USER        U   ON F.cn_sc_key    = U.sc_key
        LEFT JOIN ktws.DIM_MNG_DEALER      D   ON U.dealer_key   = D.dealer_key
        LEFT JOIN ktws.DIM_VEHIC_SPEC      S   ON F.cn_vehic_key = S.spec_key
        LEFT JOIN ktws.DIM_VEHIC_SPEC_VAR  V   ON S.var_key      = V.var_key
        LEFT JOIN ktws.DIM_VEHIC_SPEC_MDL  M   ON V.model_key    = M.mdl_key
        WHERE 1 = 1
            AND (@AsOfDate IS NULL OR CAL.[Date] <= @AsOfDate)
            AND (F.cancel_dt IS NULL OR F.cancel_dt > EOMONTH(F.last_retail_sales_dt))

            /* ---- 페이지 필터 (NULL-safe) ---- */
            AND (U.facade_sc_yn IS NULL OR U.facade_sc_yn NOT LIKE N'%' + @ExclFacadeScYn + N'%')
            AND (U.name IS NULL OR (U.name NOT LIKE N'%' + @ExclScName1 + N'%'
                                AND U.name NOT LIKE N'%' + @ExclScName2 + N'%'))
            AND (U.user_id IS NULL OR U.user_id NOT IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@ExclUserIds, ',')))

            /* ---- 슬라이서 필터 (NULL = 전체) ---- */
            AND (@Year      IS NULL OR CAL.[Year]   IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@Year, ',')))
            AND (@Brand     IS NULL OR U.BRAND      IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@Brand, ',')))
            AND (@DealerNm  IS NULL OR D.dealer_nm  IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@DealerNm, ',')))
            AND (@GroupName IS NULL OR U.group_name IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@GroupName, ',')))
            AND (@DeptNm    IS NULL OR U.dept_nm    IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@DeptNm, ',')))
            AND (@ActiveYn  IS NULL OR U.active_yn  IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@ActiveYn, ',')))
            AND (@ModelNm   IS NULL OR M.model_nm   IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@ModelNm, ',')))
            AND (@VariantNm IS NULL OR V.variant_nm IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@VariantNm, ',')))
            AND (@MyCd      IS NULL OR S.my_cd      IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@MyCd, ',')))
            AND (@SfxCd     IS NULL OR S.sfx_cd     IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@SfxCd, ',')))
        GROUP BY CAL.[Year], CAL.MonthName
            , ISNULL(U.BRAND, N''), ISNULL(D.dealer_nm, N''), ISNULL(U.group_name, N'')
            , ISNULL(U.dept_nm, N''), ISNULL(U.active_yn, N'')
            , M.model_nm, V.variant_nm, S.my_cd, S.sfx_cd
    )
    , TGT AS (
        /* 목표: Main / 판매목표 대수 (사용자 차원) */
        SELECT
              CAL.[Year]                AS yr
            , CAL.MonthName
            , ISNULL(U.BRAND, N'')      AS brand_k
            , ISNULL(D.dealer_nm, N'')  AS dealer_k
            , ISNULL(U.group_name, N'') AS grp_k
            , ISNULL(U.dept_nm, N'')    AS dept_k
            , ISNULL(U.active_yn, N'')  AS act_k
            , SUM(F.target_cnt)         AS val
        FROM ktws.FCT_CRM_TARGET_M      F
        JOIN ktws.DIM_CALENDAR_KTWS     CAL ON F.monthly_dt = CAL.[Date]
        LEFT JOIN ktws.DIM_MNG_USER     U   ON F.sc_key     = U.sc_key
        LEFT JOIN ktws.DIM_MNG_DEALER   D   ON U.dealer_key = D.dealer_key
        JOIN ktws.DIM_CRM_ACT_TYPE      A   ON F.tp_key     = A.tp_key
        WHERE 1 = 1
            AND A.target_grp_nm = N'Main'
            AND A.tp_grp_1      = N'판매목표 대수'
            AND (@AsOfDate IS NULL OR CAL.[Date] <= @AsOfDate)

            /* ---- 페이지 필터 (NULL-safe) ---- */
            AND (U.facade_sc_yn IS NULL OR U.facade_sc_yn NOT LIKE N'%' + @ExclFacadeScYn + N'%')
            AND (U.name IS NULL OR (U.name NOT LIKE N'%' + @ExclScName1 + N'%'
                                AND U.name NOT LIKE N'%' + @ExclScName2 + N'%'))
            AND (U.user_id IS NULL OR U.user_id NOT IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@ExclUserIds, ',')))

            /* ---- 슬라이서 필터 (NULL = 전체, 이 팩트에 전파되는 것만) ---- */
            AND (@Year      IS NULL OR CAL.[Year]   IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@Year, ',')))
            AND (@Brand     IS NULL OR U.BRAND      IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@Brand, ',')))
            AND (@DealerNm  IS NULL OR D.dealer_nm  IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@DealerNm, ',')))
            AND (@GroupName IS NULL OR U.group_name IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@GroupName, ',')))
            AND (@DeptNm    IS NULL OR U.dept_nm    IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@DeptNm, ',')))
            AND (@ActiveYn  IS NULL OR U.active_yn  IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@ActiveYn, ',')))
        GROUP BY CAL.[Year], CAL.MonthName
            , ISNULL(U.BRAND, N''), ISNULL(D.dealer_nm, N''), ISNULL(U.group_name, N'')
            , ISNULL(U.dept_nm, N''), ISNULL(U.active_yn, N'')
    )
    SELECT
          ISNULL(ACT.yr, TGT.yr)               AS N'연도'
        , ISNULL(ACT.MonthName, TGT.MonthName) AS MonthName
        , ISNULL(ACT.brand_k, TGT.brand_k)     AS N'브랜드'
        , ISNULL(ACT.dealer_k, TGT.dealer_k)   AS N'딜러'
        , ISNULL(ACT.grp_k, TGT.grp_k)         AS N'전시장'
        , ISNULL(ACT.dept_k, TGT.dept_k)       AS N'팀'
        , ISNULL(ACT.act_k, TGT.act_k)         AS N'재직여부'
        , ACT.model_nm                         AS N'모델'
        , ACT.variant_nm                       AS N'차종'
        , ACT.my_cd                            AS N'연식'
        , ACT.sfx_cd                           AS N'SFX'
        , ISNULL(TGT.val, 0)                   AS N'목표'
        , ISNULL(ACT.val, 0)                   AS N'실적'
        , CASE WHEN ISNULL(TGT.val, 0) = 0 THEN 0
               ELSE CAST(ISNULL(ACT.val, 0) AS FLOAT) / TGT.val
          END                                  AS N'달성률'
    FROM ACT
    FULL OUTER JOIN TGT
        ON  ACT.yr = TGT.yr AND ACT.MonthName = TGT.MonthName
        AND ACT.brand_k = TGT.brand_k AND ACT.dealer_k = TGT.dealer_k
        AND ACT.grp_k = TGT.grp_k AND ACT.dept_k = TGT.dept_k AND ACT.act_k = TGT.act_k
    ORDER BY 1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 6, 8, 9;
END
ELSE
BEGIN
    /* ---------- 분기 B: SC 열 포함 ('ALL' = 전체 SC) ---------- */
    ;WITH ACT AS (
        SELECT
              CAL.[Year]                AS yr
            , CAL.MonthName
            , ISNULL(U.BRAND, N'')      AS brand_k
            , ISNULL(D.dealer_nm, N'')  AS dealer_k
            , ISNULL(U.group_name, N'') AS grp_k
            , ISNULL(U.dept_nm, N'')    AS dept_k
            , ISNULL(U.active_yn, N'')  AS act_k
            , ISNULL(U.name, N'')       AS sc_k
            , M.model_nm, V.variant_nm, S.my_cd, S.sfx_cd
            , SUM(F.cnt)                AS val
        FROM ktws.FCT_CONTRACT_KTWS        F
        JOIN ktws.DIM_CALENDAR_KTWS        CAL ON F.last_retail_sales_dt = CAL.[Date]
        LEFT JOIN ktws.DIM_MNG_USER        U   ON F.cn_sc_key    = U.sc_key
        LEFT JOIN ktws.DIM_MNG_DEALER      D   ON U.dealer_key   = D.dealer_key
        LEFT JOIN ktws.DIM_VEHIC_SPEC      S   ON F.cn_vehic_key = S.spec_key
        LEFT JOIN ktws.DIM_VEHIC_SPEC_VAR  V   ON S.var_key      = V.var_key
        LEFT JOIN ktws.DIM_VEHIC_SPEC_MDL  M   ON V.model_key    = M.mdl_key
        WHERE 1 = 1
            AND (@AsOfDate IS NULL OR CAL.[Date] <= @AsOfDate)
            AND (F.cancel_dt IS NULL OR F.cancel_dt > EOMONTH(F.last_retail_sales_dt))

            /* ---- 페이지 필터 (NULL-safe) ---- */
            AND (U.facade_sc_yn IS NULL OR U.facade_sc_yn NOT LIKE N'%' + @ExclFacadeScYn + N'%')
            AND (U.name IS NULL OR (U.name NOT LIKE N'%' + @ExclScName1 + N'%'
                                AND U.name NOT LIKE N'%' + @ExclScName2 + N'%'))
            AND (U.user_id IS NULL OR U.user_id NOT IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@ExclUserIds, ',')))

            /* ---- SC 필터 ('ALL' = 전체) ---- */
            AND (@ScName = N'ALL' OR U.name IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@ScName, ',')))

            /* ---- 슬라이서 필터 (NULL = 전체) ---- */
            AND (@Year      IS NULL OR CAL.[Year]   IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@Year, ',')))
            AND (@Brand     IS NULL OR U.BRAND      IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@Brand, ',')))
            AND (@DealerNm  IS NULL OR D.dealer_nm  IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@DealerNm, ',')))
            AND (@GroupName IS NULL OR U.group_name IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@GroupName, ',')))
            AND (@DeptNm    IS NULL OR U.dept_nm    IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@DeptNm, ',')))
            AND (@ActiveYn  IS NULL OR U.active_yn  IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@ActiveYn, ',')))
            AND (@ModelNm   IS NULL OR M.model_nm   IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@ModelNm, ',')))
            AND (@VariantNm IS NULL OR V.variant_nm IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@VariantNm, ',')))
            AND (@MyCd      IS NULL OR S.my_cd      IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@MyCd, ',')))
            AND (@SfxCd     IS NULL OR S.sfx_cd     IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@SfxCd, ',')))
        GROUP BY CAL.[Year], CAL.MonthName
            , ISNULL(U.BRAND, N''), ISNULL(D.dealer_nm, N''), ISNULL(U.group_name, N'')
            , ISNULL(U.dept_nm, N''), ISNULL(U.active_yn, N''), ISNULL(U.name, N'')
            , M.model_nm, V.variant_nm, S.my_cd, S.sfx_cd
    )
    , TGT AS (
        SELECT
              CAL.[Year]                AS yr
            , CAL.MonthName
            , ISNULL(U.BRAND, N'')      AS brand_k
            , ISNULL(D.dealer_nm, N'')  AS dealer_k
            , ISNULL(U.group_name, N'') AS grp_k
            , ISNULL(U.dept_nm, N'')    AS dept_k
            , ISNULL(U.active_yn, N'')  AS act_k
            , ISNULL(U.name, N'')       AS sc_k
            , SUM(F.target_cnt)         AS val
        FROM ktws.FCT_CRM_TARGET_M      F
        JOIN ktws.DIM_CALENDAR_KTWS     CAL ON F.monthly_dt = CAL.[Date]
        LEFT JOIN ktws.DIM_MNG_USER     U   ON F.sc_key     = U.sc_key
        LEFT JOIN ktws.DIM_MNG_DEALER   D   ON U.dealer_key = D.dealer_key
        JOIN ktws.DIM_CRM_ACT_TYPE      A   ON F.tp_key     = A.tp_key
        WHERE 1 = 1
            AND A.target_grp_nm = N'Main'
            AND A.tp_grp_1      = N'판매목표 대수'
            AND (@AsOfDate IS NULL OR CAL.[Date] <= @AsOfDate)

            /* ---- 페이지 필터 (NULL-safe) ---- */
            AND (U.facade_sc_yn IS NULL OR U.facade_sc_yn NOT LIKE N'%' + @ExclFacadeScYn + N'%')
            AND (U.name IS NULL OR (U.name NOT LIKE N'%' + @ExclScName1 + N'%'
                                AND U.name NOT LIKE N'%' + @ExclScName2 + N'%'))
            AND (U.user_id IS NULL OR U.user_id NOT IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@ExclUserIds, ',')))

            /* ---- SC 필터 ('ALL' = 전체) ---- */
            AND (@ScName = N'ALL' OR U.name IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@ScName, ',')))

            /* ---- 슬라이서 필터 (NULL = 전체, 이 팩트에 전파되는 것만) ---- */
            AND (@Year      IS NULL OR CAL.[Year]   IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@Year, ',')))
            AND (@Brand     IS NULL OR U.BRAND      IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@Brand, ',')))
            AND (@DealerNm  IS NULL OR D.dealer_nm  IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@DealerNm, ',')))
            AND (@GroupName IS NULL OR U.group_name IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@GroupName, ',')))
            AND (@DeptNm    IS NULL OR U.dept_nm    IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@DeptNm, ',')))
            AND (@ActiveYn  IS NULL OR U.active_yn  IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@ActiveYn, ',')))
        GROUP BY CAL.[Year], CAL.MonthName
            , ISNULL(U.BRAND, N''), ISNULL(D.dealer_nm, N''), ISNULL(U.group_name, N'')
            , ISNULL(U.dept_nm, N''), ISNULL(U.active_yn, N''), ISNULL(U.name, N'')
    )
    SELECT
          ISNULL(ACT.yr, TGT.yr)               AS N'연도'
        , ISNULL(ACT.MonthName, TGT.MonthName) AS MonthName
        , ISNULL(ACT.brand_k, TGT.brand_k)     AS N'브랜드'
        , ISNULL(ACT.dealer_k, TGT.dealer_k)   AS N'딜러'
        , ISNULL(ACT.grp_k, TGT.grp_k)         AS N'전시장'
        , ISNULL(ACT.dept_k, TGT.dept_k)       AS N'팀'
        , ISNULL(ACT.act_k, TGT.act_k)         AS N'재직여부'
        , ISNULL(ACT.sc_k, TGT.sc_k)           AS N'SC'
        , ACT.model_nm                         AS N'모델'
        , ACT.variant_nm                       AS N'차종'
        , ACT.my_cd                            AS N'연식'
        , ACT.sfx_cd                           AS N'SFX'
        , ISNULL(TGT.val, 0)                   AS N'목표'
        , ISNULL(ACT.val, 0)                   AS N'실적'
        , CASE WHEN ISNULL(TGT.val, 0) = 0 THEN 0
               ELSE CAST(ISNULL(ACT.val, 0) AS FLOAT) / TGT.val
          END                                  AS N'달성률'
    FROM ACT
    FULL OUTER JOIN TGT
        ON  ACT.yr = TGT.yr AND ACT.MonthName = TGT.MonthName
        AND ACT.brand_k = TGT.brand_k AND ACT.dealer_k = TGT.dealer_k
        AND ACT.grp_k = TGT.grp_k AND ACT.dept_k = TGT.dept_k
        AND ACT.act_k = TGT.act_k AND ACT.sc_k = TGT.sc_k
    ORDER BY 1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 6, 7, 8, 9;
END

/* ============================================
   1. 슬라이서 변수 (NULL = 전체 선택, 다중 값은 콤마 구분, N'...' 사용)
      ※ @ScName: NULL → SC 열 미표시 / 'ALL' → 표시+전체 / 값 → 표시+해당 SC
   ============================================ */
DECLARE @Year        NVARCHAR(200) = NULL;  -- ktws DIM_CALENDAR_KTWS[Year]
DECLARE @Brand       NVARCHAR(200) = NULL;  -- ktws DIM_MNG_USER[BRAND]
DECLARE @DealerNm    NVARCHAR(500) = NULL;  -- ktws DIM_MNG_DEALER[dealer_nm]
DECLARE @GroupName   NVARCHAR(500) = NULL;  -- ktws DIM_MNG_USER[group_name]
DECLARE @DeptNm      NVARCHAR(500) = NULL;  -- ktws DIM_MNG_USER[dept_nm]
DECLARE @ActiveYn    NVARCHAR(50)  = NULL;  -- ktws DIM_MNG_USER[active_yn]
DECLARE @ScName      NVARCHAR(500) = NULL;  -- ktws DIM_MNG_USER[name]  ※ NULL/'ALL'/값
DECLARE @ModelNm     NVARCHAR(500) = NULL;  -- ktws DIM_VEHIC_SPEC_MDL[model_nm]
DECLARE @VariantNm   NVARCHAR(500) = NULL;  -- ktws DIM_VEHIC_SPEC_VAR[variant_nm]
DECLARE @MyCd        NVARCHAR(200) = NULL;  -- ktws DIM_VEHIC_SPEC[my_cd]
DECLARE @SfxCd       NVARCHAR(200) = NULL;  -- ktws DIM_VEHIC_SPEC[sfx_cd]

/* ============================================
   2. 페이지 필터 변수
   ============================================ */
DECLARE @ExclFacadeScYn NVARCHAR(50)  = N'창구SC';
DECLARE @ExclScName1    NVARCHAR(50)  = N'고객지원팀';
DECLARE @ExclScName2    NVARCHAR(50)  = N'TOYOTA YM';
DECLARE @ExclUserIds    NVARCHAR(500) = N'DM5103,DM9999,JB30007,JB30016,KMKS176,KMKS999,JB30067';

/* ============================================
   3. YTD 기준일 (NULL 이면 각 월 말까지 전체)
   ============================================ */
DECLARE @AsOfDate DATE = NULL;   -- 예: CAST(GETDATE() AS DATE)

/* ============================================
   연도 | MonthAbbr | 브랜드 | 딜러 | 전시장 | 팀 | 재직여부 | (SC)
   | 모델 | 차종 | 연식 | SFX | 목표 | 실적 | 달성률
   - 목표: FCT_CRM_TARGET_M (Main / 판매목표 대수) YTD 누적
   - 실적: COUNT(DISTINCT dlr_contract_no),
           출고일 ∈ [연초, 월말], 전월말 이후 취소 또는 미취소
   ※ 목표는 차량 차원과 관계 없음 → 차량 열엔 동일 값 반복
   ============================================ */
IF @ScName IS NULL
BEGIN
    /* ---------- 분기 A: SC 열 없음 ---------- */
    ;WITH MonthAnchor AS (
        SELECT
              CAL.[Year]                                      AS yr
            , CAL.MonthAbbr
            , DATEFROMPARTS(CAL.[Year], 1, 1)                 AS year_start
            , MIN(CAL.[Date])                                 AS month_start
            , CASE WHEN @AsOfDate IS NOT NULL AND EOMONTH(MAX(CAL.[Date])) > @AsOfDate
                   THEN @AsOfDate
                   ELSE EOMONTH(MAX(CAL.[Date]))
              END                                             AS month_end
            , CASE WHEN @AsOfDate IS NOT NULL AND EOMONTH(MAX(CAL.[Date])) > @AsOfDate
                   THEN EOMONTH(@AsOfDate, -1)
                   ELSE EOMONTH(MAX(CAL.[Date]), -1)
              END                                             AS prev_month_end
        FROM ktws.DIM_CALENDAR_KTWS CAL
        WHERE (@Year IS NULL OR CAL.[Year] IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@Year, ',')))
          AND (@AsOfDate IS NULL OR CAL.[Date] <= @AsOfDate OR MONTH(CAL.[Date]) = MONTH(@AsOfDate))
        GROUP BY CAL.[Year], CAL.MonthAbbr
    )
    , ACT AS (
        /* 실적: 월 앵커 × 팩트 범위 조인, DISTINCTCOUNT (차원 포함) */
        SELECT
              A.yr, A.MonthAbbr
            , ISNULL(U.BRAND, N'')      AS brand_k
            , ISNULL(D.dealer_nm, N'')  AS dealer_k
            , ISNULL(U.group_name, N'') AS grp_k
            , ISNULL(U.dept_nm, N'')    AS dept_k
            , ISNULL(U.active_yn, N'')  AS act_k
            , M.model_nm, V.variant_nm, S.my_cd, S.sfx_cd
            , COUNT(DISTINCT F.dlr_contract_no) AS val
        FROM MonthAnchor A
        JOIN ktws.FCT_CONTRACT_KTWS        F   ON F.last_retail_sales_dt >= A.year_start
                                              AND F.last_retail_sales_dt <= A.month_end
        LEFT JOIN ktws.DIM_MNG_USER        U   ON F.cn_sc_key    = U.sc_key
        LEFT JOIN ktws.DIM_MNG_DEALER      D   ON U.dealer_key   = D.dealer_key
        LEFT JOIN ktws.DIM_VEHIC_SPEC      S   ON F.cn_vehic_key = S.spec_key
        LEFT JOIN ktws.DIM_VEHIC_SPEC_VAR  V   ON S.var_key      = V.var_key
        LEFT JOIN ktws.DIM_VEHIC_SPEC_MDL  M   ON V.model_key    = M.mdl_key
        WHERE 1 = 1
            /* ---- 전월말 이후 취소 또는 미취소 ---- */
            AND (F.cancel_dt IS NULL OR F.cancel_dt > A.prev_month_end)

            /* ---- 페이지 필터 (NULL-safe) ---- */
            AND (U.facade_sc_yn IS NULL OR U.facade_sc_yn NOT LIKE N'%' + @ExclFacadeScYn + N'%')
            AND (U.name IS NULL OR (U.name NOT LIKE N'%' + @ExclScName1 + N'%'
                                AND U.name NOT LIKE N'%' + @ExclScName2 + N'%'))
            AND (U.user_id IS NULL OR U.user_id NOT IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@ExclUserIds, ',')))

            /* ---- 슬라이서 필터 (NULL = 전체) ---- */
            AND (@Brand     IS NULL OR U.BRAND      IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@Brand, ',')))
            AND (@DealerNm  IS NULL OR D.dealer_nm  IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@DealerNm, ',')))
            AND (@GroupName IS NULL OR U.group_name IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@GroupName, ',')))
            AND (@DeptNm    IS NULL OR U.dept_nm    IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@DeptNm, ',')))
            AND (@ActiveYn  IS NULL OR U.active_yn  IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@ActiveYn, ',')))
            AND (@ModelNm   IS NULL OR M.model_nm   IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@ModelNm, ',')))
            AND (@VariantNm IS NULL OR V.variant_nm IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@VariantNm, ',')))
            AND (@MyCd      IS NULL OR S.my_cd      IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@MyCd, ',')))
            AND (@SfxCd     IS NULL OR S.sfx_cd     IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@SfxCd, ',')))
        GROUP BY A.yr, A.MonthAbbr
            , ISNULL(U.BRAND, N''), ISNULL(D.dealer_nm, N''), ISNULL(U.group_name, N'')
            , ISNULL(U.dept_nm, N''), ISNULL(U.active_yn, N'')
            , M.model_nm, V.variant_nm, S.my_cd, S.sfx_cd
    )
    , TGTM AS (
        /* 목표 월별 (Main / 판매목표 대수, 사용자 차원) */
        SELECT
              CAL.[Year]                AS yr
            , CAL.MonthAbbr
            , ISNULL(U.BRAND, N'')      AS brand_k
            , ISNULL(D.dealer_nm, N'')  AS dealer_k
            , ISNULL(U.group_name, N'') AS grp_k
            , ISNULL(U.dept_nm, N'')    AS dept_k
            , ISNULL(U.active_yn, N'')  AS act_k
            , SUM(F.target_cnt)         AS mval
        FROM ktws.FCT_CRM_TARGET_M      F
        JOIN ktws.DIM_CALENDAR_KTWS     CAL ON F.monthly_dt = CAL.[Date]
        LEFT JOIN ktws.DIM_MNG_USER     U   ON F.sc_key     = U.sc_key
        LEFT JOIN ktws.DIM_MNG_DEALER   D   ON U.dealer_key = D.dealer_key
        JOIN ktws.DIM_CRM_ACT_TYPE      A   ON F.tp_key     = A.tp_key
        WHERE 1 = 1
            AND A.target_grp_nm = N'Main'
            AND A.tp_grp_1      = N'판매목표 대수'
            AND (@AsOfDate IS NULL OR CAL.[Date] <= @AsOfDate)
            AND (@Year IS NULL OR CAL.[Year] IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@Year, ',')))

            /* ---- 페이지 필터 (NULL-safe) ---- */
            AND (U.facade_sc_yn IS NULL OR U.facade_sc_yn NOT LIKE N'%' + @ExclFacadeScYn + N'%')
            AND (U.name IS NULL OR (U.name NOT LIKE N'%' + @ExclScName1 + N'%'
                                AND U.name NOT LIKE N'%' + @ExclScName2 + N'%'))
            AND (U.user_id IS NULL OR U.user_id NOT IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@ExclUserIds, ',')))

            /* ---- 슬라이서 필터 (NULL = 전체) ---- */
            AND (@Brand     IS NULL OR U.BRAND      IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@Brand, ',')))
            AND (@DealerNm  IS NULL OR D.dealer_nm  IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@DealerNm, ',')))
            AND (@GroupName IS NULL OR U.group_name IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@GroupName, ',')))
            AND (@DeptNm    IS NULL OR U.dept_nm    IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@DeptNm, ',')))
            AND (@ActiveYn  IS NULL OR U.active_yn  IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@ActiveYn, ',')))
        GROUP BY CAL.[Year], CAL.MonthAbbr
            , ISNULL(U.BRAND, N''), ISNULL(D.dealer_nm, N''), ISNULL(U.group_name, N'')
            , ISNULL(U.dept_nm, N''), ISNULL(U.active_yn, N'')
    )
    , TGTY AS (
        /* 목표 YTD 누적: 월앵커 × 차원조합 골격 위 누적 */
        SELECT
              MA.yr, MA.MonthAbbr
            , DM.brand_k, DM.dealer_k, DM.grp_k, DM.dept_k, DM.act_k
            , SUM(ISNULL(T.mval, 0)) OVER (
                  PARTITION BY MA.yr, DM.brand_k, DM.dealer_k, DM.grp_k, DM.dept_k, DM.act_k
                  ORDER BY MA.month_start
                  ROWS UNBOUNDED PRECEDING) AS tgt_ytd
        FROM MonthAnchor MA
        JOIN (SELECT DISTINCT yr, brand_k, dealer_k, grp_k, dept_k, act_k FROM TGTM) DM
            ON MA.yr = DM.yr
        LEFT JOIN TGTM T
            ON  T.yr = MA.yr AND T.MonthAbbr = MA.MonthAbbr
            AND T.brand_k = DM.brand_k AND T.dealer_k = DM.dealer_k
            AND T.grp_k = DM.grp_k AND T.dept_k = DM.dept_k AND T.act_k = DM.act_k
    )
    SELECT
          ISNULL(ACT.yr, TG.yr)               AS N'연도'
        , ISNULL(ACT.MonthAbbr, TG.MonthAbbr) AS MonthAbbr
        , ISNULL(ACT.brand_k, TG.brand_k)     AS N'브랜드'
        , ISNULL(ACT.dealer_k, TG.dealer_k)   AS N'딜러'
        , ISNULL(ACT.grp_k, TG.grp_k)         AS N'전시장'
        , ISNULL(ACT.dept_k, TG.dept_k)       AS N'팀'
        , ISNULL(ACT.act_k, TG.act_k)         AS N'재직여부'
        , ACT.model_nm                        AS N'모델'
        , ACT.variant_nm                      AS N'차종'
        , ACT.my_cd                           AS N'연식'
        , ACT.sfx_cd                          AS N'SFX'
        , ISNULL(TG.tgt_ytd, 0)               AS N'목표'
        , ISNULL(ACT.val, 0)                  AS N'실적'
        , CASE WHEN ISNULL(TG.tgt_ytd, 0) = 0 THEN 0
               ELSE CAST(ISNULL(ACT.val, 0) AS FLOAT) / TG.tgt_ytd
          END                                 AS N'달성률'
    FROM ACT
    FULL OUTER JOIN TGTY TG
        ON  ACT.yr = TG.yr AND ACT.MonthAbbr = TG.MonthAbbr
        AND ACT.brand_k = TG.brand_k AND ACT.dealer_k = TG.dealer_k
        AND ACT.grp_k = TG.grp_k AND ACT.dept_k = TG.dept_k AND ACT.act_k = TG.act_k
    ORDER BY 1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 6, 8, 9;
END
ELSE
BEGIN
    /* ---------- 분기 B: SC 열 포함 ('ALL' = 전체 SC) ---------- */
    ;WITH MonthAnchor AS (
        SELECT
              CAL.[Year]                                      AS yr
            , CAL.MonthAbbr
            , DATEFROMPARTS(CAL.[Year], 1, 1)                 AS year_start
            , MIN(CAL.[Date])                                 AS month_start
            , CASE WHEN @AsOfDate IS NOT NULL AND EOMONTH(MAX(CAL.[Date])) > @AsOfDate
                   THEN @AsOfDate
                   ELSE EOMONTH(MAX(CAL.[Date]))
              END                                             AS month_end
            , CASE WHEN @AsOfDate IS NOT NULL AND EOMONTH(MAX(CAL.[Date])) > @AsOfDate
                   THEN EOMONTH(@AsOfDate, -1)
                   ELSE EOMONTH(MAX(CAL.[Date]), -1)
              END                                             AS prev_month_end
        FROM ktws.DIM_CALENDAR_KTWS CAL
        WHERE (@Year IS NULL OR CAL.[Year] IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@Year, ',')))
          AND (@AsOfDate IS NULL OR CAL.[Date] <= @AsOfDate OR MONTH(CAL.[Date]) = MONTH(@AsOfDate))
        GROUP BY CAL.[Year], CAL.MonthAbbr
    )
    , ACT AS (
        SELECT
              A.yr, A.MonthAbbr
            , ISNULL(U.BRAND, N'')      AS brand_k
            , ISNULL(D.dealer_nm, N'')  AS dealer_k
            , ISNULL(U.group_name, N'') AS grp_k
            , ISNULL(U.dept_nm, N'')    AS dept_k
            , ISNULL(U.active_yn, N'')  AS act_k
            , ISNULL(U.name, N'')       AS sc_k
            , M.model_nm, V.variant_nm, S.my_cd, S.sfx_cd
            , COUNT(DISTINCT F.dlr_contract_no) AS val
        FROM MonthAnchor A
        JOIN ktws.FCT_CONTRACT_KTWS        F   ON F.last_retail_sales_dt >= A.year_start
                                              AND F.last_retail_sales_dt <= A.month_end
        LEFT JOIN ktws.DIM_MNG_USER        U   ON F.cn_sc_key    = U.sc_key
        LEFT JOIN ktws.DIM_MNG_DEALER      D   ON U.dealer_key   = D.dealer_key
        LEFT JOIN ktws.DIM_VEHIC_SPEC      S   ON F.cn_vehic_key = S.spec_key
        LEFT JOIN ktws.DIM_VEHIC_SPEC_VAR  V   ON S.var_key      = V.var_key
        LEFT JOIN ktws.DIM_VEHIC_SPEC_MDL  M   ON V.model_key    = M.mdl_key
        WHERE 1 = 1
            AND (F.cancel_dt IS NULL OR F.cancel_dt > A.prev_month_end)

            /* ---- 페이지 필터 (NULL-safe) ---- */
            AND (U.facade_sc_yn IS NULL OR U.facade_sc_yn NOT LIKE N'%' + @ExclFacadeScYn + N'%')
            AND (U.name IS NULL OR (U.name NOT LIKE N'%' + @ExclScName1 + N'%'
                                AND U.name NOT LIKE N'%' + @ExclScName2 + N'%'))
            AND (U.user_id IS NULL OR U.user_id NOT IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@ExclUserIds, ',')))

            /* ---- SC 필터 ('ALL' = 전체) ---- */
            AND (@ScName = N'ALL' OR U.name IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@ScName, ',')))

            /* ---- 슬라이서 필터 (NULL = 전체) ---- */
            AND (@Brand     IS NULL OR U.BRAND      IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@Brand, ',')))
            AND (@DealerNm  IS NULL OR D.dealer_nm  IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@DealerNm, ',')))
            AND (@GroupName IS NULL OR U.group_name IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@GroupName, ',')))
            AND (@DeptNm    IS NULL OR U.dept_nm    IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@DeptNm, ',')))
            AND (@ActiveYn  IS NULL OR U.active_yn  IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@ActiveYn, ',')))
            AND (@ModelNm   IS NULL OR M.model_nm   IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@ModelNm, ',')))
            AND (@VariantNm IS NULL OR V.variant_nm IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@VariantNm, ',')))
            AND (@MyCd      IS NULL OR S.my_cd      IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@MyCd, ',')))
            AND (@SfxCd     IS NULL OR S.sfx_cd     IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@SfxCd, ',')))
        GROUP BY A.yr, A.MonthAbbr
            , ISNULL(U.BRAND, N''), ISNULL(D.dealer_nm, N''), ISNULL(U.group_name, N'')
            , ISNULL(U.dept_nm, N''), ISNULL(U.active_yn, N''), ISNULL(U.name, N'')
            , M.model_nm, V.variant_nm, S.my_cd, S.sfx_cd
    )
    , TGTM AS (
        SELECT
              CAL.[Year]                AS yr
            , CAL.MonthAbbr
            , ISNULL(U.BRAND, N'')      AS brand_k
            , ISNULL(D.dealer_nm, N'')  AS dealer_k
            , ISNULL(U.group_name, N'') AS grp_k
            , ISNULL(U.dept_nm, N'')    AS dept_k
            , ISNULL(U.active_yn, N'')  AS act_k
            , ISNULL(U.name, N'')       AS sc_k
            , SUM(F.target_cnt)         AS mval
        FROM ktws.FCT_CRM_TARGET_M      F
        JOIN ktws.DIM_CALENDAR_KTWS     CAL ON F.monthly_dt = CAL.[Date]
        LEFT JOIN ktws.DIM_MNG_USER     U   ON F.sc_key     = U.sc_key
        LEFT JOIN ktws.DIM_MNG_DEALER   D   ON U.dealer_key = D.dealer_key
        JOIN ktws.DIM_CRM_ACT_TYPE      A   ON F.tp_key     = A.tp_key
        WHERE 1 = 1
            AND A.target_grp_nm = N'Main'
            AND A.tp_grp_1      = N'판매목표 대수'
            AND (@AsOfDate IS NULL OR CAL.[Date] <= @AsOfDate)
            AND (@Year IS NULL OR CAL.[Year] IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@Year, ',')))

            /* ---- 페이지 필터 (NULL-safe) ---- */
            AND (U.facade_sc_yn IS NULL OR U.facade_sc_yn NOT LIKE N'%' + @ExclFacadeScYn + N'%')
            AND (U.name IS NULL OR (U.name NOT LIKE N'%' + @ExclScName1 + N'%'
                                AND U.name NOT LIKE N'%' + @ExclScName2 + N'%'))
            AND (U.user_id IS NULL OR U.user_id NOT IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@ExclUserIds, ',')))

            /* ---- SC 필터 ('ALL' = 전체) ---- */
            AND (@ScName = N'ALL' OR U.name IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@ScName, ',')))

            /* ---- 슬라이서 필터 (NULL = 전체) ---- */
            AND (@Brand     IS NULL OR U.BRAND      IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@Brand, ',')))
            AND (@DealerNm  IS NULL OR D.dealer_nm  IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@DealerNm, ',')))
            AND (@GroupName IS NULL OR U.group_name IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@GroupName, ',')))
            AND (@DeptNm    IS NULL OR U.dept_nm    IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@DeptNm, ',')))
            AND (@ActiveYn  IS NULL OR U.active_yn  IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@ActiveYn, ',')))
        GROUP BY CAL.[Year], CAL.MonthAbbr
            , ISNULL(U.BRAND, N''), ISNULL(D.dealer_nm, N''), ISNULL(U.group_name, N'')
            , ISNULL(U.dept_nm, N''), ISNULL(U.active_yn, N''), ISNULL(U.name, N'')
    )
    , TGTY AS (
        SELECT
              MA.yr, MA.MonthAbbr
            , DM.brand_k, DM.dealer_k, DM.grp_k, DM.dept_k, DM.act_k, DM.sc_k
            , SUM(ISNULL(T.mval, 0)) OVER (
                  PARTITION BY MA.yr, DM.brand_k, DM.dealer_k, DM.grp_k, DM.dept_k, DM.act_k, DM.sc_k
                  ORDER BY MA.month_start
                  ROWS UNBOUNDED PRECEDING) AS tgt_ytd
        FROM MonthAnchor MA
        JOIN (SELECT DISTINCT yr, brand_k, dealer_k, grp_k, dept_k, act_k, sc_k FROM TGTM) DM
            ON MA.yr = DM.yr
        LEFT JOIN TGTM T
            ON  T.yr = MA.yr AND T.MonthAbbr = MA.MonthAbbr
            AND T.brand_k = DM.brand_k AND T.dealer_k = DM.dealer_k
            AND T.grp_k = DM.grp_k AND T.dept_k = DM.dept_k
            AND T.act_k = DM.act_k AND T.sc_k = DM.sc_k
    )
    SELECT
          ISNULL(ACT.yr, TG.yr)               AS N'연도'
        , ISNULL(ACT.MonthAbbr, TG.MonthAbbr) AS MonthAbbr
        , ISNULL(ACT.brand_k, TG.brand_k)     AS N'브랜드'
        , ISNULL(ACT.dealer_k, TG.dealer_k)   AS N'딜러'
        , ISNULL(ACT.grp_k, TG.grp_k)         AS N'전시장'
        , ISNULL(ACT.dept_k, TG.dept_k)       AS N'팀'
        , ISNULL(ACT.act_k, TG.act_k)         AS N'재직여부'
        , ISNULL(ACT.sc_k, TG.sc_k)           AS N'SC'
        , ACT.model_nm                        AS N'모델'
        , ACT.variant_nm                      AS N'차종'
        , ACT.my_cd                           AS N'연식'
        , ACT.sfx_cd                          AS N'SFX'
        , ISNULL(TG.tgt_ytd, 0)               AS N'목표'
        , ISNULL(ACT.val, 0)                  AS N'실적'
        , CASE WHEN ISNULL(TG.tgt_ytd, 0) = 0 THEN 0
               ELSE CAST(ISNULL(ACT.val, 0) AS FLOAT) / TG.tgt_ytd
          END                                 AS N'달성률'
    FROM ACT
    FULL OUTER JOIN TGTY TG
        ON  ACT.yr = TG.yr AND ACT.MonthAbbr = TG.MonthAbbr
        AND ACT.brand_k = TG.brand_k AND ACT.dealer_k = TG.dealer_k
        AND ACT.grp_k = TG.grp_k AND ACT.dept_k = TG.dept_k
        AND ACT.act_k = TG.act_k AND ACT.sc_k = TG.sc_k
    ORDER BY 1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 6, 7, 8, 9;
END

/* ============================================
   1. 슬라이서 변수 (NULL = 전체 선택, 다중 값은 콤마 구분, N'...' 사용)
      ※ @ScName: NULL → SC 열 미표시 / 'ALL' → 표시+전체 / 값 → 표시+해당 SC
   ============================================ */
DECLARE @Year        NVARCHAR(200) = NULL;  -- ktws DIM_CALENDAR_KTWS[Year]
DECLARE @Brand       NVARCHAR(200) = NULL;  -- ktws DIM_MNG_USER[BRAND]
DECLARE @DealerNm    NVARCHAR(500) = NULL;  -- ktws DIM_MNG_DEALER[dealer_nm]
DECLARE @GroupName   NVARCHAR(500) = NULL;  -- ktws DIM_MNG_USER[group_name]
DECLARE @DeptNm      NVARCHAR(500) = NULL;  -- ktws DIM_MNG_USER[dept_nm]
DECLARE @ActiveYn    NVARCHAR(50)  = NULL;  -- ktws DIM_MNG_USER[active_yn]
DECLARE @ScName      NVARCHAR(500) = NULL;  -- ktws DIM_MNG_USER[name]  ※ NULL/'ALL'/값
DECLARE @ModelNm     NVARCHAR(500) = NULL;  -- ktws DIM_VEHIC_SPEC_MDL[model_nm]
DECLARE @VariantNm   NVARCHAR(500) = NULL;  -- ktws DIM_VEHIC_SPEC_VAR[variant_nm]
DECLARE @MyCd        NVARCHAR(200) = NULL;  -- ktws DIM_VEHIC_SPEC[my_cd]
DECLARE @SfxCd       NVARCHAR(200) = NULL;  -- ktws DIM_VEHIC_SPEC[sfx_cd]

/* ============================================
   2. 페이지 필터 변수
   ============================================ */
DECLARE @ExclFacadeScYn NVARCHAR(50)  = N'창구SC';
DECLARE @ExclScName1    NVARCHAR(50)  = N'고객지원팀';
DECLARE @ExclScName2    NVARCHAR(50)  = N'TOYOTA YM';
DECLARE @ExclUserIds    NVARCHAR(500) = N'DM5103,DM9999,JB30007,JB30016,KMKS176,KMKS999,JB30067';

/* ============================================
   3. 기준일 (NULL 이면 전체)
   ============================================ */
DECLARE @AsOfDate DATE = NULL;   -- 예: CAST(GETDATE() AS DATE)

/* ============================================
   계약 상세 목록 (연간 = cntrct_ytd 기준)
   연도 | 브랜드 | 딜러 | 전시장 | 팀 | 재직여부 | (SC) | 차종 | 연식
   | 계약번호 | 고객명 | 계약일자 | 출고일자 | 리드타임(일)
   | Model | SFX | 재구매 여부 | 자사금융 여부 | 지불유형 여부 | cntrct_flag
   ============================================ */
IF @ScName IS NULL
BEGIN
    /* ---------- 분기 A: SC 열 없음 ---------- */
    SELECT
          CAL.[Year]               AS N'연도'
        , U.BRAND                  AS N'브랜드'
        , D.dealer_nm              AS N'딜러'
        , U.group_name             AS N'전시장'
        , U.dept_nm                AS N'팀'
        , U.active_yn              AS N'재직여부'
        , V.variant_nm             AS N'차종'
        , S.my_cd                  AS N'연식'
        , F.dlr_contract_no        AS N'계약번호'
        , F.cust_nm                AS N'고객명'
        , F.contract_dt            AS N'계약일자'
        , F.last_retail_sales_dt   AS N'출고일자'
        , F.lead_time              AS N'리드타임(일)'
        , S.model_nm               AS N'Model'
        , S.sfx_cd                 AS N'SFX'
        , R.repurc_grp1            AS N'재구매 여부'
        , F.own_pay_flag           AS N'자사금융 여부'
        , F.pay_type               AS N'지불유형 여부'
        , SUM(F.cnt)               AS [cntrct_flag]
    FROM ktws.FCT_CONTRACT_KTWS        F
    JOIN ktws.DIM_CALENDAR_KTWS        CAL ON F.contract_dt    = CAL.[Date]
    LEFT JOIN ktws.DIM_MNG_USER        U   ON F.cn_sc_key      = U.sc_key
    LEFT JOIN ktws.DIM_MNG_DEALER      D   ON U.dealer_key     = D.dealer_key
    LEFT JOIN ktws.DIM_VEHIC_SPEC      S   ON F.cn_vehic_key   = S.spec_key
    LEFT JOIN ktws.DIM_VEHIC_SPEC_VAR  V   ON S.var_key        = V.var_key
    LEFT JOIN ktws.DIM_VEHIC_SPEC_MDL  M   ON V.model_key      = M.mdl_key
    LEFT JOIN ktws.DIM_REPURC_SALES_TYPE R ON F.sales_tp_key   = R.sales_tp_key
    WHERE 1 = 1
        AND (@AsOfDate IS NULL OR CAL.[Date] <= @AsOfDate)

        /* ---- 페이지 필터 (DIM_MNG_USER, NULL-safe) ---- */
        AND (U.facade_sc_yn IS NULL OR U.facade_sc_yn NOT LIKE N'%' + @ExclFacadeScYn + N'%')
        AND (U.name IS NULL OR (U.name NOT LIKE N'%' + @ExclScName1 + N'%'
                            AND U.name NOT LIKE N'%' + @ExclScName2 + N'%'))
        AND (U.user_id IS NULL OR U.user_id NOT IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@ExclUserIds, ',')))

        /* ---- 슬라이서 필터 (NULL = 전체) ---- */
        AND (@Year      IS NULL OR CAL.[Year]   IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@Year, ',')))
        AND (@Brand     IS NULL OR U.BRAND      IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@Brand, ',')))
        AND (@DealerNm  IS NULL OR D.dealer_nm  IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@DealerNm, ',')))
        AND (@GroupName IS NULL OR U.group_name IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@GroupName, ',')))
        AND (@DeptNm    IS NULL OR U.dept_nm    IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@DeptNm, ',')))
        AND (@ActiveYn  IS NULL OR U.active_yn  IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@ActiveYn, ',')))
        AND (@ModelNm   IS NULL OR M.model_nm   IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@ModelNm, ',')))
        AND (@VariantNm IS NULL OR V.variant_nm IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@VariantNm, ',')))
        AND (@MyCd      IS NULL OR S.my_cd      IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@MyCd, ',')))
        AND (@SfxCd     IS NULL OR S.sfx_cd     IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@SfxCd, ',')))
    GROUP BY
          CAL.[Year]
        , U.BRAND, D.dealer_nm, U.group_name, U.dept_nm, U.active_yn
        , V.variant_nm, S.my_cd
        , F.dlr_contract_no, F.cust_nm, F.contract_dt, F.last_retail_sales_dt, F.lead_time
        , S.model_nm, S.sfx_cd, R.repurc_grp1, F.own_pay_flag, F.pay_type
    ORDER BY
          CAL.[Year]
        , F.dlr_contract_no;
END
ELSE
BEGIN
    /* ---------- 분기 B: SC 열 포함 ('ALL' = 전체 SC) ---------- */
    SELECT
          CAL.[Year]               AS N'연도'
        , U.BRAND                  AS N'브랜드'
        , D.dealer_nm              AS N'딜러'
        , U.group_name             AS N'전시장'
        , U.dept_nm                AS N'팀'
        , U.active_yn              AS N'재직여부'
        , U.name                   AS N'SC'
        , V.variant_nm             AS N'차종'
        , S.my_cd                  AS N'연식'
        , F.dlr_contract_no        AS N'계약번호'
        , F.cust_nm                AS N'고객명'
        , F.contract_dt            AS N'계약일자'
        , F.last_retail_sales_dt   AS N'출고일자'
        , F.lead_time              AS N'리드타임(일)'
        , S.model_nm               AS N'Model'
        , S.sfx_cd                 AS N'SFX'
        , R.repurc_grp1            AS N'재구매 여부'
        , F.own_pay_flag           AS N'자사금융 여부'
        , F.pay_type               AS N'지불유형 여부'
        , SUM(F.cnt)               AS [cntrct_flag]
    FROM ktws.FCT_CONTRACT_KTWS        F
    JOIN ktws.DIM_CALENDAR_KTWS        CAL ON F.contract_dt    = CAL.[Date]
    LEFT JOIN ktws.DIM_MNG_USER        U   ON F.cn_sc_key      = U.sc_key
    LEFT JOIN ktws.DIM_MNG_DEALER      D   ON U.dealer_key     = D.dealer_key
    LEFT JOIN ktws.DIM_VEHIC_SPEC      S   ON F.cn_vehic_key   = S.spec_key
    LEFT JOIN ktws.DIM_VEHIC_SPEC_VAR  V   ON S.var_key        = V.var_key
    LEFT JOIN ktws.DIM_VEHIC_SPEC_MDL  M   ON V.model_key      = M.mdl_key
    LEFT JOIN ktws.DIM_REPURC_SALES_TYPE R ON F.sales_tp_key   = R.sales_tp_key
    WHERE 1 = 1
        AND (@AsOfDate IS NULL OR CAL.[Date] <= @AsOfDate)

        /* ---- 페이지 필터 (DIM_MNG_USER, NULL-safe) ---- */
        AND (U.facade_sc_yn IS NULL OR U.facade_sc_yn NOT LIKE N'%' + @ExclFacadeScYn + N'%')
        AND (U.name IS NULL OR (U.name NOT LIKE N'%' + @ExclScName1 + N'%'
                            AND U.name NOT LIKE N'%' + @ExclScName2 + N'%'))
        AND (U.user_id IS NULL OR U.user_id NOT IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@ExclUserIds, ',')))

        /* ---- SC 필터 ('ALL' = 전체) ---- */
        AND (@ScName = N'ALL' OR U.name IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@ScName, ',')))

        /* ---- 슬라이서 필터 (NULL = 전체) ---- */
        AND (@Year      IS NULL OR CAL.[Year]   IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@Year, ',')))
        AND (@Brand     IS NULL OR U.BRAND      IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@Brand, ',')))
        AND (@DealerNm  IS NULL OR D.dealer_nm  IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@DealerNm, ',')))
        AND (@GroupName IS NULL OR U.group_name IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@GroupName, ',')))
        AND (@DeptNm    IS NULL OR U.dept_nm    IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@DeptNm, ',')))
        AND (@ActiveYn  IS NULL OR U.active_yn  IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@ActiveYn, ',')))
        AND (@ModelNm   IS NULL OR M.model_nm   IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@ModelNm, ',')))
        AND (@VariantNm IS NULL OR V.variant_nm IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@VariantNm, ',')))
        AND (@MyCd      IS NULL OR S.my_cd      IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@MyCd, ',')))
        AND (@SfxCd     IS NULL OR S.sfx_cd     IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@SfxCd, ',')))
    GROUP BY
          CAL.[Year]
        , U.BRAND, D.dealer_nm, U.group_name, U.dept_nm, U.active_yn, U.name
        , V.variant_nm, S.my_cd
        , F.dlr_contract_no, F.cust_nm, F.contract_dt, F.last_retail_sales_dt, F.lead_time
        , S.model_nm, S.sfx_cd, R.repurc_grp1, F.own_pay_flag, F.pay_type
    ORDER BY
          CAL.[Year]
        , F.contract_dt ;
END

/* ============================================
   1. 슬라이서 변수 (NULL = 전체 선택, 다중 값은 콤마 구분, N'...' 사용)
      ※ @ScName: NULL → SC 열 미표시 / 'ALL' → 표시+전체 / 값 → 표시+해당 SC
   ============================================ */
DECLARE @Year        NVARCHAR(200) = NULL;  -- ktws DIM_CALENDAR_KTWS[Year]
DECLARE @Brand       NVARCHAR(200) = NULL;  -- ktws DIM_MNG_USER[BRAND]
DECLARE @DealerNm    NVARCHAR(500) = NULL;  -- ktws DIM_MNG_DEALER[dealer_nm]
DECLARE @GroupName   NVARCHAR(500) = NULL;  -- ktws DIM_MNG_USER[group_name]
DECLARE @DeptNm      NVARCHAR(500) = NULL;  -- ktws DIM_MNG_USER[dept_nm]
DECLARE @ActiveYn    NVARCHAR(50)  = NULL;  -- ktws DIM_MNG_USER[active_yn]
DECLARE @ScName      NVARCHAR(500) = NULL;  -- ktws DIM_MNG_USER[name]  ※ NULL/'ALL'/값
DECLARE @ModelNm     NVARCHAR(500) = NULL;  -- ktws DIM_VEHIC_SPEC_MDL[model_nm]
DECLARE @VariantNm   NVARCHAR(500) = NULL;  -- ktws DIM_VEHIC_SPEC_VAR[variant_nm]
DECLARE @MyCd        NVARCHAR(200) = NULL;  -- ktws DIM_VEHIC_SPEC[my_cd]
DECLARE @SfxCd       NVARCHAR(200) = NULL;  -- ktws DIM_VEHIC_SPEC[sfx_cd]

/* ============================================
   2. 페이지 필터 변수
   ============================================ */
DECLARE @ExclFacadeScYn NVARCHAR(50)  = N'창구SC';
DECLARE @ExclScName1    NVARCHAR(50)  = N'고객지원팀';
DECLARE @ExclScName2    NVARCHAR(50)  = N'TOYOTA YM';
DECLARE @ExclUserIds    NVARCHAR(500) = N'DM5103,DM9999,JB30007,JB30016,KMKS176,KMKS999,JB30067';

/* ============================================
   3. 기준일 (NULL 이면 달력/슬라이서 범위의 마지막 날짜)
   ============================================ */
DECLARE @AsOfDate DATE = NULL;   -- 예: CAST(GETDATE() AS DATE)

/* ============================================
   판매 상세 목록 (연간 = sales_ytd 기준)
   연도 | 브랜드 | 딜러 | 전시장 | 팀 | 재직여부 | (SC) | 차종 | 연식
   | 계약번호 | 고객명 | 계약일자 | 출고일자 | 리드타임(일)
   | Model | SFX | 재구매 여부 | 자사금융 여부 | 지불유형 | sales_flag
   ============================================ */
IF @ScName IS NULL
BEGIN
    /* ---------- 분기 A: SC 열 없음 ---------- */
    ;WITH YearAnchor AS (
        SELECT
              CAL.[Year]                                        AS yr
            , DATEFROMPARTS(CAL.[Year], 1, 1)                   AS year_start
            , CASE WHEN @AsOfDate IS NOT NULL AND MAX(CAL.[Date]) > @AsOfDate
                   THEN @AsOfDate
                   ELSE MAX(CAL.[Date])
              END                                               AS period_end
            , CASE WHEN @AsOfDate IS NOT NULL AND MAX(CAL.[Date]) > @AsOfDate
                   THEN EOMONTH(@AsOfDate, -1)
                   ELSE EOMONTH(MAX(CAL.[Date]), -1)
              END                                               AS prev_month_end
        FROM ktws.DIM_CALENDAR_KTWS CAL
        WHERE (@Year IS NULL OR CAL.[Year] IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@Year, ',')))
        GROUP BY CAL.[Year]
    )
    SELECT
          CAL.[Year]               AS N'연도'
        , U.BRAND                  AS N'브랜드'
        , D.dealer_nm              AS N'딜러'
        , U.group_name             AS N'전시장'
        , U.dept_nm                AS N'팀'
        , U.active_yn              AS N'재직여부'
        , V.variant_nm             AS N'차종'
        , S.my_cd                  AS N'연식'
        , F.dlr_contract_no        AS N'계약번호'
        , F.cust_nm                AS N'고객명'
        , F.contract_dt            AS N'계약일자'
        , F.last_retail_sales_dt   AS N'출고일자'
        , F.lead_time              AS N'리드타임(일)'
        , S.model_nm               AS N'Model'
        , S.sfx_cd                 AS N'SFX'
        , R.repurc_grp1            AS N'재구매 여부'
        , F.own_pay_flag           AS N'자사금융 여부'
        , F.pay_type               AS N'지불유형'
        , 1                        AS [sales_flag]   -- 계약 단위 DISTINCTCOUNT = 1
    FROM ktws.FCT_CONTRACT_KTWS        F
    JOIN ktws.DIM_CALENDAR_KTWS        CAL ON F.last_retail_sales_dt = CAL.[Date]
    JOIN YearAnchor                    A   ON CAL.[Year]       = A.yr
    LEFT JOIN ktws.DIM_MNG_USER        U   ON F.cn_sc_key      = U.sc_key
    LEFT JOIN ktws.DIM_MNG_DEALER      D   ON U.dealer_key     = D.dealer_key
    LEFT JOIN ktws.DIM_VEHIC_SPEC      S   ON F.cn_vehic_key   = S.spec_key
    LEFT JOIN ktws.DIM_VEHIC_SPEC_VAR  V   ON S.var_key        = V.var_key
    LEFT JOIN ktws.DIM_VEHIC_SPEC_MDL  M   ON V.model_key      = M.mdl_key
    LEFT JOIN ktws.DIM_REPURC_SALES_TYPE R ON F.sales_tp_key   = R.sales_tp_key
    WHERE 1 = 1
        /* ---- 출고일 YTD 범위: 연초 ~ 기준시점 ---- */
        AND F.last_retail_sales_dt >= A.year_start
        AND F.last_retail_sales_dt <= A.period_end

        /* ---- 기준시점 전월말 이후 취소 또는 미취소 ---- */
        AND (F.cancel_dt IS NULL OR F.cancel_dt > A.prev_month_end)

        /* ---- 페이지 필터 (DIM_MNG_USER, NULL-safe) ---- */
        AND (U.facade_sc_yn IS NULL OR U.facade_sc_yn NOT LIKE N'%' + @ExclFacadeScYn + N'%')
        AND (U.name IS NULL OR (U.name NOT LIKE N'%' + @ExclScName1 + N'%'
                            AND U.name NOT LIKE N'%' + @ExclScName2 + N'%'))
        AND (U.user_id IS NULL OR U.user_id NOT IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@ExclUserIds, ',')))

        /* ---- 슬라이서 필터 (NULL = 전체) ---- */
        AND (@Brand     IS NULL OR U.BRAND      IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@Brand, ',')))
        AND (@DealerNm  IS NULL OR D.dealer_nm  IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@DealerNm, ',')))
        AND (@GroupName IS NULL OR U.group_name IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@GroupName, ',')))
        AND (@DeptNm    IS NULL OR U.dept_nm    IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@DeptNm, ',')))
        AND (@ActiveYn  IS NULL OR U.active_yn  IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@ActiveYn, ',')))
        AND (@ModelNm   IS NULL OR M.model_nm   IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@ModelNm, ',')))
