  AND (@close_yn    IS NULL OR EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM STRING_SPLIT(@close_yn,   N',') x WHERE LTRIM(RTRIM(x.value)) = l.close_yn))
  AND (@potential   IS NULL OR EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM STRING_SPLIT(@potential,  N',') x WHERE LTRIM(RTRIM(x.value)) = l.potential))
  AND (@contract_yn IS NULL OR EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM STRING_SPLIT(@contract_yn,N',') x WHERE LTRIM(RTRIM(x.value)) = l.contract_yn))
  AND (@retail_yn   IS NULL OR EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM STRING_SPLIT(@retail_yn,  N',') x WHERE LTRIM(RTRIM(x.value)) = l.last_retail_sales_yn))
  -- SC 계열 슬라이서 (DIM_MNG_USER 조인, 콤마 다중 가능)
  AND (@brand      IS NULL OR EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM STRING_SPLIT(@brand,     N',') x WHERE LTRIM(RTRIM(x.value)) = u.BRAND))
  AND (@dealer_nm  IS NULL OR EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM STRING_SPLIT(@dealer_nm, N',') x WHERE LTRIM(RTRIM(x.value)) = u.dealer_nm))
  AND (@group_name IS NULL OR EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM STRING_SPLIT(@group_name,N',') x WHERE LTRIM(RTRIM(x.value)) = u.group_name))
  AND (@dept_nm    IS NULL OR EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM STRING_SPLIT(@dept_nm,   N',') x WHERE LTRIM(RTRIM(x.value)) = u.dept_nm))
  AND (@active_yn  IS NULL OR EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM STRING_SPLIT(@active_yn, N',') x WHERE LTRIM(RTRIM(x.value)) = u.active_yn))
  AND (@sc_name    IS NULL OR EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM STRING_SPLIT(@sc_name,   N',') x WHERE LTRIM(RTRIM(x.value)) = u.name))
  -- 제외 규칙
  AND (@exclude_facade IS NULL OR u.facade_sc_yn <> @exclude_facade OR u.facade_sc_yn IS NULL)
  AND (@exclude_dept   IS NULL
       OR NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM STRING_SPLIT(@exclude_dept,',') s
                      WHERE LTRIM(RTRIM(s.value)) = u.dept_nm))
  AND (@exclude_users  IS NULL
       OR NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM STRING_SPLIT(@exclude_users,',') s
                      WHERE LTRIM(RTRIM(s.value)) = u.user_id))
ORDER BY l.lead_reg_dt DESC,
         u.name COLLATE Korean_Wansung_CI_AS,
         l.cust_nm COLLATE Korean_Wansung_CI_AS;

/* ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
   [HOT 보드 회의] 미팅 상세 테이블 — 최종본 (슬라이서 전체 변수화 / 다중값)
   ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
   조인 : mng_sc_key→DIM_MNG_USER.sc_key(SC/팀/딜러/전시장/재직)
          int_var_key→DIM_VEHIC_SPEC_VAR.var_key(관심차종)
   기간 : meet_dt 연/월 (연도·월 탭),  회차=meet_ym_seq
   슬라이서(NULL=모두, 콤마로 여러 값 지정 가능) : 브랜드/딜러·전시장·팀·SC·재직/관심차종
       한 값 @sc_name=N'정지훈' / 여러 값 @sc_name=N'정지훈,김영범' / 전체 NULL
   제외 : facade_sc_yn='창구SC', dept_nm∈(고객지원팀,TOYOTA YM), user_id 목록
   ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ */

/* ── 기간·회차 ── */
DECLARE @base_year   INT = 2026;             -- 연도 탭: 연도 4자리 예)2026 (NULL 미사용, 필수)
DECLARE @base_month  INT = 1;                -- 월 탭: 1~12 / NULL(연 전체)
DECLARE @meet_round  INT = 1;                -- 회차(meet_ym_seq): 1,2,3... / NULL(전체 회차)

/* ── 슬라이서 (NULL=모두, 콤마로 여러 값 지정 가능) ── */
DECLARE @brand      NVARCHAR(MAX) = NULL;    -- 브랜드: N'LEXUS' / N'LEXUS,TOYOTA' / NULL(모두)
DECLARE @dealer_nm  NVARCHAR(MAX) = NULL;    -- 딜러: 딜러명 / 콤마 다중 / NULL(모두)
DECLARE @group_name NVARCHAR(MAX) = NULL;    -- 전시장(group_name): 전시장명 / 콤마 다중 / NULL(모두)
DECLARE @dept_nm    NVARCHAR(MAX) = NULL;    -- 팀(dept_nm): 예)N'영업1팀,영업2팀' / NULL(모두)
DECLARE @sc_name    NVARCHAR(MAX) = NULL;    -- SC명: 예)N'정지훈,김영범' / NULL(모두)
DECLARE @active_yn  NVARCHAR(MAX) = N'재직'; -- 재직여부: N'재직' / N'퇴직' / N'재직,퇴직' / NULL(모두)
DECLARE @variant_nm NVARCHAR(MAX) = NULL;    -- 관심차종(variant_nm): 예)N'ES300h(N),NX350h' / NULL(모두)

/* ── 제외 규칙 (고정) ── */
DECLARE @exclude_facade NVARCHAR(50)  = N'창구SC';                -- 창구SC 제외 (일반SC만 남김)
DECLARE @exclude_dept   NVARCHAR(MAX) = N'고객지원팀,TOYOTA YM';  -- 제외 팀(콤마 구분)
DECLARE @exclude_users  NVARCHAR(MAX) = N'DM5103,DM9999,JB30007,JB30016,KMKS176,KMKS999,JB30067';  -- 제외 user_id(콤마 구분)

SELECT
    h.meet_ym_seq      AS [회차],
    h.meet_dt          AS [미팅일자],
    h.chip_status_nm   AS [상태],
    u.dept_nm          AS [팀],
    u.name             AS [SC],
    h.contact_nm       AS [상담자],
    h.hold_type_nm     AS [확보유형],
    v.variant_nm       AS [관심차종],
    h.hot_reg_dt       AS [HOT 등록일],
    h.hboard_reg_dt    AS [BOARD 등록일],
    h.next_plant_dt    AS [다음 활동 예정일],
    h.contract_ratio   AS [금주 계약 가능성],
    h.remark           AS [메모(회의 등록)],
    h.comp_model_nm    AS [경쟁차종],
    h.own_model_nm     AS [현재 보유차종],
    h.own_model_pdt    AS [현재 보유차종(상세)],
    h.pay_type_nm      AS [지불 유형]
FROM   ktws.FCT_HBOARD_MEETING h
LEFT JOIN ktws.DIM_MNG_USER       u ON u.sc_key  = h.mng_sc_key
LEFT JOIN ktws.DIM_VEHIC_SPEC_VAR v ON v.var_key = h.int_var_key
WHERE  YEAR(h.meet_dt)  = @base_year
  AND (@base_month IS NULL OR MONTH(h.meet_dt) = @base_month)
  AND (@meet_round IS NULL OR h.meet_ym_seq = @meet_round)
  -- 브랜드 (팩트 직접)
  AND (@brand      IS NULL OR EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM STRING_SPLIT(@brand,     N',') x WHERE LTRIM(RTRIM(x.value)) = h.BRAND))
  -- SC 계열 슬라이서 (DIM_MNG_USER 조인)
  AND (@active_yn  IS NULL OR EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM STRING_SPLIT(@active_yn, N',') x WHERE LTRIM(RTRIM(x.value)) = u.active_yn))
  AND (@dealer_nm  IS NULL OR EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM STRING_SPLIT(@dealer_nm, N',') x WHERE LTRIM(RTRIM(x.value)) = u.dealer_nm))
  AND (@group_name IS NULL OR EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM STRING_SPLIT(@group_name,N',') x WHERE LTRIM(RTRIM(x.value)) = u.group_name))
  AND (@dept_nm    IS NULL OR EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM STRING_SPLIT(@dept_nm,   N',') x WHERE LTRIM(RTRIM(x.value)) = u.dept_nm))
  AND (@sc_name    IS NULL OR EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM STRING_SPLIT(@sc_name,   N',') x WHERE LTRIM(RTRIM(x.value)) = u.name))
  -- 관심차종
  AND (@variant_nm IS NULL OR EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM STRING_SPLIT(@variant_nm,N',') x WHERE LTRIM(RTRIM(x.value)) = v.variant_nm))
  -- 제외 규칙
  AND (@exclude_facade IS NULL OR u.facade_sc_yn <> @exclude_facade OR u.facade_sc_yn IS NULL)
  AND (@exclude_dept   IS NULL
       OR NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM STRING_SPLIT(@exclude_dept,',') s
                      WHERE LTRIM(RTRIM(s.value)) = u.dept_nm))
  AND (@exclude_users  IS NULL
       OR NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM STRING_SPLIT(@exclude_users,',') s
                      WHERE LTRIM(RTRIM(s.value)) = u.user_id))
ORDER BY h.meet_dt DESC, h.contact_nm;

/* ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
   [SC 실적 매트릭스]  PowerBI 행렬 재현 + 계층(브랜드>딜러>전시장>팀>SC) 컬럼
   ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
   ■ 이번 추가 : 상세행 앞에 [브랜드][딜러][전시장][팀] 컬럼 + SC브랜드 슬라이서(@sc_brand)
       · 총계행은 종전대로 전체 합계 1줄 (계층 컬럼은 공란)
       · 정렬도 계층 순(브랜드>딜러>전시장>팀>SC)으로 변경
   ■ ★주의 : 기존 @brand 는 '차량 브랜드'(DIM_VEHIC_SPEC.BRAND) 필터임.
       SC 계층 브랜드는 이름 충돌을 피해 @sc_brand 로 별도 신설했음.

   ■ 그룹규칙 : ktws.FCT_SC_GROUP_RULE (딜러키+지표+등급 → RANGE, 스칼라 조회)
   ■ 기준월 (@base_month) : @ref_date=전월말(취소율), @ref_date_avg=당월말(월평균/YTD)
   ■ 지표 : ①취소율=취소건/전체건  ②월평균=6개월 각 달 DISTINCTCOUNT 평균(실적달만)
            ③연누적/PMA=YTD DISTINCTCOUNT (pma_yn<>'N'=IN, ='N'=OUT)
   ■ 총계 : 재집계(SUM/SUM), 월평균 = visible 6개월 출고합÷6 ÷ SC수
   ■ 제외 : facade_sc_yn='창구SC', dept_nm∈(고객지원팀,TOYOTA YM), user_id 목록
   ■ 확인(⚠) : 차량 브릿지 키, 나이대 컬럼명(age_grp), 딜러키 컬럼명(dealer_key)
   ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ */

/* ── 기준월 (월 탭) ── */
DECLARE @base_month DATE = '2026-01-01';

/* ── SC 계열 슬라이서 (NULL=모두, 콤마로 여러 값 지정 가능) ── */
DECLARE @active_yn   NVARCHAR(MAX) = N'재직';        -- 재직여부
DECLARE @age_grp     NVARCHAR(MAX) = NULL;           -- 나이대
DECLARE @sc_brand    NVARCHAR(MAX) = NULL;           -- ★신설: SC 브랜드(계층). 차량브랜드(@brand)와 별개
DECLARE @dealer_nm   NVARCHAR(MAX) = '렉서스 용산';           -- 딜러  콤마 다중 가능
DECLARE @group_name  NVARCHAR(MAX) = NULL;           -- 전시장  콤마 다중 가능
DECLARE @dept_nm     NVARCHAR(MAX) = NULL;           -- 팀  콤마 다중 가능
DECLARE @sc_name     NVARCHAR(MAX) = NULL;  -- SC(개별)

/* ── 차량 계열 슬라이서 (NULL=모두, 콤마로 여러 값 지정 가능) ── */
DECLARE @brand       NVARCHAR(MAX) = NULL;      -- 차량 브랜드 (※SC브랜드는 @sc_brand)
DECLARE @model_nm    NVARCHAR(MAX) = 'NX';      -- 모델
DECLARE @variant_nm  NVARCHAR(MAX) = NULL;      -- 차종
DECLARE @my_cd       NVARCHAR(MAX) = NULL;      -- 연식
DECLARE @sfx_cd      NVARCHAR(MAX) = NULL;      -- SFX

/* ── 그룹규칙 선택 (지표 + 등급) ── */
DECLARE @grp_category NVARCHAR(50) = NULL;   -- 또는 N'출고평균대수'
DECLARE @grp_name     NVARCHAR(10) = NULL;            -- 등급 A/B/C (NULL=전체)
DECLARE @period_cancel INT = 6;
DECLARE @period_avg    INT = 6;

/* ── 제외 규칙 ── */
DECLARE @exclude_facade NVARCHAR(50)  = N'창구SC';
DECLARE @exclude_dept   NVARCHAR(MAX) = N'고객지원팀,TOYOTA YM';
DECLARE @exclude_name   NVARCHAR(MAX) = N'고객지원팀';   -- ★집계용 더미SC(실인물 아님). name='고객지원팀'/dept='영업팀' 이라 dept제외로 안 걸림
DECLARE @exclude_users  NVARCHAR(MAX) = N'DM5103,DM9999,JB30007,JB30016,KMKS176,KMKS999,JB30067';

/* ── 파생 날짜 ── */
DECLARE @ref_date     DATE = EOMONTH(@base_month, -1);
DECLARE @ref_date_avg DATE = EOMONTH(@base_month);
DECLARE @ytd_start    DATE = DATEFROMPARTS(YEAR(@ref_date_avg),1,1);
DECLARE @ytd_prev_eom DATE = EOMONTH(@ref_date_avg, -1);

/* ── 차량필터 사용 여부 ── */
DECLARE @use_vehic_filter BIT =
    CASE WHEN @brand IS NULL AND @model_nm IS NULL AND @variant_nm IS NULL
          AND @my_cd IS NULL AND @sfx_cd IS NULL
         THEN 0 ELSE 1 END;

;WITH
/* ── 차량 슬라이서 통과 spec_key 집합 ─────────────────────────── */
target_vehic AS (
    /* ★수정 : DIM_VEHIC_SPEC 에 model_nm/variant_nm 이 이미 있어 조인 불필요.
       (기존 s.var_key = m.mdl_key 는 차종키↔모델키라 매칭 0건 → 차량필터 시 전 지표 0 원인) */
    SELECT s.spec_key
    FROM   ktws.DIM_VEHIC_SPEC s
    WHERE (@brand      IS NULL OR EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM STRING_SPLIT(@brand,     N',') x WHERE LTRIM(RTRIM(x.value)) = s.BRAND))
      AND (@my_cd      IS NULL OR EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM STRING_SPLIT(@my_cd,     N',') x WHERE LTRIM(RTRIM(x.value)) = s.my_cd))
      AND (@sfx_cd     IS NULL OR EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM STRING_SPLIT(@sfx_cd,    N',') x WHERE LTRIM(RTRIM(x.value)) = s.sfx_cd))
      AND (@model_nm   IS NULL OR EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM STRING_SPLIT(@model_nm,  N',') x WHERE LTRIM(RTRIM(x.value)) = s.model_nm))
      AND (@variant_nm IS NULL OR EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM STRING_SPLIT(@variant_nm,N',') x WHERE LTRIM(RTRIM(x.value)) = s.variant_nm))
),

/* ── SC 슬라이서 통과 집합 (+계층 컬럼) ───────────────────────── */
target_sc AS (
    SELECT
        u.sc_key, u.name,
        u.dealer_key,                  -- ★ 등급 판정용
        u.BRAND      AS brand_nm,      -- 계층: 브랜드
        u.dealer_nm  AS dealer_nm,     -- 계층: 딜러
        u.group_name AS group_name,    -- 계층: 전시장
        u.dept_nm    AS dept_nm,       -- 계층: 팀
        (SELECT MAX(r.RANGE_FROM) FROM ktws.FCT_SC_GROUP_RULE r
          WHERE r.DEALER_KEY = u.dealer_key          -- ⚠ 딜러키 컬럼명 확인
            AND r.GRP_CATEGORY = @grp_category
            AND r.GRP_NAME     = @grp_name)          AS rule_from,
        (SELECT MAX(r.RANGE_TO) FROM ktws.FCT_SC_GROUP_RULE r
          WHERE r.DEALER_KEY = u.dealer_key
            AND r.GRP_CATEGORY = @grp_category
            AND r.GRP_NAME     = @grp_name)          AS rule_to
    FROM   ktws.DIM_MNG_USER u
    WHERE  1=1
      /* ★ 시각적개체 필터 : SC '공백이 아님' (BI [0. sc_name] 비어있는 행 제외) */
      AND  u.name IS NOT NULL AND LTRIM(RTRIM(u.name)) <> N''
      AND (@active_yn  IS NULL OR EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM STRING_SPLIT(@active_yn, N',') x WHERE LTRIM(RTRIM(x.value)) = u.active_yn))
      AND (@age_grp    IS NULL OR EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM STRING_SPLIT(@age_grp,   N',') x WHERE LTRIM(RTRIM(x.value)) = u.age_grp))     -- ⚠ 나이대 컬럼명 확인
      AND (@sc_brand   IS NULL OR EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM STRING_SPLIT(@sc_brand,  N',') x WHERE LTRIM(RTRIM(x.value)) = u.BRAND))       -- ★신설
      AND (@dealer_nm  IS NULL OR EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM STRING_SPLIT(@dealer_nm, N',') x WHERE LTRIM(RTRIM(x.value)) = u.dealer_nm))
      AND (@group_name IS NULL OR EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM STRING_SPLIT(@group_name,N',') x WHERE LTRIM(RTRIM(x.value)) = u.group_name))
      AND (@dept_nm    IS NULL OR EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM STRING_SPLIT(@dept_nm,   N',') x WHERE LTRIM(RTRIM(x.value)) = u.dept_nm))
      AND (@sc_name    IS NULL OR EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM STRING_SPLIT(@sc_name,   N',') x WHERE LTRIM(RTRIM(x.value)) = u.name))
      AND (@exclude_facade IS NULL OR u.facade_sc_yn <> @exclude_facade)
      AND (@exclude_dept   IS NULL
           OR NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM STRING_SPLIT(@exclude_dept,',') s
                          WHERE LTRIM(RTRIM(s.value)) = u.dept_nm))
      AND (@exclude_name   IS NULL
           OR NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM STRING_SPLIT(@exclude_name,',') s
                          WHERE LTRIM(RTRIM(s.value)) = u.name))
      AND (@exclude_users  IS NULL
           OR NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM STRING_SPLIT(@exclude_users,',') s
                          WHERE LTRIM(RTRIM(s.value)) = u.user_id))
),

/* ── ① 누적취소율 : contract_dt 창, cancel_dt < 전월말 ────────── */
cancel_ratio AS (
    SELECT
        u.sc_key,
        SUM(CASE WHEN c.cancel_dt IS NOT NULL AND c.cancel_dt < @ref_date
                 THEN c.cnt ELSE 0 END)                 AS canceled_cnt,
        SUM(c.cnt)                                      AS total_cnt,
        CAST(NULLIF(SUM(CASE WHEN c.cancel_dt IS NOT NULL
                              AND c.cancel_dt < @ref_date
                             THEN c.cnt ELSE 0 END),0) AS FLOAT)
        / NULLIF(SUM(c.cnt),0)                          AS ratio_val
    FROM   target_sc u
    LEFT JOIN ktws.FCT_CONTRACT_KTWS c
           ON c.cn_sc_key   = u.sc_key
          AND c.contract_dt >  EOMONTH(@ref_date, -@period_cancel)
          AND c.contract_dt <= @ref_date
          AND (@use_vehic_filter = 0
               OR EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM target_vehic tv WHERE tv.spec_key = c.cn_vehic_key))
    GROUP BY u.sc_key
),

/* ── ② 월평균출고(SC별) : 최근 period개월 각 달 DISTINCTCOUNT ──── */
monthly_sales AS (
    SELECT
        u.sc_key,
        m.month_offset,
        COUNT(DISTINCT c.dlr_contract_no) AS monthly_cnt
    FROM   target_sc u
    CROSS APPLY (VALUES (1),(2),(3),(4),(5),(6)) AS m(month_offset)
    LEFT JOIN ktws.FCT_CONTRACT_KTWS c
           ON c.cn_sc_key = u.sc_key
          AND c.last_retail_sales_dt >= DATEFROMPARTS(
                  YEAR (DATEADD(MONTH,-m.month_offset,@ref_date_avg)),
                  MONTH(DATEADD(MONTH,-m.month_offset,@ref_date_avg)),1)
          AND c.last_retail_sales_dt <= EOMONTH(DATEADD(MONTH,-m.month_offset,@ref_date_avg))
          AND (c.cancel_dt > EOMONTH(DATEADD(MONTH,-m.month_offset,@ref_date_avg))
               OR c.cancel_dt IS NULL)
          AND (@use_vehic_filter = 0
               OR EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM target_vehic tv WHERE tv.spec_key = c.cn_vehic_key))
    WHERE  m.month_offset <= @period_avg
    GROUP BY u.sc_key, m.month_offset
),
monthly_avg AS (
    SELECT sc_key, AVG(CAST(monthly_cnt AS FLOAT)) AS avg_val
    FROM   monthly_sales
    WHERE  monthly_cnt > 0            -- 상세: 실적 있는 달만 평균 (AVERAGEX 동작)
    GROUP BY sc_key
),

/* ── ③ 연누적 / PMA IN·OUT (YTD) ──────────────────────────────── */
ytd AS (
    SELECT
        u.sc_key,
        COUNT(DISTINCT c.dlr_contract_no)                              AS sales_ytd,
        COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN c.pma_yn <> 'N' OR c.pma_yn IS NULL
                            THEN c.dlr_contract_no END)                AS pma_in,
        COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN c.pma_yn = 'N'
                            THEN c.dlr_contract_no END)                AS pma_out
    FROM   target_sc u
    LEFT JOIN ktws.FCT_CONTRACT_KTWS c
           ON c.cn_sc_key = u.sc_key
          AND c.last_retail_sales_dt >= @ytd_start
          AND c.last_retail_sales_dt <= @ref_date_avg
          AND (c.cancel_dt > @ytd_prev_eom OR c.cancel_dt IS NULL)
          AND (@use_vehic_filter = 0
               OR EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM target_vehic tv WHERE tv.spec_key = c.cn_vehic_key))
    GROUP BY u.sc_key
),

/* ── ④ SC 한 행 결합 + 딜러별 규칙 범위필터(_test 게이팅) ─────── */
sc_row AS (
    SELECT
        u.sc_key, u.name,
        u.brand_nm, u.dealer_nm, u.group_name, u.dept_nm,   -- 계층 전달
        COALESCE(y.sales_ytd,0) AS sales_ytd,
        COALESCE(y.pma_in,0)    AS pma_in,
        COALESCE(y.pma_out,0)   AS pma_out,
        cr.canceled_cnt,
        cr.total_cnt,
        cr.ratio_val AS raw_ratio,
        ma.avg_val   AS raw_avg,
        u.rule_from, u.rule_to,
        /* ★ 그룹분류(등급) : 해당 SC 지표값이 딜러 규칙 어느 구간에 드는지 판정 */
        ISNULL((
            SELECT TOP 1 r2.GRP_NAME
            FROM   ktws.FCT_SC_GROUP_RULE r2
            WHERE  r2.DEALER_KEY   = u.dealer_key
              AND  r2.GRP_CATEGORY = @grp_category
              AND  (r2.RANGE_FROM IS NULL OR
                    CASE WHEN @grp_category = N'누적 취소율'
                         THEN COALESCE(cr.ratio_val,0) ELSE COALESCE(ma.avg_val,0) END >= r2.RANGE_FROM)
              AND  (r2.RANGE_TO   IS NULL OR
                    CASE WHEN @grp_category = N'누적 취소율'
                         THEN COALESCE(cr.ratio_val,0) ELSE COALESCE(ma.avg_val,0) END <  r2.RANGE_TO)
            ORDER BY r2.GRP_NAME
        ), N'미분류')                                   AS grp_grade,
        CASE WHEN @grp_category = N'누적 취소율' AND @grp_name IS NOT NULL THEN
               CASE WHEN (u.rule_from IS NULL OR COALESCE(cr.ratio_val,0) >= u.rule_from)
                     AND (u.rule_to   IS NULL OR COALESCE(cr.ratio_val,0) <  u.rule_to)
                    THEN COALESCE(cr.ratio_val,0) END
             ELSE COALESCE(cr.ratio_val,0) END          AS canceled_ratio_val,
        CASE WHEN @grp_category = N'출고평균대수' AND @grp_name IS NOT NULL THEN
               CASE WHEN (u.rule_from IS NULL OR COALESCE(ma.avg_val,0) >= u.rule_from)
                     AND (u.rule_to   IS NULL OR COALESCE(ma.avg_val,0) <  u.rule_to)
                    THEN COALESCE(ma.avg_val,0) END
             ELSE COALESCE(ma.avg_val,0) END            AS monthly_avg_val
    FROM   target_sc u
    LEFT JOIN cancel_ratio cr ON cr.sc_key = u.sc_key
    LEFT JOIN monthly_avg  ma ON ma.sc_key = u.sc_key
    LEFT JOIN ytd          y  ON y.sc_key  = u.sc_key
),

/* ── ⑤ _test 통과 SC만 (실적 있고 등급범위 통과) ──────────────── */
visible AS (
    SELECT *
    FROM   sc_row
    /* ★ 등급 미선택(@grp_name IS NULL) = BI에서 A/B/C 버튼 아무것도 안 누른 상태
         → _test 게이팅 없이 슬라이서 범위의 전체 SC 표시 (BI 동작과 일치).
         (게이팅을 걸면 최근 6개월 계약 0건인 SC가 빠져 행수가 모자람) */
    WHERE  @grp_name IS NULL
       /* 등급 선택 시에만 게이팅 적용 (해당 등급 범위 통과 + 실적 존재) */
       OR  (@grp_category = N'누적 취소율'  AND total_cnt > 0 AND canceled_ratio_val IS NOT NULL)
       OR  (@grp_category = N'출고평균대수' AND raw_avg IS NOT NULL AND monthly_avg_val IS NOT NULL)
),

/* ── ⑤-T 총계용 월평균 val : visible SC만, 6개월 고정분모 ──────── */
monthly_avg_total AS (
    SELECT AVG(CAST(month_total AS FLOAT)) AS val_total   -- (visible 6개월 각 달 합)의 평균
    FROM (
        SELECT ms.month_offset, SUM(ms.monthly_cnt) AS month_total
        FROM   monthly_sales ms
        WHERE  EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM visible v WHERE v.sc_key = ms.sc_key)   -- ★ 표시된 SC만
        GROUP BY ms.month_offset
    ) t
),

/* ── ⑥ 상세행 (계층 컬럼 포함, 계층 순 정렬) ──────────────────── */
detail AS (
    SELECT
        0 AS grp,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY brand_nm  COLLATE Korean_Wansung_CI_AS,
                                    dealer_nm COLLATE Korean_Wansung_CI_AS,
                                    group_name COLLATE Korean_Wansung_CI_AS,
                                    dept_nm   COLLATE Korean_Wansung_CI_AS,
                                    name      COLLATE Korean_Wansung_CI_AS) AS sort_no,
        CAST(ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY brand_nm  COLLATE Korean_Wansung_CI_AS,
                                         dealer_nm COLLATE Korean_Wansung_CI_AS,
                                         group_name COLLATE Korean_Wansung_CI_AS,
                                         dept_nm   COLLATE Korean_Wansung_CI_AS,
                                         name      COLLATE Korean_Wansung_CI_AS) AS VARCHAR(10)) AS [no.],
        brand_nm                                                      AS [브랜드],
        dealer_nm                                                     AS [딜러],
        group_name                                                    AS [전시장],
        dept_nm                                                       AS [팀],
        name                                                          AS [SC],
        @grp_category                                                 AS [평가기준],
        grp_grade                                                     AS [그룹분류],
        /* 차량 슬라이서 적용값 (계약 속성이라 SC당 1행 유지 위해 '적용된 필터값'으로 표기) */
        ISNULL(@model_nm,   N'모두')                                  AS [모델],
        ISNULL(@variant_nm, N'모두')                                  AS [차종],
        ISNULL(@my_cd,      N'모두')                                  AS [연식],
        ISNULL(@sfx_cd,     N'모두')                                  AS [SFX],
        CAST(monthly_avg_val    AS DECIMAL(18,1))                     AS [월평균 출고],
        CAST(canceled_ratio_val AS DECIMAL(18,3))                     AS [누적취소율],
        sales_ytd                                                     AS [연누적 출고],
        pma_in                                                        AS [PMA IN],
        CAST(COALESCE(CAST(pma_in  AS FLOAT)/NULLIF(sales_ytd,0),0) AS DECIMAL(18,3)) AS [PMA IN 비중],
        pma_out                                                       AS [PMA OUT],
        CAST(COALESCE(CAST(pma_out AS FLOAT)/NULLIF(sales_ytd,0),0) AS DECIMAL(18,3)) AS [PMA OUT 비중]
    FROM visible
),

/* ── ⑦ 총계행 (전체 재집계, 계층 컬럼은 공란) ─────────────────── */
grand AS (
    SELECT
        1 AS grp,
        2147483647 AS sort_no,
        N''                             AS [no.],
        NULL                            AS [브랜드],
        NULL                            AS [딜러],
        NULL                            AS [전시장],
        NULL                            AS [팀],
        N'합계'                                                       AS [SC],
        @grp_category                   AS [평가기준],
        NULL                            AS [그룹분류],
        NULL                            AS [모델],
        NULL                            AS [차종],
        NULL                            AS [연식],
        NULL                            AS [SFX],
        CAST( (SELECT val_total FROM monthly_avg_total)
              / NULLIF(COUNT(*),0) AS DECIMAL(18,1))                  AS [월평균 출고],
        CAST(CAST(NULLIF(SUM(canceled_cnt),0) AS FLOAT)
             /NULLIF(SUM(total_cnt),0) AS DECIMAL(18,3))              AS [누적취소율],
        SUM(sales_ytd)                                                AS [연누적 출고],
        SUM(pma_in)                                                   AS [PMA IN],
        CAST(COALESCE(CAST(SUM(pma_in)  AS FLOAT)/NULLIF(SUM(sales_ytd),0),0) AS DECIMAL(18,3)) AS [PMA IN 비중],
        SUM(pma_out)                                                  AS [PMA OUT],
        CAST(COALESCE(CAST(SUM(pma_out) AS FLOAT)/NULLIF(SUM(sales_ytd),0),0) AS DECIMAL(18,3)) AS [PMA OUT 비중]
    FROM visible
)

/* ── ⑧ 최종 출력 : 상세행 + 총계행 ───────────────────────────── */
SELECT [no.], [브랜드], [딜러], [전시장], [팀], [SC], [평가기준], [그룹분류], [모델], [차종], [연식], [SFX],
       [월평균 출고], [누적취소율],
       [연누적 출고], [PMA IN], [PMA IN 비중], [PMA OUT], [PMA OUT 비중]
FROM (
    SELECT grp, sort_no, [no.], [브랜드], [딜러], [전시장], [팀], [SC], [평가기준], [그룹분류], [모델], [차종], [연식], [SFX],
           [월평균 출고], [누적취소율],
           [연누적 출고], [PMA IN], [PMA IN 비중], [PMA OUT], [PMA OUT 비중]
    FROM   detail
    UNION ALL
    SELECT grp, sort_no, [no.], [브랜드], [딜러], [전시장], [팀], [SC], [평가기준], [그룹분류], [모델], [차종], [연식], [SFX],
           [월평균 출고], [누적취소율],
           [연누적 출고], [PMA IN], [PMA IN 비중], [PMA OUT], [PMA OUT 비중]
    FROM   grand
) AS m
ORDER BY m.grp, m.sort_no;
